"""
handlers/admin.py — Admin command handlers for CHM BREAKER BOT.

Extracted from handlers/_all.py (lines ~4142-4564).
Covers: /admin, /give, /revoke, /ban, /unban, /userinfo, /decode_wm,
        /broadcast (+ BroadcastState FSM), /addcode, /delcode, /listcodes,
        /export_subs, /import_subs, /cleanup_trades.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import html as _html  # SECURITY-FIX
import asyncio
import datetime
import logging
import os
import time

from aiogram import F
from aiogram.exceptions import TelegramForbiddenError, TelegramRetryAfter
from aiogram.filters import Command
from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext
from aiogram.fsm.state import State, StatesGroup
from aiogram.types import Message
from keyboards import kb_fsm_cancel

import database as db
import turso_sync as _turso
from watermark import wm_decode

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers")
_audit = logging.getLogger("CHM.Audit")  # отдельный логгер для admin-действий


# ─── FSM ──────────────────────────────────────────────

class BroadcastState(StatesGroup):
    confirm = State()


# ─── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────

def _fire_task(coro, *, name: str = "bg_task") -> asyncio.Task:
    """Создаёт asyncio.Task с логированием исключений."""
    task = asyncio.create_task(coro, name=name)

    def _on_done(t: asyncio.Task) -> None:
        if t.cancelled():
            return
        exc = t.exception()
        if exc is not None:
            log.error("Фоновая задача '%s' упала: %s", name, exc, exc_info=exc)

    task.add_done_callback(_on_done)
    return task


# ─── Registration ─────────────────────────────────────

def register_admin_handlers(dp, bot, um, scanner, config, turso=None, **kwargs):
    """Register all admin-related message handlers onto *dp*."""

    # ── local closures that need config / um ──────────

    def is_admin(uid: int) -> bool:
        if uid in config.ADMIN_IDS:
            return True
        log.warning("Попытка admin-команды от uid=%s — отклонено", uid)
        return False

    def _subs_backup_path() -> str:
        db_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(config.DB_PATH))
        return os.path.join(db_dir, "subs_backup.txt")

    async def _save_subs_backup():
        """Сохраняет активных пользователей в файл рядом с БД."""
        users = await um.all_users()
        lines = [f"# Backup: {datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat()}"]
        for u in users:
            if u.sub_status in ("active", "trial") and u.sub_expires > time.time():
                lines.append(
                    f"{u.user_id}\t{u.username or ''}\t{u.sub_status}\t{u.sub_expires:.0f}"
                )
        path = _subs_backup_path()
        try:
            with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                f.write("\n".join(lines))
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("subs backup write error: %s", e)

    # ── /admin ────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("admin"))
    async def cmd_admin(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        s   = await um.stats_summary()
        prf = scanner.get_perf() if hasattr(scanner, "get_perf") else {}
        cs  = prf.get("cache", {})
        NL  = "\n"
        await msg.answer(
            "👑 <b>Панель администратора</b>" + NL + NL +
            "👥 Всего: <b>" + str(s["total"]) + "</b>  ✅ Активных: <b>" + str(s["active"]) + "</b>  🆓 Триал: <b>" + str(s["trial"]) + "</b>" + NL +
            "🔄 Сканируют: <b>" + str(s["scanning"]) + "</b>" + NL +
            "📋 🟢 " + str(s.get("plan_beginner", 0)) + "  🔵 " + str(s.get("plan_pro", 0)) + "  🟡 " + str(s.get("plan_elite", 0)) + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            "Циклов: <b>" + str(prf.get("cycles", 0)) + "</b>  Сигналов: <b>" + str(prf.get("signals", 0)) + "</b>  API: <b>" + str(prf.get("api_calls", 0)) + "</b>" + NL +
            "Кэш: <b>" + str(cs.get("size", 0)) + "</b> ключей | хит <b>" + str(cs.get("ratio", 0)) + "%</b>" + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            "📋 <b>Подписки и тарифы:</b>" + NL +
            "/give [id] [дней] [план]  — выдать доступ" + NL +
            "  планы: beginner, pro, elite (дефолт: elite)" + NL +
            "  пример: <code>/give 123 30 elite</code>" + NL +
            "/revoke [id]  — забрать доступ" + NL +
            "/ban [id]  /unban [id]" + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            "🔍 <b>Информация:</b>" + NL +
            "/userinfo [id]  — инфо о пользователе (+ тариф)" + NL +
            "/export_subs  — выгрузить подписки" + NL +
            "/import_subs  — импорт подписок" + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            "📢 <b>Рассылка:</b>" + NL +
            "/broadcast [текст]  — рассылка всем active" + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            "🎟 <b>Промокоды:</b>" + NL +
            "/addcode [код] [часов]  — создать" + NL +
            "/delcode [код]  — удалить" + NL +
            "/listcodes  — список" + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            "🏆 <b>Prop Autopilot:</b>" + NL +
            "/propcode [код] [макс_исп]  — создать prop-промокод" + NL +
            "  пример: <code>/propcode PROP-VIP 10</code>" + NL +
            "/delpropcode [код]  — удалить" + NL +
            "/propcodes  — список активных кодов" + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            "🏪 <b>Маркетплейс:</b>" + NL +
            "/preset_approve [id]  — одобрить пресет" + NL +
            "/preset_reject [id]  — отклонить" + NL +
            "/mp_sales  — статистика продаж (кому сколько выплатить)" + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            "🔧 <b>Обслуживание:</b>" + NL +
            "/cleanup_trades  — очистить зависшие сделки" + NL +
            "/decode_wm [фото]  — декодировать водяной знак",
            parse_mode="HTML",
        )

    # ── /give ─────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("give"))
    async def cmd_give(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 3:
            await msg.answer(
                "Использование: <code>/give [user_id] [дней] [план]</code>\n\n"
                "Планы: <b>beginner</b>, <b>pro</b>, <b>elite</b>\n"
                "По умолчанию: elite\n\n"
                "Примеры:\n"
                "<code>/give 123456789 30 elite</code>\n"
                "<code>/give 123456789 90 pro</code>\n"
                "<code>/give 123456789 7</code> (= elite)",
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )
            return
        try:
            tid  = int(parts[1])
            days = int(parts[2])
            plan = parts[3].lower() if len(parts) > 3 else "elite"
            if plan not in ("beginner", "pro", "elite"):
                plan = "elite"
        except ValueError:
            await msg.answer("❌ Неверный формат")
            return
        user = await um.get_or_create(tid)
        user.grant_access(days)
        user.sub_plan = plan
        await um.save(user)
        await _save_subs_backup()
        _fire_task(_turso.turso_push(config.DB_PATH), name="turso_push")

        plan_labels = {"beginner": "🟢 Beginner", "pro": "🔵 Pro", "elite": "🟡 Elite"}
        plan_label  = plan_labels[plan]
        uname = user.username or str(tid)
        await msg.answer(f"✅ {plan_label} выдан @{uname} на {days} дней")
        _audit.info("GIVE uid=%s days=%d plan=%s by_admin=%s", tid, days, plan, msg.from_user.id)

        try:
            await bot.send_message(
                tid,
                f"🎉 <b>Доступ открыт!</b>\n\n"
                f"📋 Тариф: <b>{plan_label}</b>\n"
                f"📅 Подписка: <b>{days} дней</b>\n"
                f"⏳ Осталось: <b>{user.time_left_str()}</b>\n\n"
                f"━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n"
                f"📚 <b>Обязательно к прочтению:</b>\n"
                f"👉 <a href=\"https://chmup.top/academy/\">CHM Academy — Руководство</a>\n\n"
                f"⚠️ <b>Дисклеймер:</b> Мы не несём ответственности за ваши "
                f"торговые решения и финансовые результаты. "
                f"Торговля криптовалютами связана с высоким риском.\n\n"
                f"Нажми /menu чтобы начать",
                parse_mode="HTML",
                disable_web_page_preview=True,
            )
        except TelegramForbiddenError:
            log.info("GIVE: uid=%s заблокировал бота", tid)
        except TelegramRetryAfter as e:
            log.warning("GIVE: flood control %ss uid=%s", e.retry_after, tid)
        except Exception as e:
            log.error("GIVE: уведомление uid=%s: %s", tid, e)

        # Реферальная программа: отмечаем конверсию и выдаём награду если нужно
        try:
            ref_result = await db.db_ref_on_purchase(tid)
            if ref_result:
                referrer_id, total_conv = ref_result
                notify = f"🎉 Ваш реферал купил подписку! Всего успешных: <b>{total_conv}</b>"
                should_reward = await db.db_ref_check_and_claim_reward(referrer_id)
                if should_reward:
                    referrer = await um.get(referrer_id)
                    if referrer:
                        referrer.grant_access(30)
                        await um.save(referrer)
                    notify += "\n\n🎁 <b>Вы получили 30 дней бесплатно!</b> (5 успешных рефералов)"
                await bot.send_message(referrer_id, notify, parse_mode="HTML")
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("GIVE: реферальная uid=%s: %s", tid, e)

    # ── /revoke ───────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("revoke"))
    async def cmd_revoke(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 2:
            await msg.answer("Использование: /revoke [id]")
            return
        try:
            tid = int(parts[1])
        except ValueError:
            return
        user = await um.get(tid)
        if not user:
            await msg.answer("❌ Не найден")
            return
        user.sub_status = "expired"; user.sub_expires = 0
        user.active = False; user.long_active = False; user.short_active = False
        await um.save(user)
        await _save_subs_backup()
        _fire_task(_turso.turso_push(config.DB_PATH), name="turso_push")
        uname = user.username or str(tid)
        _audit.info("REVOKE uid=%s by_admin=%s", tid, msg.from_user.id)
        await msg.answer(f"✅ Доступ отозван у @{uname}")

    # ── /ban ──────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("ban"))
    async def cmd_ban(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 2:
            await msg.answer("Использование: /ban [id]")
            return
        try:
            tid = int(parts[1])
        except ValueError:
            return
        user = await um.get(tid)
        if not user:
            await msg.answer("❌ Не найден")
            return
        user.sub_status = "banned"; user.active = False
        user.long_active = False; user.short_active = False
        await um.save(user)
        _fire_task(_turso.turso_push(config.DB_PATH), name="turso_push")
        uname = user.username or str(tid)
        _audit.info("BAN uid=%s by_admin=%s", tid, msg.from_user.id)
        await msg.answer(f"🚫 @{uname} заблокирован")

    # ── /unban ────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("unban"))
    async def cmd_unban(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 2:
            await msg.answer("Использование: /unban [id]")
            return
        try:
            tid = int(parts[1])
        except ValueError:
            return
        user = await um.get(tid)
        if not user:
            await msg.answer("❌ Не найден")
            return
        user.sub_status = "expired"
        await um.save(user)
        uname = user.username or str(tid)
        _audit.info("UNBAN uid=%s by_admin=%s", tid, msg.from_user.id)
        await msg.answer(f"✅ @{uname} разблокирован")

    # ── /userinfo ─────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("userinfo"))
    async def cmd_userinfo(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 2:
            await msg.answer("Использование: /userinfo [id]")
            return
        try:
            tid = int(parts[1])
        except ValueError:
            return
        user = await um.get(tid)
        if not user:
            await msg.answer("❌ Не найден")
            return
        stats = await db.db_get_user_stats(tid)
        long_icon  = "🟢" if user.long_active  else "⚫"
        short_icon = "🟢" if user.short_active else "⚫"
        both_icon  = "🟢" if user.active       else "⚫"
        total_rr   = stats.get("total_rr", 0)
        plan_labels = {"beginner": "🟢 Beginner", "pro": "🔵 Pro", "elite": "🟡 Elite"}
        plan = getattr(user, "sub_plan", "beginner") or "beginner"
        plan_label = plan_labels.get(plan, plan)
        await msg.answer(
            f"👤 <b>@{user.username or '—'}</b> (<code>{user.user_id}</code>)\n"
            f"Подписка: <b>{user.sub_status.upper()}</b> | Осталось: <b>{user.time_left_str()}</b>\n"
            f"📋 Тариф: <b>{plan_label}</b>\n"
            f"ЛОНГ: {long_icon}  ШОРТ: {short_icon}  ОБА: {both_icon}\n"
            f"Сигналов: <b>{user.signals_received}</b>  "
            f"Сделок: <b>{stats.get('total', 0)}</b>  "
            f"R: <b>{total_rr:+.2f}R</b>\n"
            f"Стратегия: <b>{user.strategy or 'не выбрана'}</b>",
            parse_mode="HTML",
        )

    # ── /decode_wm ────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("decode_wm"))
    async def cmd_decode_wm(msg: Message):
        """Декодирует невидимый водяной знак из скопированного сигнала."""
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return

        # Собираем текст из всех возможных источников
        source = None
        if msg.reply_to_message:
            source = (
                msg.reply_to_message.text
                or msg.reply_to_message.caption  # пересланное фото с подписью
            )
        if not source:
            # Текст после команды: /decode_wm <текст>
            raw = msg.text or msg.caption or ""
            after_cmd = raw.split(None, 1)
            source = after_cmd[1].strip() if len(after_cmd) > 1 else None

        if not source:
            await msg.answer(
                "❌ <b>Как пользоваться:</b>\n\n"
                "1️⃣ <b>Reply на сообщение сигнала</b> — перешли (forward) или ответь на текст сигнала, "
                "затем отправь <code>/decode_wm</code> как ответ на него\n\n"
                "2️⃣ <b>Вставить текст:</b> <code>/decode_wm [скопированный текст сигнала]</code>\n\n"
                "⚠️ <b>Фото/скриншот не работает</b> — водяной знак зашит в <u>тексте</u> сигнала "
                "(невидимые Unicode-символы). Нужен именно текст, не картинка.",
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )
            return
        uid = wm_decode(source)
        if uid is None:
            await msg.answer("❌ Водяной знак не найден — текст без watermark или повреждён")
            return
        user = await um.get(uid)
        if user:
            await msg.answer(
                "🔍 <b>Водяной знак декодирован</b>\n\n"
                "👤 @" + str(user.username or "—") + " (<code>" + str(uid) + "</code>)\n"
                "Подписка: <b>" + user.sub_status.upper() + "</b>\n"
                "Сигналов получено: <b>" + str(user.signals_received) + "</b>",
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )
        else:
            await msg.answer(
                "🔍 User ID из водяного знака: <code>" + str(uid) + "</code>\n"
                "(пользователь не найден в БД)",
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )

    # ── /broadcast + FSM ──────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("broadcast"))
    async def cmd_broadcast(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        text = msg.text.replace("/broadcast", "", 1).strip()
        if not text:
            await msg.answer("Использование: /broadcast [текст]")
            return
        users  = await um.all_users()
        target = [u for u in users if u.sub_status in ("trial", "active")]
        await state.update_data(broadcast_text=text)
        await state.set_state(BroadcastState.confirm)
        await msg.answer(
            f"📢 <b>Подтверждение рассылки</b>\n\n"
            f"Получателей: <b>{len(target)}</b> активных пользователей\n\n"
            f"Текст сообщения:\n<i>{text}</i>\n\n"
            f"Напишите <code>CONFIRM</code> для отправки или /cancel для отмены.",
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(),
        )

    @dp.message(BroadcastState.confirm)
    async def broadcast_confirm(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            await state.clear()
            return
        if msg.text and msg.text.strip().upper() == "CONFIRM":
            data = await state.get_data()
            text = data.get("broadcast_text", "")
            await state.clear()
            users = await um.all_users()
            sent = failed = 0
            _audit.info(
                "BROADCAST by_admin=%s recipients=%d",
                msg.from_user.id,
                sum(1 for u in users if u.sub_status in ("trial", "active")),
            )
            for u in users:
                if u.sub_status in ("trial", "active"):
                    try:
                        await bot.send_message(u.user_id, f"📢 {text}")
                        sent += 1
                        await asyncio.sleep(0.04)
                    except TelegramForbiddenError:
                        failed += 1  # пользователь заблокировал бота
                    except TelegramRetryAfter as e:
                        await asyncio.sleep(e.retry_after)
                        try:
                            await bot.send_message(u.user_id, f"📢 {text}")
                            sent += 1
                        except Exception:
                            failed += 1
                    except Exception as e:
                        log.warning("broadcast uid=%s: %s", u.user_id, e)
                        failed += 1
            await msg.answer(f"📢 Рассылка завершена: ✅ {sent}  ❌ {failed}")
        else:
            await state.clear()
            await msg.answer("❌ Рассылка отменена.")

    # ── /addcode ──────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("addcode"))
    async def cmd_addcode(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 2:
            await msg.answer(
                "Использование: /addcode [код] [часов]\nПример: /addcode FREECHM 2"
            )
            return
        code  = parts[1].upper()
        hours = 2
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            try:
                hours = int(parts[2])
            except ValueError:
                await msg.answer("❌ Количество часов должно быть числом")
                return
        await db.db_promo_create(code, msg.from_user.id, hours)
        await msg.answer(
            f"✅ Промокод <code>{code}</code> создан ({hours} ч.)\n\n"
            f"Пользователь вводит его на экране тарифов. Удалить: /delcode {code}",
            parse_mode="HTML",
        )

    # ── /delcode ──────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("delcode"))
    async def cmd_delcode(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 2:
            await msg.answer("Использование: /delcode [код]")
            return
        code = parts[1].upper()
        deleted = await db.db_promo_delete(code)
        if deleted:
            await msg.answer(
                f"✅ Промокод <code>{code}</code> удалён — теперь недействителен.",
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )
        else:
            await msg.answer(
                f"❌ Промокод <code>{code}</code> не найден.",
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )

    # ── /listcodes ────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("listcodes"))
    async def cmd_listcodes(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        codes = await db.db_promo_list()
        if not codes:
            await msg.answer("📋 Активных промокодов нет.")
            return
        NL    = "\n"
        lines = ["📋 <b>Активные промокоды:</b>" + NL]
        for c in codes:
            dt = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(c["created_at"]).strftime("%d.%m %H:%M")
            lines.append(f"<code>{c['code']}</code> — {c['duration_hours']} ч.  (создан {dt})")
        lines.append(NL + "Удалить: /delcode КОД")
        await msg.answer(NL.join(lines), parse_mode="HTML")

    # ── PROP AUTOPILOT admin commands ────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("propcode"))
    async def cmd_propcode(msg: Message):
        """Создать prop-промокод: /propcode CODE [max_uses]"""
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 2:
            await msg.answer("Использование: /propcode [код] [макс_исп]\nПример: /propcode PROP-A7X9 5")
            return
        code = parts[1].upper()
        max_uses = 1
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            try:
                max_uses = int(parts[2])
            except ValueError:
                await msg.answer("❌ Макс. использований должно быть числом"); return
        await db.db_prop_code_create(code, msg.from_user.id, max_uses)
        await msg.answer(
            f"✅ Prop-код <code>{code}</code> создан (макс. {max_uses} исп.)\n\n"
            f"Пользователь вводит его в 🏆 Prop Autopilot → 🔑 Ввести промокод.\n"
            f"Удалить: /delpropcode {code}",
            parse_mode="HTML",
        )

    @dp.message(Command("delpropcode"))
    async def cmd_delpropcode(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 2:
            await msg.answer("Использование: /delpropcode [код]"); return
        code = parts[1].upper()
        ok = await db.db_prop_code_delete(code)
        await msg.answer(f"{'✅ Удалён' if ok else '❌ Не найден'}: {code}")

    @dp.message(Command("propcodes"))
    async def cmd_propcodes(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        codes = await db.db_prop_code_list()
        if not codes:
            await msg.answer("📋 Prop-кодов нет."); return
        NL = "\n"
        lines = ["🏆 <b>Prop-коды:</b>" + NL]
        for c in codes:
            dt = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(c["created_at"]).strftime("%d.%m %H:%M")
            lines.append(
                f"<code>{c['code']}</code> — исп. {c['used_count']}/{c['max_uses']}  (создан {dt})"
            )
        lines.append(NL + "Удалить: /delpropcode КОД")
        await msg.answer(NL.join(lines), parse_mode="HTML")

    # ── Маркетплейс пресетов: approve/reject ────────

    @dp.message(Command("preset_approve"))
    async def cmd_preset_approve(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id): return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 2:
            await msg.answer("Использование: /preset_approve [id]"); return
        try:
            pid = int(parts[1])
        except ValueError:
            await msg.answer("❌ ID должен быть числом"); return
        preset = await db.db_get_preset(pid)
        if not preset:
            await msg.answer(f"❌ Пресет #{pid} не найден"); return
        await db.db_update_preset(pid, {"status": "active", "bt_verified": 1, "updated_at": time.time()})
        await msg.answer(f"✅ Пресет #{pid} «{preset['name']}» одобрен и опубликован!", parse_mode="HTML")
        try:
            await bot.send_message(
                preset["author_id"],
                f"✅ Твой пресет «{preset['name']}» одобрен и появился в маркетплейсе!",
            )
        except Exception: pass

    @dp.message(Command("preset_reject"))
    async def cmd_preset_reject(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id): return
        parts = msg.text.split()
        if len(parts) < 2:
            await msg.answer("Использование: /preset_reject [id]"); return
        try:
            pid = int(parts[1])
        except ValueError:
            await msg.answer("❌ ID должен быть числом"); return
        preset = await db.db_get_preset(pid)
        if not preset:
            await msg.answer(f"❌ Пресет #{pid} не найден"); return
        await db.db_update_preset(pid, {"status": "rejected", "updated_at": time.time()})
        await msg.answer(f"❌ Пресет #{pid} отклонён.")
        try:
            await bot.send_message(preset["author_id"], f"❌ Пресет «{preset['name']}» отклонён.")
        except Exception: pass

    # ── /mp_sales — статистика продаж маркетплейса ───

    @dp.message(Command("mp_sales"))
    async def cmd_mp_sales(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id): return
        rows = await db.db_mp_sales_report()
        if not rows:
            await msg.answer("🏪 Продаж пока нет."); return
        NL = "\n"
        total_ton = sum(r["total_ton"] or 0 for r in rows)
        total_sales = sum(r["sales_count"] or 0 for r in rows)
        lines = [
            f"🏪 <b>Статистика продаж маркетплейса</b>{NL}",
            f"💎 Всего получено: <b>{total_ton:.2f} TON</b>",
            f"🛒 Всего продаж: <b>{total_sales}</b>{NL}",
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
            f"<b>По авторам (70% — автору, 30% — комиссия):</b>{NL}",
        ]
        for r in rows:
            author_ton = (r["total_ton"] or 0) * 0.70
            lines.append(
                f"👤 @{r['author_name'] or r['author_id']}:"
                f"  {r['sales_count']} продаж  |"
                f"  💎 {r['total_ton']:.2f} TON"
                f"  → выплатить <b>{author_ton:.2f} TON</b>"
            )
        lines += [
            f"{NL}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
            f"🏦 Твоя комиссия 30%: <b>{total_ton * 0.30:.2f} TON</b>",
        ]
        await msg.answer(NL.join(lines), parse_mode="HTML")

    # ── /export_subs ──────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("export_subs"))
    async def cmd_export_subs(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        await _save_subs_backup()
        users  = await um.all_users()
        active = [u for u in users if u.sub_status in ("active", "trial") and u.sub_expires > time.time()]
        if not active:
            await msg.answer("📋 Нет активных подписок.")
            return
        lines = ["📋 <b>Активные подписки:</b>", ""]
        for u in active:
            left = u.time_left_str()
            lines.append(
                f"<code>/give {u.user_id} ___</code>  @{u.username or u.user_id}  осталось: {left}"
            )
        lines.append("")
        lines.append("<i>Файл: subs_backup.txt — используй /import_subs после редеплоя</i>")
        await msg.answer("\n".join(lines), parse_mode="HTML")

    # ── /import_subs ──────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("import_subs"))
    async def cmd_import_subs(msg: Message):
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        path = _subs_backup_path()
        try:
            with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                lines = f.readlines()
        except FileNotFoundError:
            await msg.answer(
                "❌ Файл subs_backup.txt не найден. Сначала сделай /export_subs."
            )
            return
        restored = 0
        errors   = 0
        for line in lines:
            line = line.strip()
            if not line or line.startswith("#"):
                continue
            parts = line.split("\t")
            if len(parts) < 4:
                continue
            try:
                uid        = int(parts[0])
                username   = parts[1]
                sub_status = parts[2]
                sub_expires = float(parts[3])
                if sub_expires <= time.time():
                    continue  # уже истекла
                user = await um.get_or_create(uid, username)
                user.sub_status  = sub_status
                user.sub_expires = sub_expires
                user.username    = username or user.username
                await um.save(user)
                restored += 1
            except Exception as e:
                log.warning("import_subs line error: %s", e)
                errors += 1
        await msg.answer(f"✅ Восстановлено: {restored}  ❌ Ошибок: {errors}")

    # ── /cleanup_trades ───────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("cleanup_trades"))
    async def cmd_cleanup_trades(msg: Message):
        """Помечает мёртвые/призрачные записи сделок как SKIP.

        Использование:
          /cleanup_trades              — очищает для всех пользователей (30 дней)
          /cleanup_trades [uid]        — очищает только для конкретного пользователя
          /cleanup_trades [uid] [дней] — очищает старше N дней
        """
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        parts    = msg.text.split()
        uid_arg  = None
        days_arg = 30
        if len(parts) >= 2:
            try:
                uid_arg = int(parts[1])
            except ValueError:
                await msg.answer("❌ Неверный user_id")
                return
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            try:
                days_arg = int(parts[2])
            except ValueError:
                await msg.answer("❌ Неверное количество дней")
                return

        await msg.answer("⏳ Очищаю мёртвые сделки...")
        try:
            if uid_arg is not None:
                no_order, old = await db.db_cleanup_ghost_trades(uid_arg, days_arg)
                total = no_order + old
                await msg.answer(
                    f"✅ Очищено для uid={uid_arg}:\n"
                    f"  Без order_id: {no_order}\n"
                    f"  Старше {days_arg}д: {old}\n"
                    f"  Итого: {total}"
                )
            else:
                no_order, old = await db.db_cleanup_ghost_trades_all(days_arg)
                total = no_order + old
                await msg.answer(
                    f"✅ Глобальная очистка завершена:\n"
                    f"  Без order_id: {no_order}\n"
                    f"  Старше {days_arg}д: {old}\n"
                    f"  Итого: {total}"
                )
        except Exception as e:
            await msg.answer(f"❌ Ошибка: {e}")

    # ── /debug_sentry ──────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("debug_sentry"))
    async def cmd_debug_sentry(msg: Message):
        """Тестовая команда: намеренно выбрасывает ZeroDivisionError → Sentry."""
        if not is_admin(msg.from_user.id):
            return
        try:
            _ = 1 / 0  # намеренная ошибка для теста Sentry
        except ZeroDivisionError as e:
            try:
                import sentry_sdk
                sentry_sdk.capture_exception(e)
                await msg.answer(
                    "✅ <b>Sentry тест отправлен!</b>\n\n"
                    "Зайди в Sentry → Issues.\n"
                    "Ошибка <code>ZeroDivisionError: division by zero</code> "
                    "должна появиться в течение 30 секунд.",
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
            except ImportError:
                await msg.answer(
                    "❌ <b>sentry-sdk не установлен</b>\n\n"
                    "Добавь в requirements.txt:\n<code>sentry-sdk[pure_eval]</code>",
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/advanced.py
================================================================================
"""handlers/advanced.py — Handlers для продвинутых фич (Liquidation, Swarm, Funding, etc.)."""
from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
import html as _html
import logging

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.types import CallbackQuery, InlineKeyboardMarkup, InlineKeyboardButton

from handlers._common import safe_edit
from keyboards import _btn, _noop, _back

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Advanced")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, config) -> None:

    # ── Главное меню продвинутых фич ──────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "advanced_menu")
    async def cb_advanced_menu(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, _main_text(), _kb_advanced(user))

    def _main_text() -> str:
        return (
            "🧠 <b>Продвинутые инструменты</b>\n"
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n"
            "AI-аналитика, мета-данные бирж,\n"
            "коллективный разум и многое другое.\n\n"
            "🔔 = фоновые уведомления включены"
        )

    def _alert_mark(user, field) -> str:
        return " 🔔" if getattr(user, field, False) else ""

    def _kb_advanced(user=None) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        u = user
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _noop("── 🧠 Инструменты ──"),
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📊 Liquidation" + _alert_mark(u, "alert_liquidation"), callback_data="adv_liquidation"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="🦎 Regime" + _alert_mark(u, "alert_regime"), callback_data="adv_regime")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🐝 Swarm" + _alert_mark(u, "alert_swarm"), callback_data="adv_swarm"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="💰 Funding" + _alert_mark(u, "alert_funding"), callback_data="adv_funding")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🔄 Арбитраж" + _alert_mark(u, "alert_arbitrage"), callback_data="adv_arbitrage"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="🐋 Whales" + _alert_mark(u, "alert_whales"), callback_data="adv_whales")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🧬 Genome", callback_data="adv_genome"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="🏆 Лидерборд", callback_data="adv_leaderboard")],
            _noop("── 🔔 Уведомления ──"),
            _btn("⚙️ Настроить уведомления", "adv_alerts_menu"),
            _back("back_main"),
        ])

    # ── 2. Liquidation Oracle ─────────────────────────

    def _kb_liquidation(data: list[dict] | None = None) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        """Клавиатура: обновить, помощь, и кнопки для heatmap по топ-3 high-risk."""
        rows: list = []
        if data:
            top = sorted(data, key=lambda x: x.get("risk_score", 0), reverse=True)[:3]
            heat_row = []
            for d in top:
                sym = d["symbol"].replace("USDT", "")
                heat_row.append(InlineKeyboardButton(
                    text=f"🗺 {sym}",
                    callback_data=f"adv_liq_heat_{d['symbol']}",
                ))
            if heat_row:
                rows.append(heat_row)
        rows.append(_btn("🔄 Обновить", "adv_liquidation"))
        rows.append(_btn("ℹ️ Что это / как пользоваться", "adv_liq_help"))
        rows.append(_back("advanced_menu"))
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_liquidation")
    async def cb_liquidation(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("📊 Загрузка данных...")
        from advanced_features import fetch_liquidation_data, format_liquidation_dashboard
        data = await fetch_liquidation_data()
        text = format_liquidation_dashboard(data)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_liquidation(data))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_liq_help")
    async def cb_liquidation_help(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from advanced_features import format_liquidation_help
        await safe_edit(cb, format_liquidation_help(), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("◀️ К дашборду", "adv_liquidation"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ]))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("adv_liq_heat_"))
    async def cb_liquidation_heatmap(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🗺 Строю heatmap...")
        symbol = cb.data.replace("adv_liq_heat_", "")
        from advanced_features import fetch_liquidation_data, format_liquidation_dashboard
        data = await fetch_liquidation_data()
        text = format_liquidation_dashboard(data, detailed_symbol=symbol)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_liquidation(data))

    # ── 3. Regime Chameleon ───────────────────────────

    def _kb_regime(user=None) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        alert_mark = _alert_mark(user, "alert_regime") if user else ""
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("🔄 Обновить" + (" (AI)"), "adv_regime_refresh"),
            _btn("🔔 Уведомить о смене" + alert_mark, "adv_toggle_alert_regime"),
            _btn("ℹ️ Что это / как пользоваться", "adv_regime_help"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ])

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_regime")
    async def cb_regime(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        regime = ""
        try:
            import market_regime as _mr
            regime = _mr.get_cached_regime() or ""
        except Exception:
            pass
        # Предпочитаем UPPERCASE режим из market_adapter, если он есть —
        # он богаче (stance + FG + AI). Технический используется как fallback.
        try:
            from market_adapter import get_last_adaptation, load_adaptation
            adapt = get_last_adaptation() or await load_adaptation()
            if adapt and getattr(adapt, "regime", ""):
                regime = adapt.regime
        except Exception:
            pass
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from advanced_features import format_chameleon_dashboard
        text = await format_chameleon_dashboard(str(regime), user=user)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_regime(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_regime_refresh")
    async def cb_regime_refresh(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🧠 Обновляю через AI...")
        try:
            from market_adapter import refresh_adaptation, save_adaptation
            result = await refresh_adaptation()
            await save_adaptation(result)
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("cb_regime_refresh: %s", e)
        # Перерисовываем дашборд
        regime = ""
        try:
            from market_adapter import get_last_adaptation
            a = get_last_adaptation()
            if a:
                regime = a.regime
        except Exception:
            pass
        if not regime:
            try:
                import market_regime as _mr
                regime = _mr.get_cached_regime() or ""
            except Exception:
                pass
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from advanced_features import format_chameleon_dashboard
        text = await format_chameleon_dashboard(str(regime), user=user)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_regime(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_regime_help")
    async def cb_regime_help(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from advanced_features import format_chameleon_help
        await safe_edit(cb, format_chameleon_help(), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("◀️ К дашборду", "adv_regime"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── 4. Swarm Signal ───────────────────────────────

    def _kb_swarm(user=None) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        alert_mark = _alert_mark(user, "alert_swarm") if user else ""
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("🔄 Обновить", "adv_swarm"),
            _btn("🔔 Алерт HIGH CONSENSUS" + alert_mark, "adv_toggle_alert_swarm"),
            _btn("ℹ️ Что это / как пользоваться", "adv_swarm_help"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ])

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_swarm")

        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_swarm(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_swarm_help")
    async def cb_swarm_help(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from advanced_features import format_swarm_help
        await safe_edit(cb, format_swarm_help(), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("◀️ К дашборду", "adv_swarm"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── 6. Funding Farm ───────────────────────────────

    def _kb_funding(data: list[dict] | None = None, mode: str = "all",
                    user=None) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        alert_mark = _alert_mark(user, "alert_funding") if user else ""
        rows: list = []
        # Фильтры
        def _m(lbl: str, key: str) -> InlineKeyboardButton:
            active = "◉ " if mode == key else ""
            return InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"{active}{lbl}", callback_data=f"adv_fund_f_{key}")
        rows.append([_m("📋 Все", "all"), _m("💧 Ликвидные", "liquid"), _m("💎 STABLE", "stable")])
        # Топ-6 монет из текущего списка для калькулятора
        if data:
            top = data[:6]
            for i in range(0, len(top), 3):
                row = []
                for d in top[i:i + 3]:
                    sym = d["symbol"].replace("USDT", "")
                    row.append(InlineKeyboardButton(
                        text=f"🧮 {sym}", callback_data=f"adv_fund_calc_{d['symbol']}",
                    ))
                rows.append(row)
        rows.append(_btn("🔄 Обновить", "adv_funding"))
        rows.append(_btn("🔔 Алерт funding" + alert_mark, "adv_toggle_alert_funding"))
        rows.append(_btn("ℹ️ Что это / как пользоваться", "adv_funding_help"))
        rows.append(_back("advanced_menu"))
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_funding")
    async def cb_funding(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("💰 Загрузка funding rates...")
        from advanced_features import fetch_top_funding, format_funding_dashboard
        data = await fetch_top_funding()
        text = format_funding_dashboard(data)
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_funding(data, "all", user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("adv_fund_f_"))
    async def cb_funding_filter(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        mode = cb.data.replace("adv_fund_f_", "")
        if mode not in ("all", "liquid", "stable"):
            mode = "all"
        from advanced_features import fetch_top_funding, format_funding_dashboard
        data = await fetch_top_funding()
        text = format_funding_dashboard(data, filter_mode=mode)
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_funding(data, mode, user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("adv_fund_calc_"))
    async def cb_funding_calc(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🧮 Рассчитываю...")
        symbol = cb.data.replace("adv_fund_calc_", "")
        from advanced_features import fetch_top_funding, format_funding_calculator
        await fetch_top_funding()  # прогрев кэша если надо
        text = format_funding_calculator(symbol, size_usd=1000.0)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="💵 $100",  callback_data=f"adv_fund_calcsz_{symbol}_100"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="💵 $1K",   callback_data=f"adv_fund_calcsz_{symbol}_1000"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="💵 $10K",  callback_data=f"adv_fund_calcsz_{symbol}_10000"),
            ],
            _btn("◀️ К дашборду", "adv_funding"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ]))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("adv_fund_calcsz_"))
    async def cb_funding_calc_size(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        payload = cb.data.replace("adv_fund_calcsz_", "")
        try:
            symbol, size_str = payload.rsplit("_", 1)
            size_usd = float(size_str)
        except Exception:
            symbol, size_usd = payload, 1000.0
        from advanced_features import fetch_top_funding, format_funding_calculator
        await fetch_top_funding()
        text = format_funding_calculator(symbol, size_usd=size_usd)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="💵 $100",  callback_data=f"adv_fund_calcsz_{symbol}_100"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="💵 $1K",   callback_data=f"adv_fund_calcsz_{symbol}_1000"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="💵 $10K",  callback_data=f"adv_fund_calcsz_{symbol}_10000"),
            ],
            _btn("◀️ К дашборду", "adv_funding"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ]))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_funding_help")
    async def cb_funding_help(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from advanced_features import format_funding_help
        await safe_edit(cb, format_funding_help(), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("◀️ К дашборду", "adv_funding"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── 7. Cross-Exchange Arbitrage ───────────────────

    def _kb_arb(data: list[dict] | None = None, mode: str = "all",
               user=None) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        alert_mark = _alert_mark(user, "alert_arbitrage") if user else ""
        rows: list = []
        # Фильтры
        def _m(lbl: str, key: str) -> InlineKeyboardButton:
            active = "◉ " if mode == key else ""
            return InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"{active}{lbl}", callback_data=f"adv_arb_f_{key}")
        rows.append([
            _m("📋 Все", "all"),
            _m("🟢 Торгуемые", "tradeable"),
            _m("💰 Funding", "funding"),
        ])
        # Топ-6 по NET для калькулятора
        if data:
            top = sorted(data, key=lambda x: -x.get("net_spread_pct", -999))[:6]
            for i in range(0, len(top), 3):
                row = []
                for d in top[i:i + 3]:
                    sym = d["symbol"].replace("USDT", "")
                    row.append(InlineKeyboardButton(
                        text=f"🧮 {sym}",
                        callback_data=f"adv_arb_calc_{d['symbol']}",
                    ))
                rows.append(row)
        rows.append(_btn("🔄 Обновить", "adv_arbitrage_refresh"))
        rows.append(_btn("🔔 Алерт арбитража" + alert_mark, "adv_toggle_alert_arbitrage"))
        rows.append(_btn("ℹ️ Что это / как пользоваться", "adv_arbitrage_help"))
        rows.append(_back("advanced_menu"))
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_arbitrage")
    async def cb_arbitrage(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🔄 Сравнение 4 бирж...")
        from advanced_features import fetch_cross_exchange_prices, format_arbitrage_dashboard
        data = await fetch_cross_exchange_prices()
        text = format_arbitrage_dashboard(data)
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_arb(data, "all", user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_arbitrage_refresh")

        await cb.answer("🔄 Обновляю...")
        from advanced_features import fetch_cross_exchange_prices, format_arbitrage_dashboard
        data = await fetch_cross_exchange_prices(force_refresh=True)
        text = format_arbitrage_dashboard(data)
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_arb(data, "all", user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("adv_arb_f_"))
    async def cb_arbitrage_filter(cb: CallbackQuery):

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("adv_arb_csz_"))
    async def cb_arbitrage_calc_size(cb: CallbackQuery):

        await fetch_cross_exchange_prices()

        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="💵 $100",  callback_data=f"adv_arb_csz_{symbol}_100"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="💵 $1K",   callback_data=f"adv_arb_csz_{symbol}_1000"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="💵 $10K",  callback_data=f"adv_arb_csz_{symbol}_10000"),
            ],
            _btn("◀️ К дашборду", "adv_arbitrage"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── 9. On-Chain Oracle ────────────────────────────

    def _kb_whales(mode: str = "all", user=None) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        alert_mark = _alert_mark(user, "alert_whales") if user else ""
        def _m(lbl: str, key: str) -> InlineKeyboardButton:
            active = "◉ " if mode == key else ""
            return InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"{active}{lbl}", callback_data=f"adv_whales_f_{key}")
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [_m("📋 Все", "all"),
             _m("🚨 Directional", "directional"),
             _m("🐋 Whales", "whale")],
            _btn("🔄 Обновить", "adv_whales_refresh"),
            _btn("🔔 Алерт китов" + alert_mark, "adv_toggle_alert_whales"),
            _btn("ℹ️ Что это / как пользоваться", "adv_whales_help"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ])

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_whales")
    async def cb_whales(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🐋 Отслеживание китов...")
        from advanced_features import fetch_whale_transactions, format_whale_dashboard
        data = await fetch_whale_transactions()
        text = format_whale_dashboard(data)
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_whales("all", user))

        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_whales("all", user))
