    # ── 10. Strategy Genome ───────────────────────────

    def _kb_genome(current_strategy: str = "LEVELS") -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        """Клавиатура Strategy Genome: переключение стратегии + действия."""
        rows: list = []
        # Переключатель стратегий
        strategies = ["LEVELS", "SMC", "SCALPING", "GERCHIK"]
        strat_row = []
        for s in strategies:
            mark = "◉ " if s == current_strategy else "○ "
            strat_row.append(InlineKeyboardButton(
                text=f"{mark}{s}",
                callback_data=f"adv_genome_s_{s}",
            ))
        # 2 строки по 2 (Telegram красивее)
        rows.append(strat_row[:2])
        rows.append(strat_row[2:])
        rows.append(_btn("🔄 Обновить",           f"adv_genome_s_{current_strategy}"))
        rows.append(_btn("🚀 Эволюция сейчас",    f"adv_genome_evolve_{current_strategy}"))
        rows.append(_btn("🔧 Применить лучший",   f"adv_genome_apply_{current_strategy}"))
        rows.append(_btn("ℹ️ Что это / как работает", "adv_genome_help"))
        rows.append(_back("advanced_menu"))
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_genome")
    async def cb_genome(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from advanced_features import format_genome_dashboard
        text = await format_genome_dashboard("LEVELS")
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_genome("LEVELS"))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("adv_genome_s_"))
    async def cb_genome_strategy(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        strategy = cb.data.replace("adv_genome_s_", "")
        if strategy not in ("LEVELS", "SMC", "SCALPING", "GERCHIK"):
            strategy = "LEVELS"
        from advanced_features import format_genome_dashboard
        text = await format_genome_dashboard(strategy)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_genome(strategy))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("adv_genome_evolve_"))
    async def cb_genome_evolve(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🚀 Запускаю эволюцию... (1-3 мин)")
        strategy = cb.data.replace("adv_genome_evolve_", "")
        if strategy not in ("LEVELS", "SMC", "SCALPING", "GERCHIK"):
            return
        import genome as _gn
        result = await _gn.trigger_evolution_now(strategy)
        if result.get("ok"):
            status_text = (
                f"✅ Эволюция {strategy} завершена!\n"
                f"Поколение #{result['generation']}, "
                f"best fitness {result['best_fitness']:.3f}, "
                f"WR {result['best_wr']:.1f}%, PF {result['best_pf']:.2f}\n"
                f"Время: {result['elapsed']:.0f}с"
            )
        else:
            status_text = f"⚠️ Эволюция не удалась: {result.get('error', 'unknown')}"
        try:
            await cb.message.answer(status_text)
        except Exception:
            pass
        # Обновляем дашборд
        from advanced_features import format_genome_dashboard
        text = await format_genome_dashboard(strategy)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_genome(strategy))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("adv_genome_apply_"))
    async def cb_genome_apply(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🔧 Применяю лучший геном...")
        strategy = cb.data.replace("adv_genome_apply_", "")
        if strategy not in ("LEVELS", "SMC", "SCALPING", "GERCHIK"):
            return
        import genome as _gn
        result = await _gn.apply_best_to_user(cb.from_user.id, strategy)
        if result.get("ok"):
            changed = result.get("changed", {})
            if not changed:
                msg = (
                    f"ℹ️ Твои текущие настройки уже совпадают с "
                    f"лучшим геномом {strategy}."
                )
            else:
                lines = [
                    f"✅ Лучший геном {strategy} применён!",
                    f"Fitness: {result['fitness']:.3f}  ·  "
                    f"WR: {result['winrate']:.1f}%  ·  PF: {result['pf']:.2f}  "
                    f"(N={result['trades']} сделок)",
                    "",
                    "Изменено:",
                ]
                for k, v in sorted(changed.items()):
                    lines.append(f"  • <code>{k}</code> → <code>{v}</code>")
                msg = "\n".join(lines)
        else:
            msg = f"⚠️ Не удалось применить: {result.get('error', 'unknown')}"
        try:
            await cb.message.answer(msg, parse_mode="HTML")
        except Exception:
            pass
        # Обновляем дашборд (параметры уже применены)
        from advanced_features import format_genome_dashboard
        text = await format_genome_dashboard(strategy)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, _kb_genome(strategy))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_genome_help")
    async def cb_genome_help(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from advanced_features import format_genome_help
        await safe_edit(cb, format_genome_help(), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("◀️ К дашборду", "adv_genome"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── 11. Copy-Trading Leaderboard ──────────────────

    # ── Leaderboard + Copy-Trading ────────────────────
    # Состояние фильтров хранится в callback data: lb_{period}_{strategy}_{mode}
    def _kb_leaderboard(period: str = "30d", strategy: str = "ALL",
                         mode: str = "all") -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        rows: list = []
        # Период
        def _p(lbl: str, val: str):
            active = "◉ " if period == val else ""
            return InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"{active}{lbl}",
                                         callback_data=f"lb_p_{val}_{strategy}_{mode}")
        rows.append([_p("7д", "7d"), _p("30д", "30d"), _p("90д", "90d"), _p("Всё", "all")])
        # Стратегии
        def _s(lbl: str, val: str):
            active = "◉ " if strategy == val else ""
            return InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"{active}{lbl}",
                                         callback_data=f"lb_s_{period}_{val}_{mode}")
        rows.append([_s("Все", "ALL"), _s("LEVELS", "LEVELS"), _s("SMC", "SMC")])
        rows.append([_s("GERCHIK", "GERCHIK"), _s("SCALPING", "SCALPING")])
        # Mode
        def _m(lbl: str, val: str):
            active = "◉ " if mode == val else ""
            return InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"{active}{lbl}",
                                         callback_data=f"lb_m_{period}_{strategy}_{val}")
        rows.append([_m("Все", "all"), _m("🤖 Авто", "auto"), _m("✋ Мануал", "manual")])
        rows.append(_btn("👤 Мой профиль (настроить)", "lb_profile_settings"))
        rows.append(_btn("👥 Мои подписки", "lb_my_follows"))
        rows.append(_btn("ℹ️ Что это / как работает", "lb_help"))
        rows.append(_back("advanced_menu"))
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_leaderboard")
    async def cb_leaderboard(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🏆 Загрузка рейтинга...")
        from advanced_features import format_leaderboard
        text = await format_leaderboard(user_id=cb.from_user.id)
        # Добавим кнопки профилей трейдеров в топ
        import copy_trading as _ct
        top = await _ct.leaderboard(period="30d", limit=6)
        top_row_buttons = []
        for d in top[:6]:
            name = _ct.display_name(d, d["user_id"], d.get("rank", 0))
            top_row_buttons.append(InlineKeyboardButton(
                text=f"👤 {name}",
                callback_data=f"lb_view_{d['user_id']}",
            ))
        kb = _kb_leaderboard("30d", "ALL", "all")
        if top_row_buttons:
            # Вставляем в начало 2 строки по 3 кнопки
            rows = list(kb.inline_keyboard)
            new_rows = []
            for i in range(0, len(top_row_buttons), 3):
                new_rows.append(top_row_buttons[i:i + 3])
            rows = new_rows + rows
            kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, kb)

    async def _render_lb(cb: CallbackQuery, period: str, strategy: str, mode: str):
        from advanced_features import format_leaderboard
        text = await format_leaderboard(period=period, strategy=strategy,
                                         mode=mode, user_id=cb.from_user.id)
        import copy_trading as _ct
        top = await _ct.leaderboard(period=period, strategy=strategy, mode=mode, limit=6)
        kb = _kb_leaderboard(period, strategy, mode)
        top_btns = []
        for d in top[:6]:
            name = _ct.display_name(d, d["user_id"], d.get("rank", 0))
            top_btns.append(InlineKeyboardButton(
                text=f"👤 {name}",
                callback_data=f"lb_view_{d['user_id']}",
            ))
        if top_btns:
            rows = list(kb.inline_keyboard)
            new_rows = []
            for i in range(0, len(top_btns), 3):
                new_rows.append(top_btns[i:i + 3])
            rows = new_rows + rows
            kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, kb)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_p_"))
    async def cb_lb_period(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        _, _, period, strategy, mode = cb.data.split("_", 4)
        await _render_lb(cb, period, strategy, mode)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_s_"))
    async def cb_lb_strategy(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        _, _, period, strategy, mode = cb.data.split("_", 4)
        await _render_lb(cb, period, strategy, mode)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_m_"))
    async def cb_lb_mode(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        _, _, period, strategy, mode = cb.data.split("_", 4)
        await _render_lb(cb, period, strategy, mode)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "lb_help")
    async def cb_lb_help(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from advanced_features import format_leaderboard_help
        await safe_edit(cb, format_leaderboard_help(), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("◀️ К рейтингу", "adv_leaderboard"),
            _back("advanced_menu"),
        ]))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_view_"))
    async def cb_lb_view_trader(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("👤 Загрузка профиля...")
        try:
            trader_id = int(cb.data.replace("lb_view_", ""))
        except ValueError:
            return
        from advanced_features import format_trader_profile
        text = await format_trader_profile(trader_id, viewer_id=cb.from_user.id)
        import copy_trading as _ct
        subscribed = await _ct.is_subscribed(cb.from_user.id, trader_id)
        rows = []
        if trader_id != cb.from_user.id:
            if subscribed:
                rows.append(_btn("❌ Отписаться",
                                  f"lb_unsub_{trader_id}"))
                rows.append(_btn("⚙️ Настройки подписки",
                                  f"lb_subcfg_{trader_id}"))
            else:
                rows.append(_btn("✅ Подписаться (копировать сделки)",
                                  f"lb_sub_{trader_id}"))
        rows.append(_btn("◀️ К рейтингу", "adv_leaderboard"))
        rows.append(_back("advanced_menu"))
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_sub_"))
    async def cb_lb_subscribe(cb: CallbackQuery):
        try:
            leader_id = int(cb.data.replace("lb_sub_", ""))
        except ValueError:
            await cb.answer("⚠️ Invalid")
            return
        import copy_trading as _ct
        result = await _ct.subscribe(cb.from_user.id, leader_id,
                                      size_pct=100, max_risk_pct=2.0, max_dd_pct=15.0)
        if result.get("ok"):
            await cb.answer("✅ Подписка оформлена!")
            try:
                await cb.message.answer(
                    "✅ <b>Ты подписан!</b>\n"
                    "Новые сделки лидера будут копироваться автоматически.\n"
                    "Параметры по умолчанию: размер 100%, max риск 2%, "
                    "auto-pause при DD 15%.\n\n"
                    "<i>Измени настройки в «⚙️ Настройки подписки».</i>",
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
            except Exception:
                pass
        else:
            await cb.answer(f"⚠️ {result.get('error', 'Ошибка')}")
        # Перерисовываем профиль
        from advanced_features import format_trader_profile
        text = await format_trader_profile(leader_id, viewer_id=cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("❌ Отписаться", f"lb_unsub_{leader_id}"),
            _btn("⚙️ Настройки подписки", f"lb_subcfg_{leader_id}"),
            _btn("◀️ К рейтингу", "adv_leaderboard"),
        ]))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_unsub_"))
    async def cb_lb_unsubscribe(cb: CallbackQuery):
        try:
            leader_id = int(cb.data.replace("lb_unsub_", ""))
        except ValueError:
            return
        import copy_trading as _ct
        result = await _ct.unsubscribe(cb.from_user.id, leader_id)
        if result.get("ok"):
            await cb.answer("🚫 Подписка отменена")
        else:
            await cb.answer(f"⚠️ {result.get('error', 'Ошибка')}")
        from advanced_features import format_trader_profile
        text = await format_trader_profile(leader_id, viewer_id=cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("✅ Подписаться", f"lb_sub_{leader_id}"),
            _btn("◀️ К рейтингу", "adv_leaderboard"),
        ]))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_subcfg_"))
    async def cb_lb_subcfg(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        try:
            leader_id = int(cb.data.replace("lb_subcfg_", ""))
        except ValueError:
            return
        import copy_trading as _ct
        following = await _ct.list_following(cb.from_user.id)
        sub = next((s for s in following if s["leader_id"] == leader_id), None)
        if not sub:
            await safe_edit(cb, "Подписка не найдена.", InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                _btn("◀️ Назад", f"lb_view_{leader_id}"),
            ]))
            return
        # Настройки subscription
        size_row = [
            InlineKeyboardButton(
                text=("◉ " if int(sub["size_pct"]) == pct else "") + f"{pct}%",
                callback_data=f"lb_setsize_{leader_id}_{pct}",
            )
            for pct in (10, 25, 50, 100)
        ]
        risk_row = [
            InlineKeyboardButton(
                text=("◉ " if abs(sub["max_risk_pct"] - r) < 0.05 else "") + f"{r}%",
                callback_data=f"lb_setrisk_{leader_id}_{r}",
            )
            for r in (0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 3.0)
        ]
        dd_row = [
            InlineKeyboardButton(
                text=("◉ " if abs(sub["max_dd_pct"] - d) < 0.5 else "") + f"{d}%",
                callback_data=f"lb_setdd_{leader_id}_{d}",
            )
            for d in (5, 10, 15, 25)
        ]
        pause_btn = _btn(
            "▶️ Resume" if sub["paused"] else "⏸ Pause",
            f"lb_pause_{leader_id}_{0 if sub['paused'] else 1}",
        )
        text = (
            f"⚙️ <b>Настройки копирования</b>\n\n"
            f"Подписан на leader #{leader_id}\n"
            f"  • Размер копии: <b>{sub['size_pct']:.0f}%</b>\n"
            f"  • Max риск/сделка: <b>{sub['max_risk_pct']:.1f}%</b>\n"
            f"  • Auto-pause при DD: <b>{sub['max_dd_pct']:.0f}%</b>\n"
            f"  • Статус: {'⏸ <b>Paused</b>' if sub['paused'] else '▶️ Active'}\n"
            f"  • Скопировано: {sub['total_copied']} сделок\n"
            f"  • P&L от копий: {sub['pnl_r']:+.2f}R"
        )
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            size_row,
            risk_row,
            dd_row,
            pause_btn,
            _btn("◀️ К профилю", f"lb_view_{leader_id}"),
        ]))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_setsize_"))
    async def cb_lb_setsize(cb: CallbackQuery):
        try:
            _, _, leader_id, pct = cb.data.split("_")
            leader_id = int(leader_id); pct = float(pct)
        except Exception:
            return
        import copy_trading as _ct
        following = await _ct.list_following(cb.from_user.id)
        sub = next((s for s in following if s["leader_id"] == leader_id), None)
        if sub:
            await _ct.subscribe(cb.from_user.id, leader_id, size_pct=pct,
                                 max_risk_pct=sub["max_risk_pct"],
                                 max_dd_pct=sub["max_dd_pct"])
        await cb.answer(f"Размер: {int(pct)}%")
        # Refresh
        await cb_lb_subcfg(type(cb)(message=cb.message, from_user=cb.from_user,
                                      data=f"lb_subcfg_{leader_id}", id=cb.id))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_setrisk_"))
    async def cb_lb_setrisk(cb: CallbackQuery):
        try:
            _, _, leader_id, r = cb.data.split("_")
            leader_id = int(leader_id); r = float(r)
        except Exception:
            return
        import copy_trading as _ct
        following = await _ct.list_following(cb.from_user.id)
        sub = next((s for s in following if s["leader_id"] == leader_id), None)
        if sub:
            await _ct.subscribe(cb.from_user.id, leader_id,
                                 size_pct=sub["size_pct"],
                                 max_risk_pct=r,
                                 max_dd_pct=sub["max_dd_pct"])
        await cb.answer(f"Max риск: {r}%")
        await cb_lb_subcfg(type(cb)(message=cb.message, from_user=cb.from_user,
                                      data=f"lb_subcfg_{leader_id}", id=cb.id))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_setdd_"))
    async def cb_lb_setdd(cb: CallbackQuery):
        try:
            _, _, leader_id, d = cb.data.split("_")
            leader_id = int(leader_id); d = float(d)
        except Exception:
            return
        import copy_trading as _ct
        following = await _ct.list_following(cb.from_user.id)
        sub = next((s for s in following if s["leader_id"] == leader_id), None)
        if sub:
            await _ct.subscribe(cb.from_user.id, leader_id,
                                 size_pct=sub["size_pct"],
                                 max_risk_pct=sub["max_risk_pct"],
                                 max_dd_pct=d)
        await cb.answer(f"Max DD: {int(d)}%")
        await cb_lb_subcfg(type(cb)(message=cb.message, from_user=cb.from_user,
                                      data=f"lb_subcfg_{leader_id}", id=cb.id))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_pause_"))
    async def cb_lb_pause(cb: CallbackQuery):
        try:
            _, _, leader_id, paused = cb.data.split("_")
            leader_id = int(leader_id); paused = bool(int(paused))
        except Exception:
            return
        import copy_trading as _ct
        await _ct.pause_subscription(cb.from_user.id, leader_id, paused)
        await cb.answer("⏸ Paused" if paused else "▶️ Active")
        await cb_lb_subcfg(type(cb)(message=cb.message, from_user=cb.from_user,
                                      data=f"lb_subcfg_{leader_id}", id=cb.id))

    # ── Мои подписки ────────────────────────────────
    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "lb_my_follows")
    async def cb_lb_my_follows(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        import copy_trading as _ct
        following = await _ct.list_following(cb.from_user.id)
        if not following:
            text = (
                "👥 <b>Мои подписки</b>\n\n"
                "Ты ни на кого не подписан.\n\n"
                "<i>Открой трейдера в рейтинге и нажми «Подписаться» "
                "чтобы копировать его сделки.</i>"
            )
        else:
            lines = ["👥 <b>Мои подписки</b>", "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━", ""]
            for s in following:
                status = "⏸ paused" if s["paused"] else "▶️ active"
                pnl_e = "🟢" if s["pnl_r"] > 0 else "🔴" if s["pnl_r"] < 0 else "⚪"
                name = s.get("copy_nickname") or f"Trader #{s['leader_id']}"
                lines.append(
                    f"{pnl_e} <b>{name}</b>  ({status})\n"
                    f"  Size {s['size_pct']:.0f}% · Risk {s['max_risk_pct']:.1f}% · "
                    f"DD {s['max_dd_pct']:.0f}%  ·  "
                    f"{s['total_copied']} копий · P&L {s['pnl_r']:+.2f}R"
                )
            text = "\n".join(lines)
        rows = []
        for s in following[:10]:
            name = s.get("copy_nickname") or f"#{s['leader_id']}"
            rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(
                text=f"⚙️ {name}",
                callback_data=f"lb_subcfg_{s['leader_id']}",
            )])
        rows.append(_back("adv_leaderboard"))
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows))

    # ── Настройка публичного профиля ────────────────
    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "lb_profile_settings")
    async def cb_lb_profile_settings(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        import copy_trading as _ct
        public = bool(getattr(user, "copy_public", False))
        nickname = getattr(user, "copy_nickname", "") or ""
        bio = getattr(user, "copy_bio", "") or ""
        followers = getattr(user, "copy_followers", 0) or 0

        if not nickname:
            # Генерим при первом открытии
            nickname = _ct.generate_nickname(seed=cb.from_user.id)

        status = "✅ Опубликован" if public else "🔒 Приватный"
        text = (
            f"👤 <b>Мой трейдер-профиль</b>\n\n"
            f"Статус: <b>{status}</b>\n"
            f"Никнейм: <b>{nickname}</b>\n"
            f"Bio: <i>{bio or '(не задано)'}</i>\n"
            f"Подписчиков: <b>{followers}</b>\n\n"
            f"<i>Публичный профиль позволяет другим юзерам видеть твою "
            f"статистику и подписываться на тебя (copy-trading).</i>"
        )
        rows = [
            _btn(
                "🔒 Сделать приватным" if public else "✅ Опубликовать профиль",
                f"lb_toggle_public_{0 if public else 1}",
            ),
            _btn("🎲 Сгенерировать новый никнейм", "lb_regen_nick"),
            _back("adv_leaderboard"),
        ]
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("lb_toggle_public_"))
    async def cb_lb_toggle_public(cb: CallbackQuery):
        new_val = bool(int(cb.data.replace("lb_toggle_public_", "")))
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        import copy_trading as _ct
        user.copy_public = new_val
        # Генерим никнейм если пустой и делаем public
        if new_val and not getattr(user, "copy_nickname", ""):
            user.copy_nickname = _ct.generate_nickname(seed=cb.from_user.id)
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer("✅ Профиль опубликован!" if new_val else "🔒 Профиль скрыт")
        await cb_lb_profile_settings(cb)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "lb_regen_nick")
    async def cb_lb_regen_nick(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        import copy_trading as _ct
        user.copy_nickname = _ct.generate_nickname()
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(f"🎲 Новый: {user.copy_nickname}")
        await cb_lb_profile_settings(cb)

    # ── Настройки уведомлений ─────────────────────

    _ALERT_FIELDS = [
        ("alert_liquidation", "📊 Liquidation Oracle", "Extreme funding, squeeze risk"),
        ("alert_funding",     "💰 Funding Farm",       "Funding > 0.1% (36%+ годовых)"),
        ("alert_arbitrage",   "🔄 Арбитраж бирж",     "Спред > 0.1%"),
        ("alert_whales",      "🐋 Whale Tracker",      "BTC > 500 BTC"),
        ("alert_regime",      "🦎 Regime Chameleon",    "Смена режима рынка"),
        ("alert_swarm",       "🐝 Swarm Signal",       "Консенсус ≥ 3 голоса"),
    ]

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "adv_alerts_menu")
    async def cb_alerts_menu(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        rows = [_noop("── 🔔 Фоновые уведомления ──")]
        for field, label, desc in _ALERT_FIELDS:
            on = getattr(user, field, False)
            mark = "◉ ON" if on else "○ OFF"
            rows.append([
                InlineKeyboardButton(
                    text=f"{mark}  {label}",
                    callback_data=f"adv_toggle_{field}",
                ),
            ])
        rows.append(_noop(""))
        rows.append(_noop("Описание: нажми на пункт для вкл/выкл"))
        rows.append(_back("advanced_menu"))
        await safe_edit(cb,
            "🔔 <b>Настройки фоновых уведомлений</b>\n\n"
            "Включи нужные — бот будет присылать алерты автоматически.\n\n"
            + "\n".join(f"• <b>{l}</b> — {d}" for _, l, d in _ALERT_FIELDS),
            InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows),
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("adv_toggle_alert_"))
    async def cb_toggle_alert(cb: CallbackQuery):
        field = cb.data.replace("adv_toggle_", "")
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        current = bool(getattr(user, field, False))
        setattr(user, field, not current)
        await um.save(user)
        label = "ON 🔔" if not current else "OFF"
        await cb.answer(f"{field}: {label}")
        # Re-render menu
        rows = [_noop("── 🔔 Фоновые уведомления ──")]
        for f, l, d in _ALERT_FIELDS:
            on = getattr(user, f, False)
            mark = "◉ ON" if on else "○ OFF"
            rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"{mark}  {l}", callback_data=f"adv_toggle_{f}")])
        rows.append(_back("advanced_menu"))
        await safe_edit(cb, reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows))


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/analyze.py
================================================================================
"""handlers/analyze.py — analyze, watch_coin, navigation, trade result handlers."""
from __future__ import annotations
import html as _html  # AUDIT: BUG-002
import logging
import time

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.filters import Command
from aiogram.types import Message, CallbackQuery, InlineKeyboardMarkup, InlineKeyboardButton
from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext
from aiogram.exceptions import TelegramBadRequest, TelegramForbiddenError

import database as db
from keyboards import kb_main, kb_more, kb_subscribe, kb_back, kb_fsm_cancel
from handlers._common import (
    safe_edit,
    main_text, pricing_text, cfg_text, stats_text,
    _strategy_text, _kb_strategy_select, _kb_strategy_change,
    _normalize_symbol, _do_analyze_multitf,
    _analyze_cooldown, _ANALYZE_COOLDOWN_SEC,
    AnalyzeState, WatchCoinState,
)

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers.analyze")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config, **kwargs):
    # We keep a reference to the fetcher from main module or create our own
    from fetcher import OKXFetcher as _OKXFetcher
    _fetcher_for_analyze = _OKXFetcher()

    async def _do_analyze(msg_or_cb, user, symbol: str):
        """Анализ любой монеты — всегда возвращает детальный разбор зон."""
        is_cb = isinstance(msg_or_cb, CallbackQuery)
        send  = (msg_or_cb.message.answer if is_cb else msg_or_cb.answer)

        if not symbol:
            await send("⚠️ Укажите тикер монеты. Пример: /analyze BTC")
            return

        symbol = _normalize_symbol(symbol)

        # Rate-limit
        uid = user.user_id
        now = time.time()
        if now - _analyze_cooldown.get(uid, 0) < _ANALYZE_COOLDOWN_SEC:
            await send(f"⏳ Подожди {_ANALYZE_COOLDOWN_SEC} секунд между запросами.", parse_mode="HTML")
            return
        _analyze_cooldown[uid] = now
        # Периодически очищаем устаревшие записи, чтобы словарь не рос бесконечно
        if len(_analyze_cooldown) > 2000:
            _cutoff = now - 3600
            for _k in [_k for _k, _v in _analyze_cooldown.items() if _v < _cutoff]:
                _analyze_cooldown.pop(_k, None)

        sym_display = symbol.replace("-USDT-SWAP", "").replace("-USDT", "")
        wait_msg = await send(
            f"⏳ <b>Анализ {sym_display}...</b>\n\nЗагружаю свечи OKX 1H/4H/1D...",
            parse_mode="HTML",
        )
        try:
            from indicator import CHMIndicator
            from scanner_mid import IndConfig
            ind_config_obj = IndConfig(
                TIMEFRAME="1H", PIVOT_STRENGTH=7, ATR_PERIOD=14, ATR_MULT=1.0,
                MAX_RISK_PCT=1.5, EMA_FAST=50, EMA_SLOW=200,
                RSI_PERIOD=14, RSI_OB=65, RSI_OS=35,
                VOL_MULT=1.0, VOL_LEN=20, MAX_LEVEL_AGE=100,
                MAX_RETEST_BARS=30, COOLDOWN_BARS=0, ZONE_BUFFER=0.3,
                TP1_RR=2.0, TP2_RR=3.0, TP3_RR=4.5,
            )
            indicator_obj = CHMIndicator(ind_config_obj)
            result_text = await _do_analyze_multitf(
                symbol, _fetcher_for_analyze, indicator_obj, user.strategy, bot
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.error(f"_do_analyze error {symbol}: {e}")
            result_text = f"❌ Ошибка анализа <b>{symbol}</b>: {e}"
        try:
            await wait_msg.delete()
        except Exception:
            pass
        # Telegram limit: 4096 chars. Split if needed.
        MAX = 4000
        kb_back_analyze = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[[
            InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ В главное меню", callback_data="back_main"),
        ]])
        if len(result_text) <= MAX:
            try:
                await send(result_text, parse_mode="HTML",
                           reply_markup=kb_back_analyze, protect_content=True)
            except Exception as e:
                log.error(f"_do_analyze send error: {e}")
                await send(f"❌ Не удалось отправить анализ: {e}")
        else:
            parts = []
            current = ""
            for line in result_text.split("\n"):
                if len(current) + len(line) + 1 > MAX:
                    parts.append(current)
                    current = line
                else:
                    current = (current + "\n" + line) if current else line
            if current:
                parts.append(current)
            for i, part in enumerate(parts):
                try:
                    kb = kb_back_analyze if i == len(parts) - 1 else None
                    await send(part, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb, protect_content=True)
                except Exception:
                    await send(part)  # fallback без HTML если тег сломан

    @dp.message(Command("analyze"))
    async def cmd_analyze(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id, msg.from_user.username or "")
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await msg.answer(pricing_text(config), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_subscribe(config))
            return
        limit = user.plan_limit("analyze_per_day")
        if limit < 999:
            today_count = await db.db_count_user_analyzes_today(user.user_id)
            if today_count >= limit:
                await msg.answer(
                    f"🔒 Лимит анализов: <b>{limit}/день</b> ({user.plan_label})\n"
                    f"Для безлимита нужен тариф 🔵 Pro",
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
                return
            await db.db_inc_user_analyzes_today(user.user_id)
        parts  = msg.text.split(maxsplit=1)
        symbol = parts[1].strip() if len(parts) > 1 else ""
        if symbol:
            await _do_analyze(msg, user, symbol)
        else:
            await state.set_state(AnalyzeState.waiting_symbol)
            await msg.answer(
                "🔍 <b>Анализ монеты</b>\n\nВведите тикер монеты (например: BTC, ETH, SOL, PEPE):",
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(),
            )

    @dp.message(AnalyzeState.waiting_symbol)
    async def analyze_symbol_input(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        user   = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id, msg.from_user.username or "")
        symbol = (msg.text or "").strip()
        await _do_analyze(msg, user, symbol)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "analyze_coin")
    async def analyze_coin_cb(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id, cb.from_user.username or "")
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await safe_edit(cb, pricing_text(config), kb_subscribe(config))
            return
        await state.set_state(AnalyzeState.waiting_symbol)
        await safe_edit(
            cb,
            "🔍 <b>Анализ монеты по запросу</b>\n\n"
            "Введите тикер монеты (например: <code>BTC</code>, <code>SOL</code>, <code>PEPE</code>)\n\n"
            "<i>Анализ выполняется по вашим текущим настройкам (режим ОБА).</i>",
            kb_fsm_cancel(),
        )

    # ─── ФИЛЬТР МОНЕТЫ (watch_coin) ───────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "watch_coin_menu")
    async def watch_coin_menu_cb(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id, cb.from_user.username or "")
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await safe_edit(cb, pricing_text(config), kb_subscribe(config))
            return
        wc = getattr(user, "watch_coin", "").strip()
        if wc:
            base = wc.replace("-USDT-SWAP", "").replace("-USDT", "")
            text = (
                f"🎯 <b>Фильтр монеты</b>\n\n"
                f"Сейчас отслеживается: <b>{base}</b>\n\n"
                f"Сигналы сканера поступают <b>только по этой монете</b>.\n\n"
                f"Введите новый тикер чтобы изменить, или нажмите «Сбросить» чтобы вернуть все монеты."
            )
            kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🔄 Сбросить (все монеты)", callback_data="watch_coin_clear")],
                [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Назад", callback_data="back_main")],
            ])
        else:
            text = (
                "🎯 <b>Фильтр монеты</b>\n\n"
                "Сейчас отслеживаются <b>все монеты</b>.\n\n"
                "Введите тикер монеты чтобы получать сигналы <b>только по ней</b>.\n"
                "Пример: <code>BTC</code>, <code>ETH</code>, <code>SOL</code>, <code>PEPE</code>"
            )
            kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Назад", callback_data="back_main")],
            ])
        await state.set_state(WatchCoinState.waiting_coin)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, kb)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "watch_coin_clear")
    async def watch_coin_clear_cb(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        from i18n import t as _t
        _wc_user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id, cb.from_user.username or "")
        await cb.answer(_t("watch_coin_cleared", getattr(_wc_user, "lang", "ru")))
        await state.clear()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id, cb.from_user.username or "")
        user.watch_coin = ""
        await um.save(user)
        trend = scanner.get_trend() if hasattr(scanner, "get_trend") else {}
        await safe_edit(cb, main_text(user, trend), kb_main(user))

    @dp.message(WatchCoinState.waiting_coin)
    async def watch_coin_input(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id, msg.from_user.username or "")
        raw = (msg.text or "").strip()
        if not raw:
            from i18n import t as _t
            _wc_u = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id, msg.from_user.username or "")
            await msg.answer(_t("ticker_not_entered", getattr(_wc_u, "lang", "ru")), parse_mode="HTML")
            return
        # Нормализуем к OKX формату
        sym = _normalize_symbol(raw)
        # watch_coin поддерживает одну монету одновременно — это системное ограничение
        # MAX_WATCHLIST_COINS = 1
        user.watch_coin = sym
        await um.save(user)
        base = sym.replace("-USDT-SWAP", "").replace("-USDT", "")
        await msg.answer(
            f"✅ Фильтр установлен: <b>{base}</b>\n\n"
            f"Сигналы будут поступать только по монете <b>{base}</b>.\n"
            f"Чтобы сбросить — откройте «🎯 Мониторить одну монету» в главном меню.",
            parse_mode="HTML",
        )

    # ─── РЕЗУЛЬТАТЫ СДЕЛОК ────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("res_"))
    async def trade_result(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        NL       = "\n"
        parts    = cb.data.split("_", 2)
        result   = parts[1]
        trade_id = parts[2]
        labels   = {
            "TP1":"🎯 TP1 зафиксирован!","TP2":"🎯 TP2 зафиксирован!",
            "TP3":"🏆 TP3 зафиксирован!","SL":"❌ Стоп-лосс","SKIP":"⏭ Пропущено",
        }
        await cb.answer(labels.get(result, "✅ Записано"), show_alert=True)

        from i18n import t as _t
        _tr_user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _trlang = getattr(_tr_user, "lang", "ru")
        trade = await db.db_get_trade(trade_id)
        if not trade:
            await cb.message.answer(_t("trade_not_found", _trlang)); return
        if trade.get("result") and trade["result"] not in ("", "SKIP"):
            await cb.message.answer(_t("result_already_set", _trlang, result=trade["result"]), parse_mode="HTML"); return

        rr_map = {"TP1":trade["tp1_rr"],"TP2":trade["tp2_rr"],"TP3":trade["tp3_rr"],"SL":-1.0,"SKIP":0.0}
        await db.db_set_trade_result(trade_id, result, rr_map.get(result, 0.0))

        emojis  = {"TP1":"🎯 TP1","TP2":"🎯 TP2","TP3":"🏆 TP3","SL":"❌ SL","SKIP":"⏭ Пропущено"}
        rr_strs = {"TP1":"+"+str(trade["tp1_rr"])+"R","TP2":"+"+str(trade["tp2_rr"])+"R",
                   "TP3":"+"+str(trade["tp3_rr"])+"R","SL":"-1R","SKIP":""}
        try:
            emoji_str = emojis.get(result, "")
            rr_str    = rr_strs.get(result, "")
            await cb.message.edit_text(
                f"{_html.escape(cb.message.text or '')}{NL}{NL}<b>Результат: {emoji_str}  {rr_str}</b>",  # AUDIT: BUG-002
                parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=None,
            )
        except (TelegramBadRequest, TelegramForbiddenError):
            pass  # сообщение уже изменено или удалено — норма

        if result != "SKIP":
            user  = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            stats = await db.db_get_user_stats(user.user_id)
            if stats:
                wr   = stats["winrate"]
                tot  = stats["total_rr"]
                sign = "+" if tot >= 0 else ""
                wr_em = "🔥" if wr >= 70 else "✅" if wr >= 50 else "⚠️"
                await cb.message.answer(
                    "📊 <b>Счёт обновлён</b>" + NL + NL +
                    "Сделок: <b>" + str(stats["total"]) + "</b>  " +
                    wr_em + " Винрейт: <b>" + "{:.1f}".format(wr) + "%</b>" + NL +
                    "Итого R: <b>" + sign + "{:.2f}".format(tot) + "R</b>" + NL + NL +
                    "Полная статистика → /stats",
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )

    # ─── НАВИГАЦИЯ ────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "back_main")
    async def back_main(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        await cb.answer()
        user  = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        trend = scanner.get_trend()
        await safe_edit(cb, main_text(user, trend), kb_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "noop")  # AUDIT: section headers in backtest/keyboards
    async def noop_handler(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "fsm_cancel_global")
    async def fsm_cancel_global(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        """Универсальная кнопка отмены — сбрасывает любое FSM-состояние."""
        current = await state.get_state()
        await state.clear()
        from i18n import t as _t
        _fc_user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer(_t("fsm_cancelled", getattr(_fc_user, "lang", "ru")) if current else "")
        user  = _fc_user
        trend = scanner.get_trend()
        await safe_edit(cb, main_text(user, trend), kb_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "more_menu")
    async def more_menu(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        text = "➕ <b>Дополнительно</b>" if lang == "ru" else "➕ <b>More</b>"
        await safe_edit(cb, text, kb_more(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "quick_start")
    async def quick_start(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user     = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, _   = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await safe_edit(cb, pricing_text(config), kb_subscribe(config))
            return
        strategy = getattr(user, "strategy", "LEVELS")
        if strategy == "SMC":
            both_on = user.smc_long_active and user.smc_short_active
            if both_on:
                user.smc_long_active  = False
                user.smc_short_active = False
                msg = "⏹ SMC сканеры остановлены."
            else:
                user.smc_long_active  = True
                user.smc_short_active = True
                msg = "🚀 SMC ЛОНГ + ШОРТ сканеры запущены!"
        else:
            both_on = user.long_active and user.short_active
            if both_on:
                user.long_active  = False
                user.short_active = False
                msg = "⏹ Сканеры остановлены."
            else:
                user.long_active  = True
                user.short_active = True
                msg = "🚀 ЛОНГ + ШОРТ сканеры запущены!"
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(msg, show_alert=True)
        trend = scanner.get_trend() if hasattr(scanner, "get_trend") else {}
        await safe_edit(cb, main_text(user, trend), kb_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "show_strategy")
    async def show_strategy(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await safe_edit(cb, _strategy_text(user.strategy, lang), _kb_strategy_change(user.strategy, lang))


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/backtest.py
================================================================================
"""
handlers/backtest.py — FSM-хендлеры системы бэктестов.

Команды / кнопки:
  🔬 Бэктест → меню
    ├── 🔍 Одна монета  → ввод символа → ввод дней → подтверждение → запуск
    ├── 📊 Полный скан  → ввод дней    → подтверждение → запуск
    ├── 📋 Мои результаты → список + просмотр
    └── ⏳ Очередь       → список + отмена

Все ошибки перехватываются — хендлеры никогда не крашат бота.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import html as _html  # SECURITY-FIX
import json
import logging
import time
from datetime import datetime

from aiogram import Dispatcher, F, Bot
from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext
from aiogram.types import (
    CallbackQuery,
    Message,
    InlineKeyboardMarkup,
    InlineKeyboardButton,
)

import database as db
from i18n import t as _t
from handlers._common import BacktestState, safe_edit

# Импорт на уровне модуля — чтобы ошибки были видны при старте, а не в рантайме
try:
    from backtest_queue import enqueue_backtest as _enqueue_backtest
    _BQ_OK = True
except Exception as _bq_err:
    _BQ_OK = False
    _BQ_ERR = str(_bq_err)

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Backtest")

# ── Хелперы форматирования ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _dt(ts: float) -> str:
    """Timestamp → красивая дата."""
    try:
        return datetime.fromtimestamp(ts).strftime("%d.%m %H:%M")
    except Exception:
        return "—"


def _sym(raw: str) -> str:
    """'BTC-USDT-SWAP' → 'BTC'."""
    return raw.replace("-USDT-SWAP", "").replace("-USDT", "").upper() if raw else "SCAN"


def _pct(v) -> str:
    if v is None:
        return "0%"
    v = float(v)
    if v <= 1.0:   # хранится как доля (0.20 = 20%)
        v *= 100
    return f"{v:.1f}%"


def _rr(v: float) -> str:
    return f"{v:.2f}"


def _format_result_short(r: dict) -> str:
    """Одна строка для списка результатов."""
    try:
        sym   = _sym(r.get("symbol", ""))
        wr    = _pct(r.get("win_rate", 0))
        rr    = _rr(r.get("avg_rr", 0))
        days  = r.get("days", 0)
        cnt   = r.get("total_trades", 0)
        dt    = _dt(r.get("created_at", 0))
        return f"<b>{sym}</b> {r.get('timeframe','')} {days}d → WR {wr} | RR {rr} | {cnt} trades | {dt}"
    except Exception:
        return "—"


def _format_result_full(r: dict) -> str:
    """Полная карточка результата бэктеста."""
    try:
        sym       = _sym(r.get("symbol", ""))
        strat     = r.get("strategy", "")
        tf        = r.get("timeframe", "")
        days      = r.get("days", 0)
        total     = r.get("total_trades", 0)
        wr        = _pct(r.get("win_rate", 0))
        avg_rr    = _rr(r.get("avg_rr", 0))
        pf        = _rr(r.get("profit_factor", 0))
        dd        = f"{r.get('max_drawdown', 0):.1f}R"
        total_rr  = _rr(r.get("total_rr", 0))
        dt        = _dt(r.get("created_at", 0))

        # Extended metrics from new fields
        sharpe    = r.get("sharpe_ratio", 0)
        sortino   = r.get("sortino_ratio", 0)
        calmar    = r.get("calmar_ratio", 0)
        avg_win   = r.get("avg_win_rr", 0)
        avg_loss  = r.get("avg_loss_rr", 0)
        avg_dur   = r.get("avg_duration_bars", 0)
        avg_mae   = r.get("avg_mae", 0)
        avg_mfe   = r.get("avg_mfe", 0)
        compound  = r.get("compound_final_balance", 0)
        slip_pct  = r.get("slippage_pct", 0)
        fund_r    = r.get("funding_total_r", 0)
        mc        = r.get("monte_carlo", {})
        monthly   = r.get("monthly_breakdown", [])

        lines = [
            f"🔬 <b>Backtest #{r.get('id','')}</b>",
            f"📌 {sym}  |  {strat}",
            f"⏱ TF: <b>{tf}</b>  |  {days}d",
            "",
            f"📊 Trades: <b>{total}</b>",
            f"🎯 Win Rate: <b>{wr}</b>",
            f"📐 Avg R:R: <b>{avg_rr}</b>",
            f"💹 PF: <b>{pf}</b>",
            f"📉 Max DD: <b>{dd}</b>",
            f"💰 Total R: <b>{total_rr}</b>",
        ]

        # Risk Adjusted metrics
        if sharpe or sortino or calmar:
            lines.append("")
            lines.append("📐 <b>Risk Adjusted:</b>")
            lines.append(f"  Sharpe: <b>{sharpe:.2f}</b>  Sortino: <b>{sortino:.2f}</b>  Calmar: <b>{calmar:.2f}</b>")
        if avg_win or avg_loss:
            lines.append(f"  ✅ Avg win: <b>{avg_win:.2f}R</b>  ❌ Avg loss: <b>{avg_loss:.2f}R</b>")
        if avg_dur:
            lines.append(f"  ⏱ Avg duration: <b>{avg_dur:.0f} bars</b>  MAE: <b>{avg_mae:.2f}R</b>  MFE: <b>{avg_mfe:.2f}R</b>")

        # Compound + slippage
        if compound:
            lines.append(f"  💰 Compound ($1000 → ${compound:.0f})  Slip: {slip_pct:g}%  Funding: {fund_r:.2f}R")

        # Monte Carlo
        if mc and mc.get("runs", 0) > 0:
            lines.append("")
            lines.append("🎲 <b>Monte Carlo:</b>")
            lines.append(
                f"  Median: <b>${mc.get('median',0):.0f}</b>  "
                f"P5: ${mc.get('p5',0):.0f}  P95: ${mc.get('p95',0):.0f}  "
                f"RoR: <b>{mc.get('risk_of_ruin_pct',0):.1f}%</b>"
            )

        # Monthly breakdown (last 6 months)
        if monthly:
            lines.append("")
            lines.append("📅 <b>Monthly (last 6):</b>")
            for mo in monthly[-6:]:
                mo_wr = mo.get("wr", 0)
                mo_r  = mo.get("total_r", 0)
                mo_t  = mo.get("trades", 0)
                sign  = "+" if mo_r >= 0 else ""
                lines.append(f"  {mo.get('month','')}  {sign}{mo_r:.1f}R  WR {mo_wr:.0f}%  ({mo_t}tr)")

        lines.append("")
        lines.append(f"🕐 {dt}")

        # Предупреждение при малом числе сделок
        if total < 30:
            lines.append("")
            lines.append(
                "⚠️ <i>Few trades for reliable stats. "
                "Try longer period or different strategy.</i>"
            )

        # Топ-5 монет для скана (symbol пустой = скан)
        if not r.get("symbol"):
            try:
                summary = json.loads(r.get("summary_json", "[]") or "[]")
                valid = [
                    s for s in summary
                    if s.get("total_trades", 0) >= 5 and s.get("profit_factor", 0) > 0
                ]
                valid.sort(key=lambda x: x.get("profit_factor", 0), reverse=True)
                if valid:
                    lines.append("")
                    lines.append("🏆 <b>Топ монет:</b>")
                    for i, s in enumerate(valid[:5], 1):
                        sym_name = _sym(s.get("symbol", ""))
                        pf_val   = s.get("profit_factor", 0)
                        wr_val   = s.get("win_rate", 0) * 100  # в BacktestResult 0-1
                        tr_val   = s.get("total_trades", 0)
                        lines.append(
                            f"  {i}. <b>{sym_name}</b> — "
                            f"PF: {pf_val:.2f} | WR: {wr_val:.1f}% | {tr_val} сделок"
                        )
                else:
                    lines.append("")
                    lines.append("ℹ️ <i>Ни одна монета не прошла минимальный фильтр (5 сделок).</i>")
            except Exception as e:
                log.debug("summary parse: %s", e)

        # R-распределение и исходы (из summary_json → trades)
        try:
            summary = json.loads(r.get("summary_json", "[]") or "[]")
            # Для одной монеты: trades внутри первого результата
            all_trades = []
            for s in summary:
                all_trades.extend(s.get("trades", []))
            if all_trades:
                # Распределение по R-диапазонам
                rr_vals = [float(t.get("rr_realized", 0)) for t in all_trades]
                below_0  = sum(1 for v in rr_vals if v < 0)
                r_0_05   = sum(1 for v in rr_vals if 0 <= v < 0.5)
                r_05_1   = sum(1 for v in rr_vals if 0.5 <= v < 1.0)
                r_1_2    = sum(1 for v in rr_vals if 1.0 <= v < 2.0)
                r_2_3    = sum(1 for v in rr_vals if 2.0 <= v < 3.0)
                r_3plus  = sum(1 for v in rr_vals if v >= 3.0)
                lines.append("")
                lines.append("📊 <b>R Distribution:</b>")
                lines.append(f"  📉 &lt;0: <b>{below_0}</b>  |  0–0.5: <b>{r_0_05}</b>  |  0.5–1: <b>{r_05_1}</b>")
                lines.append(f"  📈 1–2: <b>{r_1_2}</b>  |  2–3: <b>{r_2_3}</b>  |  3+: <b>{r_3plus}</b>")

                # Avg win / avg loss
                win_rrs = [v for v in rr_vals if v > 0]
                loss_rrs = [v for v in rr_vals if v < 0]
                if win_rrs:
                    lines.append(f"  ✅ Avg win: <b>{sum(win_rrs)/len(win_rrs):.2f}R</b> ({len(win_rrs)} сд.)")
                if loss_rrs:
                    lines.append(f"  ❌ Avg loss: <b>{sum(loss_rrs)/len(loss_rrs):.2f}R</b> ({len(loss_rrs)} сд.)")

                # Исходы (PTP, BE, SL, TP)
                results_count = {}
                for t in all_trades:
                    res = t.get("result", "?")
                    results_count[res] = results_count.get(res, 0) + 1
                if results_count:
                    lines.append("")
                    lines.append("📋 <b>Outcomes:</b>")
                    for res, cnt in sorted(results_count.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:6]:
                        lines.append(f"  • {res}: <b>{cnt}</b>")
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("R-distribution parse: %s", e)

        # Параметры стратегии (только важные, без FIXED_PARAMS)
        try:
            _params = json.loads(r.get("params", "{}") or "{}")
            _important = [
                "pivot_strength", "min_rr", "max_dist_pct", "zone_buffer",
                "cooldown_bars", "zone_pct", "max_level_tests", "min_quality",
                "max_level_age", "use_rsi_filter", "use_volume_filter",
                "vol_mult", "trend_only",
            ]
            _show = {k: v for k, v in _params.items() if k in _important}
            if _show:
                lines.append("")
                lines.append("⚙️ <b>Параметры:</b>")
                for k, v in sorted(_show.items()):
                    label = _PARAM_LABELS.get(k, k)
                    if isinstance(v, bool):
                        val_str = "✅" if v else "❌"
                    else:
                        val_str = f"<b>{v}</b>"
                    lines.append(f"  {label}: {val_str}")
        except Exception:
            pass

        result_text = "\n".join(lines)
        # Telegram лимит 4096 символов — обрезаем если превышает
        if len(result_text) > 4000:
            result_text = result_text[:3950] + "\n\n<i>...текст обрезан</i>"
        return result_text
    except Exception as e:
        log.debug("_format_result_full: %s", e)
        return "⚠️ Formatting error"


def _format_queue_item(q: dict) -> str:
    """Одна строка для списка очереди."""
    try:
        status_icon = {
            "pending":   "⏳",
            "running":   "🔄",
            "done":      "✅",
            "error":     "❌",
            "cancelled": "🚫",
        }.get(q.get("status", ""), "❓")
        sym  = _sym(q.get("symbol", ""))
        days = q.get("days", 0)
        dt   = _dt(q.get("created_at", 0))
        err  = q.get("error", "")
        line = f"{status_icon} <b>#{q['id']}</b> {sym} {days}д — {dt}"
        if err:
            line += f"\n   ⚠️ <i>{err[:80]}</i>"
        return line
    except Exception:
        return "—"


# ── Клавиатуры ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _kb_backtest_menu(lang: str = "en") -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_single", lang),        callback_data="bt_single")],
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_scan", lang),          callback_data="bt_scan")],
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_auto_optimize", lang),  callback_data="bt_optimize")],
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🎯 Target Win Rate",          callback_data="bt_target_wr")],
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_my_results", lang),    callback_data="bt_results_0")],
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_queue", lang),         callback_data="bt_queue")],
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_back", lang),          callback_data="back_main")],
    ])


def _kb_cancel_fsm(lang: str = "en") -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[[
        InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_cancel", lang), callback_data="bt_cancel_input"),
    ]])


def _kb_strategy_choice() -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
        [
            InlineKeyboardButton(text="📊 LEVELS",   callback_data="bt_strat_LEVELS"),
            InlineKeyboardButton(text="🧠 GERCHIK",  callback_data="bt_strat_GERCHIK"),
        ],
        [
            InlineKeyboardButton(text="📐 SMC",      callback_data="bt_strat_SMC"),
            InlineKeyboardButton(text="⚡ SCALPING", callback_data="bt_strat_SCALPING"),
        ],
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text="❌ Cancel",      callback_data="bt_cancel_input")],
    ])


def _kb_timeframe_choice(strategy: str) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
    """Таймфреймы для бэктеста.

    SCALPING — только короткие (1m / 5m / 15m).
    Остальные стратегии — 15m / 1h / 4h.
    """
    if strategy == "SCALPING":
        rows = [
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="1m",  callback_data="bt_tf_1m"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="5m",  callback_data="bt_tf_5m"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="15m", callback_data="bt_tf_15m"),
            ],
        ]
    else:
        rows = [
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="15m", callback_data="bt_tf_15m"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="1h",  callback_data="bt_tf_1h"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="4h",  callback_data="bt_tf_4h"),
            ],
        ]
    rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text="❌ Cancel", callback_data="bt_cancel_input")])
    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows)


def _kb_confirm(symbol: str, days: int, mode: str) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
    """Клавиатура подтверждения запуска."""
    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
        [InlineKeyboardButton(
            text="✅ Launch",
            callback_data=f"bt_confirm_{mode}_{days}",
        )],
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text="❌ Cancel", callback_data="bt_cancel_input")],
    ])


def _kb_results_page(rows: list[dict], page: int) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
    """Список результатов с пагинацией (5 на страницу)."""
    PAGE = 5
    start = page * PAGE
    chunk = rows[start: start + PAGE]
    btns = []
    for r in chunk:
        sym   = _sym(r.get("symbol", ""))
        wr    = _pct(r.get("win_rate", 0))
        label = f"#{r['id']} {sym} WR {wr}"
        btns.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text=label, callback_data=f"bt_view_{r['id']}")])
    nav = []
    if page > 0:
        nav.append(InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️", callback_data=f"bt_results_{page-1}"))
    if start + PAGE < len(rows):
        nav.append(InlineKeyboardButton(text="▶️", callback_data=f"bt_results_{page+1}"))
    if nav:
        btns.append(nav)
    btns.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Back", callback_data="bt_menu")])
    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=btns)


def _kb_result_detail(result_id: int, lang: str = "en") -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_apply_params", lang), callback_data=f"bt_apply_{result_id}")],
        [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_back_list", lang),    callback_data="bt_results_0")],
    ])


def _kb_queue_list(rows: list[dict]) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
    btns = []
    for q in rows[:10]:
        status = q.get("status", "")
        sym  = _sym(q.get("symbol", ""))
        label = f"#{q['id']} {sym} [{status}]"
        if status == "pending":
            btns.append([InlineKeyboardButton(
                text=f"🚫 Отменить {label}",
                callback_data=f"bt_qcancel_{q['id']}",
            )])
        else:
            btns.append([InlineKeyboardButton(
                text=label,
                callback_data="noop",
            )])
    btns.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Back", callback_data="bt_menu")])
    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=btns)
