def _kb_bt_params(strategy: str, params: dict) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
    """Клавиатура настроек стратегии для бэктеста."""
    defaults = _STRATEGY_DEFAULTS.get(strategy, {})
    rows = []
    rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(
        text=f"── ⚙️ Параметры {strategy} ──",
        callback_data="noop",
    )])
    for key in defaults:
        cur = params.get(key, defaults[key])
        label = _PARAM_LABELS.get(key, key)
        if isinstance(cur, bool):
            val_str = "✅ on" if cur else "❌ off"
        elif isinstance(cur, float):
            val_str = f"{cur:g}"
        else:
            val_str = str(cur)
        rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(
            text=f"{label}: {val_str}",
            callback_data=f"btp_{key}",
        )])
    # Partial TP секция (одинаковая для всех стратегий)
    rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text="── 📊 Partial TP ──", callback_data="noop")])
    for key in _PARTIAL_TP_DEFAULTS:
        cur = params.get(key, _PARTIAL_TP_DEFAULTS[key])
        label = _PARAM_LABELS.get(key, key)
        if isinstance(cur, bool):
            val_str = "✅ on" if cur else "❌ off"
        elif isinstance(cur, float):
            val_str = f"{cur:g}"
        else:
            val_str = str(cur)
        rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"{label}: {val_str}", callback_data=f"btp_{key}")])
    # Simulation секция
    rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text="── 🧪 Simulation ──", callback_data="noop")])
    for key in _SIMULATION_DEFAULTS:
        cur = params.get(key, _SIMULATION_DEFAULTS[key])
        label = _PARAM_LABELS.get(key, key)
        rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"{label}: {cur:g}", callback_data=f"btp_{key}")])
    rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_load_settings", "en"), callback_data="btp_load_user")])
    rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_reset", "en"), callback_data="btp_reset")])
    rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("bt_launch", "en"), callback_data="btp_confirm")])
    rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text="❌ Cancel", callback_data="bt_cancel_input")])
    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows)


def _kb_bt_param_values(key: str, current_val, strategy: str) -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
    """Клавиатура выбора значения конкретного параметра."""
    options = _PARAM_OPTIONS.get(key, [])
    rows = []
    label = _PARAM_LABELS.get(key, key)
    rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(
        text=f"── {label} ──",
        callback_data="noop",
    )])
    btns_row = []
    for val in options:
        if isinstance(val, bool):
            mark = "◉ " if val == current_val else "○ "
            text = f"{mark}{'вкл' if val else 'выкл'}"
        else:
            mark = "◉ " if (isinstance(current_val, (int, float)) and abs(float(val) - float(current_val)) < 0.001) else "○ "
            text = f"{mark}{val}"
        btns_row.append(InlineKeyboardButton(
            text=text,
            callback_data=f"btpv_{key}_{val}",
        ))
        if len(btns_row) >= 3:
            rows.append(btns_row)
            btns_row = []
    if btns_row:
        rows.append(btns_row)
    rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Back to params", callback_data="btp_back")])
    return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows)


# ── Утилиты ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _normalize_sym(text: str) -> str:
    """'btc' / 'BTC' / 'BTC/USDT' → 'BTC-USDT-SWAP'."""
    try:
        s = text.strip().upper().replace("/", "-").replace("_", "-")
        if s.endswith("-USDT-SWAP"):
            return s
        if s.endswith("-USDT"):
            return s + "-SWAP"
        if "-" not in s:
            return s + "-USDT-SWAP"
        return s
    except Exception:
        return text.strip().upper()


# ── Регистрация хендлеров ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config) -> None:  # noqa: ANN001

    # ── Вход в меню бэктеста ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "bt_menu")
    async def cb_bt_menu(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await state.clear()
            await cb.answer()
            _user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            _lang = getattr(_user, "lang", "ru")
            _text = _t("bt_title", _lang) + "\n\n" + _t("bt_subtitle", _lang)
            try:
                await safe_edit(cb, _text, _kb_backtest_menu(_lang))
            except Exception:
                await cb.message.answer(_text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=_kb_backtest_menu(_lang))
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("cb_bt_menu: %s", e)

    # ── Одна монета: шаг 1 — символ ─────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "bt_single")
    async def cb_bt_single(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            _u = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            if _u.plan_limit("backtest_per_day") <= 0:
                await cb.answer("🔒 Бэктест доступен в тарифе Pro и выше", show_alert=True); return
            await state.set_state(BacktestState.waiting_symbol)
            await state.update_data(mode="single")
            await safe_edit(
                cb,
                "🔍 <b>Backtest Single Coin</b>\n\n"
                "Enter coin ticker, e.g.:\n"
                "<code>BTC</code>  <code>ETH</code>  <code>SOL</code>",
                _kb_cancel_fsm(),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("cb_bt_single: %s", e)

    # ── Полный скан: шаг 1 — выбор стратегии ────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "bt_scan")
    async def cb_bt_scan(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            await state.update_data(mode="scan", symbol="")
            await state.set_state(BacktestState.waiting_strategy)
            await safe_edit(
                cb,
                "📊 <b>Scan Top Coins</b>\n\n"
                "Choose strategy:",
                _kb_strategy_choice(),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("cb_bt_scan: %s", e)

    # ── Выбор стратегии ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bt_strat_"))
    async def cb_bt_strategy(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            strategy = cb.data.replace("bt_strat_", "")
            await state.update_data(strategy=strategy)
            await state.set_state(BacktestState.waiting_timeframe)

            data = await state.get_data()
            mode   = data.get("mode", "single")
            symbol = data.get("symbol", "")

            if mode == "scan":
                hint = "📊 Full scan top coins"
            else:
                hint = f"📌 Coin: <b>{_sym(symbol)}</b>"

            await safe_edit(
                cb,
                f"{hint}\n"
                f"Strategy: <b>{strategy}</b>\n\n"
                "Choose timeframe:",
                _kb_timeframe_choice(strategy),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("cb_bt_strategy: %s", e)

    # ── Выбор таймфрейма ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bt_tf_"))
    async def cb_bt_timeframe(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            timeframe = cb.data.replace("bt_tf_", "")
            await state.update_data(timeframe=timeframe)
            await state.set_state(BacktestState.waiting_days)

            data     = await state.get_data()
            mode     = data.get("mode", "single")
            symbol   = data.get("symbol", "")
            strategy = data.get("strategy", "LEVELS")

            if mode == "scan":
                hint = "📊 Full scan top coins"
            else:
                hint = f"📌 Coin: <b>{_sym(symbol)}</b>"

            await safe_edit(
                cb,
                f"{hint}\n"
                f"Strategy: <b>{strategy}</b>\n"
                f"TF: <b>{timeframe}</b>\n\n"
                "Enter days of history (30–365):",
                _kb_cancel_fsm(),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("cb_bt_timeframe: %s", e)

    # ── Ввод символа ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(BacktestState.waiting_symbol)
    async def msg_bt_symbol(msg: Message, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            raw = (msg.text or "").strip()
            if not raw:
                await msg.answer("⚠️ Enter coin ticker, e.g.: <code>BTC</code>")
                return
            symbol = _normalize_sym(raw)
            await state.update_data(symbol=symbol)
            await state.set_state(BacktestState.waiting_strategy)
            await msg.answer(
                f"📌 Coin: <b>{_sym(symbol)}</b>\n\n"
                "Choose strategy:",
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=_kb_strategy_choice(),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("msg_bt_symbol: %s", e)

    # ── Ввод дней ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(BacktestState.waiting_days)
    async def msg_bt_days(msg: Message, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            raw = (msg.text or "").strip()
            try:
                days = int(raw)
            except ValueError:
                await msg.answer("⚠️ Введи число от 30 до 365")
                return
            if not (30 <= days <= 365):
                await msg.answer("⚠️ Допустимый диапазон: 30–365 дней")
                return

            data = await state.get_data()
            mode      = data.get("mode", "single")
            symbol    = data.get("symbol", "")
            strategy  = data.get("strategy", "LEVELS")
            timeframe = data.get("timeframe", "1h")

            # Инициализируем defaults параметры стратегии
            bt_params = {**_STRATEGY_DEFAULTS.get(strategy, {}), **_PARTIAL_TP_DEFAULTS, **_SIMULATION_DEFAULTS}
            await state.update_data(days=days, bt_params=bt_params)
            await state.set_state(BacktestState.waiting_params)

            sym_label = _sym(symbol) if symbol else "all coins (top-50)"

            # Подсказка: мало дней для короткого таймфрейма
            _MIN_DAYS = {"1m": 60, "5m": 60, "15m": 90, "1h": 90, "4h": 180}
            warn = ""
            if days < _MIN_DAYS.get(timeframe, 90):
                warn = (
                    f"\n⚠️ <i>Recommended minimum "
                    f"{_MIN_DAYS.get(timeframe, 90)} дней для {timeframe}.</i>\n"
                )

            await msg.answer(
                f"📋 <b>Настрой параметры бэктеста</b>\n\n"
                f"🔸 {sym_label} | {strategy} | {timeframe} | {days}д\n"
                f"{warn}\n"
                f"Click parameter to change, or <b>✅ Launch</b>:",
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=_kb_bt_params(strategy, bt_params),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("msg_bt_days: %s", e)

    # ── Настройка параметров стратегии ─────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("btp_") & ~F.data.startswith("btpv_"), BacktestState.waiting_params)
    async def cb_bt_param(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Обработка кнопок настройки параметров бэктеста."""
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            action = cb.data[4:]  # после "btp_"
            data   = await state.get_data()
            strategy  = data.get("strategy", "LEVELS")
            bt_params = data.get("bt_params", {})

            if action == "confirm":
                # Переходим к запуску
                mode      = data.get("mode", "single")
                symbol    = data.get("symbol", "")
                timeframe = data.get("timeframe", "1h")
                days      = data.get("days", 90)
                await state.set_state(BacktestState.waiting_confirm)

                sym_label = _sym(symbol) if symbol else "all coins (top-50)"

                # Формируем строку параметров
                defaults = _STRATEGY_DEFAULTS.get(strategy, {})
                changed = []
                for k, v in bt_params.items():
                    dv = defaults.get(k)
                    if dv is not None and v != dv:
                        lbl = _PARAM_LABELS.get(k, k)
                        changed.append(f"{lbl}={v}")
                params_str = ", ".join(changed) if changed else "defaults"

                await safe_edit(
                    cb,
                    f"📋 <b>Confirm backtest launch</b>\n\n"
                    f"🔸 Coin: <b>{sym_label}</b>\n"
                    f"🔸 Strategy: <b>{strategy}</b>\n"
                    f"🔸 TF: <b>{timeframe}</b>\n"
                    f"🔸 Days: <b>{days}</b>\n"
                    f"⚙️ Params: <code>{params_str}</code>",
                    _kb_confirm(symbol, days, mode),
                )
                return

            if action == "reset":
                bt_params = dict(_STRATEGY_DEFAULTS.get(strategy, {}))
                await state.update_data(bt_params=bt_params)
                await safe_edit(cb, "🔄 Parameters reset.", _kb_bt_params(strategy, bt_params))
                return

            # BT-FIX-3: загрузка настроек пользователя
            if action == "load_user":
                try:
                    user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
                    if strategy == "LEVELS":
                        loaded = {
                            "pivot_strength":    getattr(user, "pivot_strength", 5),
                            "min_rr":            getattr(user, "min_rr", 1.5),
                            "max_risk_pct":      getattr(user, "max_risk_pct", 2.0),
                            "max_level_tests":   getattr(user, "max_level_tests", 5),
                            "max_dist_pct":      getattr(user, "max_dist_pct", 2.0),
                            "zone_pct":          getattr(user, "zone_pct", 1.0),
                            "ema_fast":          getattr(user, "ema_fast", 50),
                            "ema_slow":          getattr(user, "ema_slow", 200),
                            "rsi_ob":            getattr(user, "rsi_ob", 70),
                            "rsi_os":            getattr(user, "rsi_os", 30),
                            "use_rsi_filter":    getattr(user, "use_rsi", False),
                            "use_volume_filter": getattr(user, "use_volume", False),
                            "vol_mult":          getattr(user, "vol_mult", 1.0),
                            "max_level_age":     getattr(user, "max_level_age", 100),
                            "zone_buffer":       getattr(user, "zone_buffer", 0.3),
                            "trend_only":        getattr(user, "trend_only", False),
                        }
                    elif strategy == "GERCHIK":
                        loaded = {
                            "min_rr_ratio":   float(getattr(user, "gerchik_min_rr", 3.0) or 3.0),
                            "pivot_strength": int(getattr(user, "gerchik_pivot", 5) or 5),
                            "level_lookback": int(getattr(user, "gerchik_lookback", 50) or 50),
                            "tp1_rr":         float(getattr(user, "gerchik_tp1_rr", 3.0) or 3.0),
                            "tp2_rr":         float(getattr(user, "gerchik_tp2_rr", 4.0) or 4.0),
                            "lft_pct":        float(getattr(user, "gerchik_lft_pct", 0.20) or 0.20),
                        }
                    elif strategy == "SCALPING":
                        loaded = {
                            "tp_pct":        float(getattr(user, "scalping_tp_pct", 0.75) or 0.75),
                            "sl_pct":        float(getattr(user, "scalping_sl_pct", 0.20) or 0.20),
                            "min_rr":        float(getattr(user, "scalping_min_rr", 1.3) or 1.3),
                            "ema_period":    int(getattr(user, "scalping_ema_period", 20) or 20),
                            "rsi_long_min":  float(getattr(user, "scalping_rsi_long_min", 40.0) or 40.0),
                            "rsi_long_max":  float(getattr(user, "scalping_rsi_long_max", 72.0) or 72.0),
                            "rsi_short_min": float(getattr(user, "scalping_rsi_short_min", 28.0) or 28.0),
                            "rsi_short_max": float(getattr(user, "scalping_rsi_short_max", 60.0) or 60.0),
                            "vol_mult":      float(getattr(user, "scalping_vol_mult", 1.2) or 1.2),
                        }
                    elif strategy == "SMC":
                        try:
                            sc = user.get_smc_cfg()
                            loaded = {
                                "min_confirmations": sc.min_confirmations,
                                "min_rr": sc.min_rr, "sl_buffer_pct": sc.sl_buffer_pct,
                                "ob_max_age": sc.ob_max_age, "fvg_enabled": sc.fvg_enabled,
                                "choch_enabled": sc.choch_enabled, "ob_use_breaker": sc.ob_use_breaker,
                            }
                        except Exception:
                            loaded = dict(_STRATEGY_DEFAULTS.get("SMC", {}))
                    else:
                        loaded = dict(_STRATEGY_DEFAULTS.get(strategy, {}))
                    # Добавляем Partial TP из профиля пользователя
                    loaded["partial_tp_enabled"] = getattr(user, "partial_tp_enabled", False)
                    loaded["partial_tp1_r"]      = getattr(user, "partial_tp1_r", 1.0)
                    loaded["partial_tp1_pct"]    = getattr(user, "partial_tp1_pct", 40.0)
                    loaded["partial_tp2_r"]      = getattr(user, "partial_tp2_r", 1.5)
                    loaded["partial_tp2_pct"]    = getattr(user, "partial_tp2_pct", 30.0)
                    bt_params.update(loaded)
                    await state.update_data(bt_params=bt_params)
                    await safe_edit(
                        cb,
                        "📥 <b>Settings loaded from profile</b>\n\n"
                        "Click parameter to change:",
                        _kb_bt_params(strategy, bt_params),
                    )
                except Exception as e:
                    log.warning("btp_load_user: %s", e)
                    await cb.answer("Failed to load settings", show_alert=True)
                return

            if action == "back":
                await safe_edit(
                    cb,
                    "⚙️ <b>Параметры бэктеста</b>\n\n"
                    "Click parameter to change:",
                    _kb_bt_params(strategy, bt_params),
                )
                return

            # Нажали на конкретный параметр — показываем варианты значений
            key = action
            if key in bt_params or key in _STRATEGY_DEFAULTS.get(strategy, {}):
                cur_val = bt_params.get(key, _STRATEGY_DEFAULTS.get(strategy, {}).get(key))
                label = _PARAM_LABELS.get(key, key)
                await safe_edit(
                    cb,
                    f"⚙️ Выбери значение <b>{label}</b>:",
                    _kb_bt_param_values(key, cur_val, strategy),
                )
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("cb_bt_param: %s", e)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("btpv_"), BacktestState.waiting_params)
    async def cb_bt_param_value(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Пользователь выбрал значение параметра."""
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            # btpv_{key}_{value} — ключи содержат подчёркивания (min_rr, rsi_long_min, ...)
            # Поэтому разбиваем по ПОСЛЕДНЕМУ "_" (значения — числа/True/False без "_")
            payload = cb.data[5:]  # убираем "btpv_"
            if "_" not in payload:
                return
            key, raw_val = payload.rsplit("_", 1)
            # Если raw_val не похож на значение — значит key без подчёркиваний
            # и split нарезал неправильно. Пробуем первый вариант.
            if not raw_val and not key:
                return

            data      = await state.get_data()
            strategy  = data.get("strategy", "LEVELS")
            bt_params = data.get("bt_params", {})
            defaults  = _STRATEGY_DEFAULTS.get(strategy, {})

            # Определяем тип по дефолтному значению (проверяем и PTP defaults)
            default_val = defaults.get(key, _PARTIAL_TP_DEFAULTS.get(key, bt_params.get(key)))
            if isinstance(default_val, bool):
                new_val = raw_val == "True"
            elif isinstance(default_val, int):
                new_val = int(float(raw_val))
            elif isinstance(default_val, float):
                new_val = float(raw_val)
            else:
                new_val = raw_val

            bt_params[key] = new_val
            await state.update_data(bt_params=bt_params)

            # Возвращаемся к списку параметров
            await safe_edit(
                cb,
                "⚙️ <b>Параметры бэктеста</b>\n\n"
                "Click parameter to change:",
                _kb_bt_params(strategy, bt_params),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("cb_bt_param_value: %s", e)

    # ── Подтверждение запуска ────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bt_confirm_"))
    async def cb_bt_confirm(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            parts = cb.data.split("_")   # bt_confirm_{mode}_{days}
            mode = parts[2]
            days = int(parts[3])

            data      = await state.get_data()
            symbol    = data.get("symbol", "")
            strategy  = data.get("strategy", "LEVELS")
            timeframe = data.get("timeframe", "1h")
            bt_params = data.get("bt_params", {})
            await state.clear()

            user_id = cb.from_user.id

            # Прогресс: редактируем то же сообщение
            sent_msg_id = cb.message.message_id

            async def _progress(text: str) -> None:
                try:
                    # BT-FIX-4B: финальный маркер → показываем карточку результата
                    if text.startswith("__DONE__:"):
                        try:
                            _rid = int(text.split(":")[1])
                            _r = await db.db_backtest_result_get(_rid)
                            if _r:
                                _card = _format_result_full(_r)
                                if len(_card) > 4000:
                                    _card = _card[:3950] + "\n\n<i>...truncated</i>"
                                await bot.edit_message_text(
                                    _card,
                                    chat_id=cb.from_user.id,
                                    message_id=sent_msg_id,
                                    parse_mode="HTML",
                                    reply_markup=_kb_result_detail(_rid),
                                )
                                return
                        except Exception as _e4:
                            log.debug("BT-FIX-4B result card: %s", _e4)
                        # Fallback: кнопка пер��хода
                        _rid_s = text.split(":")[-1]
                        await bot.edit_message_text(
                            f"✅ <b>Бэктест завершён!</b>",
                            chat_id=cb.from_user.id,
                            message_id=sent_msg_id,
                            parse_mode="HTML",
                            reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[[
                                InlineKeyboardButton(
                                    text="📊 Смотреть результат",
                                    callback_data=f"bt_view_{_rid_s}",
                                )
                            ]]),
                        )
                        return
                    await bot.edit_message_text(
                        text,
                        chat_id=cb.from_user.id,
                        message_id=sent_msg_id,
                        parse_mode="HTML",
                    )
                except Exception:
                    pass

            if not _BQ_OK:
                await cb.message.answer(
                    f"❌ <b>Ошибка загрузки модуля бэктеста:</b>\n<code>{_BQ_ERR}</code>",
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
                return

            qid = await _enqueue_backtest(
                user_id=user_id,
                symbol=symbol,
                strategy=strategy,
                timeframe=timeframe,
                days=days,
                params=bt_params or None,
                progress_cb=_progress,
            )

            if qid:
                sym_label = _sym(symbol) if symbol else "all coins"
                await safe_edit(
                    cb,
                    f"✅ <b>Бэктест добавлен в очередь #{qid}</b>\n\n"
                    f"📌 {sym_label} | {days} дней\n"
                    f"⏳ Прогресс будет обновляться здесь.",
                    InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[[
                        InlineKeyboardButton(text="⏳ Queue", callback_data="bt_queue"),
                        InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Меню",   callback_data="bt_menu"),
                    ]]),
                )
            else:
                await safe_edit(
                    cb,
                    "❌ Не удалось добавить задачу. Попробуй позже.",
                    _kb_backtest_menu(),
                )
        except Exception as e:
            log.exception("cb_bt_confirm: %s", e)
            try:
                await cb.message.answer(
                    f"❌ <b>Ошибка запуска бэктеста:</b>\n<code>{e}</code>",
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
            except Exception:
                pass

    # ── Отмена ввода ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "bt_cancel_input")
    async def cb_bt_cancel_input(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await state.clear()
            await cb.answer("Cancelled")
            await safe_edit(
                cb,
                "🔬 <b>Бэктест</b>\n\nПроверь стратегию на исторических данных.",
                _kb_backtest_menu(),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("cb_bt_cancel_input: %s", e)

    # ── Список результатов ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bt_results_"))
    async def cb_bt_results(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            page = int(cb.data.split("_")[-1])
            _user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            _lang = getattr(_user, "lang", "ru")
            rows = await db.db_backtest_results_list(cb.from_user.id, limit=50)
            if not rows:
                await cb.message.answer(
                    _t("bt_no_results", _lang) + "\n\n" + _t("bt_run_first", _lang),
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                    reply_markup=_kb_backtest_menu(_lang),
                )
                return
            text_lines = [f"📋 <b>{_t('bt_my_results', _lang)}</b> ({len(rows)} total)\n"]
            PAGE = 5
            start = page * PAGE
            for r in rows[start: start + PAGE]:
                text_lines.append(_format_result_short(r))
            text = "\n".join(text_lines)
            if len(text) > 4000:
                text = text[:3950] + "\n<i>...truncated</i>"
            await cb.message.answer(text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=_kb_results_page(rows, page))
        except Exception as e:
            log.error("cb_bt_results: %s", e, exc_info=True)
            try:
                await cb.message.answer(f"❌ Error: {e}")
            except Exception:
                pass

    # ── Просмотр одного результата ───────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bt_view_"))
    async def cb_bt_view(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            result_id = int(cb.data.split("_")[-1])
            _user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            _lang = getattr(_user, "lang", "ru")
            r = await db.db_backtest_result_get(result_id)
            if not r or r.get("user_id") != cb.from_user.id:
                await cb.message.answer(_t("bt_not_found", _lang))
                return
            text = _format_result_full(r)
            if len(text) > 4000:
                text = text[:3950] + f"\n\n<i>{_t('bt_truncated', _lang)}</i>"
            await cb.message.answer(text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=_kb_result_detail(result_id, _lang))
        except Exception as e:
            log.error("cb_bt_view: %s", e, exc_info=True)
            try:
                await cb.message.answer(f"❌ Error: {e}")
            except Exception:
                pass

    # ── Применить параметры из бэктеста к UserSettings ──────────────────────

    # Маппинг bt_params → UserSettings атрибуты
    _APPLY_MAP = {
        "LEVELS": {
            # ── Были ──
            "pivot_strength":    "pivot_strength",
            "min_rr":            "min_rr",
            "max_risk_pct":      "max_risk_pct",
            "max_level_tests":   "max_level_tests",
            "max_dist_pct":      "max_dist_pct",
            "zone_pct":          "zone_pct",
            "rsi_ob":            "rsi_ob",
            "rsi_os":            "rsi_os",
            "ema_fast":          "ema_fast",
            "ema_slow":          "ema_slow",
            # ── Новые (были в поиске, но не применялись) ──
            "zone_buffer":       "zone_buffer",
            "cooldown_bars":     "cooldown_bars",
            "min_quality":       "min_quality",
            "max_level_age":     "max_level_age",
            "vol_mult":          "vol_mult",
            "trend_only":        "trend_only",
            "use_rsi_filter":    "use_rsi",
            "use_volume_filter": "use_volume",
        },
        "GERCHIK": {
            "min_rr_ratio":    "gerchik_min_rr",
            "pivot_strength":  "gerchik_pivot",
            "level_lookback":  "gerchik_lookback",
            "tp1_rr":          "gerchik_tp1_rr",
            "tp2_rr":          "gerchik_tp2_rr",
            "lft_pct":         "gerchik_lft_pct",
        },
        "SCALPING": {
            "tp_pct":          "scalping_tp_pct",
            "sl_pct":          "scalping_sl_pct",
            "min_rr":          "scalping_min_rr",
            "ema_period":      "scalping_ema_period",
            "rsi_long_min":    "scalping_rsi_long_min",
            "rsi_long_max":    "scalping_rsi_long_max",
            "rsi_short_min":   "scalping_rsi_short_min",
            "rsi_short_max":   "scalping_rsi_short_max",
            "vol_mult":        "scalping_vol_mult",
        },
        # SMC: параметры хранятся в JSON smc_cfg — обрабатывается отдельно
    }

    _APPLY_TYPES = {
        "pivot_strength": int, "min_rr": float, "max_risk_pct": float,
        "max_level_tests": int, "max_dist_pct": float, "zone_pct": float,
        "rsi_ob": int, "rsi_os": int, "ema_fast": int, "ema_slow": int,
        "min_rr_ratio": float, "level_lookback": int,
        "tp1_rr": float, "tp2_rr": float, "lft_pct": float,
        "tp_pct": float, "sl_pct": float, "vol_mult": float,
        "ema_period": int, "rsi_long_min": float, "rsi_long_max": float,
        "rsi_short_min": float, "rsi_short_max": float, "atr_max_pct": float,
        "min_confirmations": int, "sl_buffer_pct": float,
        "ob_max_age": int, "swing_lookback": int,
        # ── Новые ──
        "zone_buffer": float, "cooldown_bars": int, "min_quality": int,
        "max_level_age": int, "trend_only": bool,
        "use_rsi_filter": bool, "use_volume_filter": bool,
    }

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bt_apply_") & ~F.data.startswith("bt_apply_confirm_"))
    async def cb_bt_apply(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Шаг 1: показывает подтверждение с перечнем изменений."""
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            result_id = int(cb.data.split("_")[-1])
            r = await db.db_backtest_result_get(result_id)
            if not r or r.get("user_id") != cb.from_user.id:
                await cb.answer("Result not found", show_alert=True)
                return

            bt_params = {}
            try:
                bt_params = json.loads(r.get("params", "{}") or "{}")
            except Exception:
                pass
            if not bt_params:
                await safe_edit(cb, "ℹ️ Параметры по умолчанию — нечего применять.",
                                _kb_result_detail(result_id))
                return

            strategy  = r.get("strategy", "LEVELS")
            user      = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            apply_map = _APPLY_MAP.get(strategy, {})

            # Формируем список изменений
            changes = []
            if strategy == "SMC":
                # SMC: параметры из smc_cfg JSON
                ucfg = user.get_smc_cfg()
                smc_map = {"min_confirmations": "min_confirmations", "min_rr": "min_rr",
                           "sl_buffer_pct": "sl_buffer_pct", "ob_max_age": "ob_max_age",
                           "fvg_enabled": "fvg_enabled", "choch_enabled": "choch_enabled",
                           "ob_use_breaker": "ob_use_breaker", "swing_lookback": "swing_lookback"}
                for bt_key, smc_attr in smc_map.items():
                    if bt_key in bt_params:
                        old = getattr(ucfg, smc_attr, None)
                        new = bt_params[bt_key]
                        if old != new:
                            label = _PARAM_LABELS.get(bt_key, bt_key)
                            changes.append(f"• {label}: <b>{old}</b> → <b>{new}</b>")
            else:
                for bt_key, user_attr in apply_map.items():
                    if bt_key not in bt_params:
                        continue
                    old = getattr(user, user_attr, None)
                    new = bt_params[bt_key]
                    if old is not None and str(old) != str(new):
                        label = _PARAM_LABELS.get(bt_key, bt_key)
                        changes.append(f"• {label}: <b>{old}</b> → <b>{new}</b>")

            if not changes:
                await safe_edit(cb, "ℹ️ Параметры совпадают с текущими — ничего не изменится.",
                                _kb_result_detail(result_id))
                return

            await safe_edit(
                cb,
                f"⚙️ <b>Применить параметры {strategy}?</b>\n\n"
                + "\n".join(changes) + "\n\n"
                "<i>Параметры применятся к сканеру в следующем цикле.</i>",
                InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[[
                    InlineKeyboardButton(text="✅ Да, применить",
                                         callback_data=f"bt_apply_confirm_{result_id}"),
                    InlineKeyboardButton(text="❌ Cancel", callback_data="bt_menu"),
                ]]),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.error("cb_bt_apply: %s", e)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bt_apply_confirm_"))
    async def cb_bt_apply_confirm(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Шаг 2: применяет параметры к UserSettings и сохраняет."""
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            result_id = int(cb.data.replace("bt_apply_confirm_", ""))
            r = await db.db_backtest_result_get(result_id)
            if not r:
                await cb.message.answer("❌ Result not found.")
                return

            strategy  = r.get("strategy", "LEVELS")
            bt_params = json.loads(r.get("params", "{}") or "{}")
            user      = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            applied   = []

            if strategy == "SMC":
                # SMC: обновляем smc_cfg JSON
                ucfg = user.get_smc_cfg()
                smc_map = {"min_confirmations": "min_confirmations", "min_rr": "min_rr",
                           "sl_buffer_pct": "sl_buffer_pct", "ob_max_age": "ob_max_age",
                           "fvg_enabled": "fvg_enabled", "choch_enabled": "choch_enabled",
                           "ob_use_breaker": "ob_use_breaker", "swing_lookback": "swing_lookback"}
                for bt_key, smc_attr in smc_map.items():
                    if bt_key in bt_params:
                        typ = _APPLY_TYPES.get(bt_key, type(bt_params[bt_key]))
                        val = typ(bt_params[bt_key])
                        setattr(ucfg, smc_attr, val)
                        applied.append(f"• {_PARAM_LABELS.get(bt_key, bt_key)}: <b>{val}</b>")
                user.set_smc_cfg(ucfg)
            else:
                apply_map = _APPLY_MAP.get(strategy, {})
                for bt_key, user_attr in apply_map.items():
                    if bt_key not in bt_params:
                        continue
                    try:
                        typ = _APPLY_TYPES.get(bt_key, type(bt_params[bt_key]))
                        val = typ(bt_params[bt_key])
                        setattr(user, user_attr, val)
                        applied.append(f"• {_PARAM_LABELS.get(bt_key, bt_key)}: <b>{val}</b>")
                    except Exception as ex:
                        log.warning("bt_apply setattr %s.%s: %s", strategy, bt_key, ex)

            await um.save(user)

            text = "\n".join(applied) if applied else "no changes"
            await safe_edit(
                cb,
                f"✅ <b>Параметры {strategy} обновлены!</b>\n\n{text}\n\n"
                "<i>Сканер применит их в следующем цикле.</i>",
                InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[[
                    InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ К результату", callback_data=f"bt_view_{result_id}"),
                    InlineKeyboardButton(text="🏠 Меню бэктеста", callback_data="bt_menu"),
                ]]),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.error("cb_bt_apply_confirm: %s", e)
            try:
                await cb.message.answer("❌ Ошибка при применении параметров.")
            except Exception:
                pass

    # ── Список очереди ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "bt_queue")
    async def cb_bt_queue(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            rows = await db.db_backtest_queue_list(cb.from_user.id, limit=10)
            if not rows:
                await safe_edit(
                    cb,
                    "⏳ <b>Backtest Queue</b>\n\nNo tasks.",
                    _kb_backtest_menu(),
                )
                return
            lines = ["⏳ <b>Backtest Queue</b>\n"]
            for q in rows:
                lines.append(_format_queue_item(q))
            await safe_edit(
                cb,
                "\n".join(lines),
                _kb_queue_list(rows),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.error("cb_bt_queue: %s", e)

    # ── Отмена задачи из очереди ─────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bt_qcancel_"))
    async def cb_bt_qcancel(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        try:
            await cb.answer()
            queue_id = int(cb.data.split("_")[-1])
            ok = await db.db_backtest_queue_cancel(queue_id, cb.from_user.id)
            if ok:
                await cb.answer("✅ Task cancelled", show_alert=True)
            else:
                await cb.answer("⚠️ Cannot cancel (already running or done)", show_alert=True)
            # Обновляем список
            rows = await db.db_backtest_queue_list(cb.from_user.id, limit=10)
            lines = ["⏳ <b>Backtest Queue</b>\n"]
            for q in rows:
                lines.append(_format_queue_item(q))
            await safe_edit(cb, "\n".join(lines) if rows else "⏳ Queue empty.", _kb_queue_list(rows))
        except Exception as e:
            log.error("cb_bt_qcancel: %s", e)

    # ── Auto-optimize (Bayesian) ────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("btoptstrat_"))
    async def cb_btopt_strat(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Шаг 2: Выбор монеты после выбора стратегии для Auto-Optimize."""

            kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                [
                    InlineKeyboardButton(text="BTC", callback_data="btopt_BTC-USDT-SWAP"),

                    InlineKeyboardButton(text="SOL", callback_data="btopt_SOL-USDT-SWAP"),
                ],
                [
                    InlineKeyboardButton(text="BNB", callback_data="btopt_BNB-USDT-SWAP"),
                    InlineKeyboardButton(text="XRP", callback_data="btopt_XRP-USDT-SWAP"),
                    InlineKeyboardButton(text="DOGE", callback_data="btopt_DOGE-USDT-SWAP"),
                ],
                [InlineKeyboardButton(text="✏️ Ввести вручную", callback_data="btopt_manual")],
                [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Назад", callback_data="bt_optimize")],
            ])
            await safe_edit(cb,
                f"🧠 <b>Auto-Optimize</b> — {strat_label}\n\n"
                f"Периоды: {_periods_str} | TF: 1h | Потоков: {_NP}\n\n"
                "Шаг 2/2: Выбери монету для оптимизации:",
                kb,
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.error("cb_btopt_strat: %s", e)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "btopt_manual")
    async def cb_btopt_manual(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Запрашивает ручной ввод символа для оптимизации."""
        await cb.answer()
        await state.set_state(BacktestState.waiting_optimize_symbol)
        kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="❌ Отмена", callback_data="bt_optimize")],
        ])
        await safe_edit(cb,
            "✏️ <b>Введи символ монеты</b>\n\n"
            "Примеры: <code>ETH</code>, <code>BTC</code>, <code>SOL</code>, <code>PEPE</code>\n\n"
            "Суффикс -USDT-SWAP добавится автоматически.",
            kb,
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("btopt_") & ~F.data.in_({"btopt_manual"}))
    async def cb_btopt_symbol(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Запускает оптимизацию по выбранному символу."""
        await cb.answer()
        symbol = cb.data[len("btopt_"):]
        data = await state.get_data()
        strategy = data.get("strategy", "LEVELS")
        import asyncio as _asyncio
        _asyncio.create_task(_run_optimization_for(cb.message, state, symbol, edit=True, strategy=strategy))

    @dp.message(BacktestState.waiting_optimize_symbol)
    async def msg_btopt_symbol(msg: Message, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Обрабатывает ручной ввод символа для оптимизации."""
        data = await state.get_data()
        strategy = data.get("strategy", "LEVELS")
        await state.clear()
        raw = msg.text.strip().upper()
        # Нормализуем: "ETH" → "ETH-USDT-SWAP", "ETH-USDT-SWAP" → без изменений
        if not raw.endswith("-USDT-SWAP"):
            symbol = f"{raw}-USDT-SWAP"
        else:
            symbol = raw
        import asyncio as _asyncio
        _asyncio.create_task(_run_optimization_for(msg, state, symbol, edit=False, strategy=strategy))

    async def _run_optimization_for(
        message,
        state: FSMContext,
        symbol: str,
        edit: bool,
        strategy: str = "LEVELS",
    ) -> None:
        """Запускает Bayesian-оптимизацию для заданного символа."""
        import asyncio as _asyncio
        from bayesian_optimizer import (
            run_optimization, format_top_results, save_results_to_db,
            MULTI_PERIODS as _MP, FIXED_PARAMS,
        )
        _periods_str = "/".join(f"{p}d" for p in _MP)
        _label = symbol.replace("-USDT-SWAP", "")
        strat_label = _STRAT_LABELS.get(strategy, strategy)

        _text_start = (
            f"🧠 <b>Auto-Optimize</b> — {_label} | {strat_label}\n\n"
            f"Периоды: {_periods_str} | TF: 1h\n\n"
            f"⏳ <i>Загружаем данные с OKX…</i>"
        )
        if edit:
            try:
                status_msg = await message.edit_text(_text_start, parse_mode="HTML")
            except Exception:
                status_msg = await message.answer(_text_start, parse_mode="HTML")
        else:
            status_msg = await message.answer(_text_start, parse_mode="HTML")

        try:
            async def _progress(trial_id, total, best):
                try:
                    if trial_id == 0:
                        await status_msg.edit_text(
                            f"🧠 <b>Auto-Optimize</b> — {_label} | {strat_label}\n\n"
                            f"✅ Данные загружены | ⏳ Запускаем {total} trials…",
                            parse_mode="HTML",
                        )
                    else:
                        pct = int(trial_id / total * 100)
                        bar = "█" * (pct // 10) + "░" * (10 - pct // 10)
                        await status_msg.edit_text(
                            f"🧠 <b>Auto-Optimize</b> — {_label} | {strat_label} [{bar}] {pct}%\n\n"
                            f"Trial {trial_id}/{total} | Best score: <b>{best:.1f}</b>",
                            parse_mode="HTML",
                        )
                except Exception:
                    pass

            results = await _asyncio.wait_for(
                run_optimization(
                    symbol=symbol,
                    timeframe="1h",
                    n_trials=30,
                    progress_cb=_progress,
                    vary_period=True,
                    strategy=strategy,
                ),
                timeout=2700,  # 45 минут максимум
            )
            await save_results_to_db(results)
            if results:
                text = format_top_results(results, top_n=5)
                if len(text) > 3800:
                    text = text[:3750] + "\n<i>...truncated</i>"

                # Сохраняем лучший результат → кнопка Apply использует result_id
                best = results[0]
                best_full_params = dict(FIXED_PARAMS)
                best_full_params.update(best.params)
                try:
                    _uid = message.chat.id
                except Exception:
                    _uid = 0
                result_id = await db.db_backtest_result_save(
                    user_id=_uid,
                    symbol=symbol,
                    strategy=strategy,
                    timeframe="1h",
                    days=max(_MP),
                    params=json.dumps(best_full_params),
                    total_trades=best.total_trades,
                    win_rate=best.win_rate,
                    avg_rr=best.total_r,
                    profit_factor=best.profit_factor,
                    max_drawdown=best.max_drawdown,
                    total_rr=best.total_r,
                    summary_json="[]",
                )

                # Сохраняем ВСЕ топ результаты (до 5) → кнопка Apply для каждого
                kb_rows = []
                for i, res in enumerate(results[:5]):
                    res_params = dict(FIXED_PARAMS)
                    res_params.update(res.params)
                    if i == 0:
                        rid = result_id  # уже сохранён выше
                    else:
                        rid = await db.db_backtest_result_save(
                            user_id=_uid,
                            symbol=symbol,
                            strategy=strategy,
                            timeframe="1h",
                            days=max(_MP),
                            params=json.dumps(res_params),
                            total_trades=res.total_trades,
                            win_rate=res.win_rate,
                            avg_rr=res.total_r,
                            profit_factor=res.profit_factor,
                            max_drawdown=res.max_drawdown,
                            total_rr=res.total_r,
                            summary_json="[]",
                        )
                    if rid:
                        wr_pct = f"{res.win_rate*100:.0f}%" if res.win_rate <= 1 else f"{res.win_rate:.0f}%"
                        kb_rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(
                            text=f"✅ #{i+1} — PF:{res.profit_factor:.1f} WR:{wr_pct} {res.total_trades}tr",
                            callback_data=f"bt_apply_{rid}",
                        )])
                kb_rows.append([InlineKeyboardButton(
                    text="🏠 Меню бэктеста", callback_data="bt_menu",
                )])
                kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=kb_rows)

                try:
                    await status_msg.edit_text(text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb)
                except Exception:
                    try:
                        await message.answer(text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb)
                    except Exception:
                        pass
            else:
                try:
                    await status_msg.edit_text(
                        "❌ Не найдено подходящих параметров.\n"
                        "Попробуй другую монету или запусти позже.",
                        parse_mode="HTML",
                        reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🏠 Меню бэктеста", callback_data="bt_menu")],
                        ]),
                    )
                except Exception:
                    pass
        except _asyncio.TimeoutError:
            log.error("bt_optimize %s: timeout after 30 minutes", symbol)
            await status_msg.edit_text(
                f"❌ <b>Timeout</b> — оптимизация {_label} заняла более 30 минут.\n\n"
                "Попробуй другую монету или запусти позже.",
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.error("bt_optimize %s: %s", symbol, e, exc_info=True)
            await message.answer(f"❌ Optimization error ({_label}): {e}")

    # ── Target Win Rate ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "bt_target_wr")
    async def cb_bt_target_wr(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Шаг 1: Выбор стратегии для Target WR."""
        await cb.answer()
        _u = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        if not _u.can("target_wr"):
            await cb.answer("🔒 Target Win Rate доступен в тарифе Elite", show_alert=True); return
        await state.clear()
        kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="📊 Levels", callback_data="btwr_strat_LEVELS"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="🧩 SMC", callback_data="btwr_strat_SMC"),
            ],
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="📐 Gerchik", callback_data="btwr_strat_GERCHIK"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="⚡ Scalping", callback_data="btwr_strat_SCALPING"),
            ],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Назад", callback_data="bt_menu")],
        ])
        await safe_edit(cb,
            "🎯 <b>Target Win Rate</b>\n\n"
            "Оптимизатор подберёт параметры стратегии\n"
            "для достижения указанного Win Rate.\n\n"
            "⚠️ Высокий WR (>85%) обычно означает\n"
            "низкий R:R — оптимизатор найдёт баланс.\n\n"
            "Шаг 1/3: Выбери стратегию:",
            kb,
        )

    _STRAT_LABELS = {
        "LEVELS": "📊 Levels", "SMC": "🧩 SMC",
        "GERCHIK": "📐 Gerchik", "SCALPING": "⚡ Scalping",
    }

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("btwr_strat_"))
    async def cb_btwr_strat(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Шаг 2: Выбор целевого WR для выбранной стратегии."""
        await cb.answer()
        strategy = cb.data.replace("btwr_strat_", "")
        await state.update_data(strategy=strategy)
        strat_label = _STRAT_LABELS.get(strategy, strategy)
        kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="70%", callback_data="btwr_70"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="75%", callback_data="btwr_75"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="80%", callback_data="btwr_80"),
            ],
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="83%", callback_data="btwr_83"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="85%", callback_data="btwr_85"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="90%", callback_data="btwr_90"),
            ],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Назад", callback_data="bt_target_wr")],
        ])
        await safe_edit(cb,
            f"🎯 <b>Target Win Rate</b> — {strat_label}\n\n"
            "Шаг 2/3: Выбери целевой Win Rate:",
            kb,
        )

    @dp.callback_query(
        F.data.startswith("btwr_")
        & ~F.data.startswith("btwr_apply_")
        & ~F.data.startswith("btwr_strat_")
    )
    async def cb_btwr_select(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Шаг 3: Выбор монеты для Target WR оптимизации."""
        await cb.answer()
        wr_pct = int(cb.data.replace("btwr_", ""))
        target_wr = wr_pct / 100.0
        await state.update_data(target_wr=target_wr)
        data = await state.get_data()
        strategy = data.get("strategy", "LEVELS")
        strat_label = _STRAT_LABELS.get(strategy, strategy)

        kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="BTC", callback_data="btwrs_BTC-USDT-SWAP"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="ETH", callback_data="btwrs_ETH-USDT-SWAP"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="SOL", callback_data="btwrs_SOL-USDT-SWAP"),
            ],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Назад", callback_data=f"btwr_strat_{strategy}")],
        ])
        await safe_edit(cb,
            f"🎯 Target: <b>{wr_pct}% Win Rate</b> — {strat_label}\n\n"
            "Шаг 3/3: Выбери монету для оптимизации:",
            kb,
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("btwrs_"))
    async def cb_btwrs_run(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Запускает фоновую Target WR оптимизацию."""
        await cb.answer()
        symbol = cb.data.replace("btwrs_", "")
        data = await state.get_data()
        target_wr = data.get("target_wr", 0.83)
        strategy = data.get("strategy", "LEVELS")
        await state.clear()

        _label = symbol.replace("-USDT-SWAP", "")
        wr_pct = int(target_wr * 100)
        strat_label = _STRAT_LABELS.get(strategy, strategy)

        status_msg = await safe_edit(cb,
            f"🎯 <b>Target WR {wr_pct}%</b> — {_label} | {strat_label}\n\n"
            "⏳ Загружаем данные...",
        )
        if status_msg is None:
            status_msg = cb.message

        async def _run_target_bg():
            import asyncio as _a
            from bayesian_optimizer import (
                run_target_wr_optimization, format_top_results, save_results_to_db,
            )
            try:
                async def _prog(trial_id, total, best):
                    try:
                        pct = int(trial_id / total * 100)
                        bar = "█" * (pct // 10) + "░" * (10 - pct // 10)
                        await bot.edit_message_text(
                            f"🎯 Target WR {wr_pct}% — {_label} | {strat_label} [{bar}] {pct}%\n\n"
                            f"Trial {trial_id}/{total} | Best: {best:.2f}",
                            chat_id=cb.from_user.id,
                            message_id=status_msg.message_id,
                            parse_mode="HTML",
                        )
                    except Exception:
                        pass

                results = await _a.wait_for(
                    run_target_wr_optimization(
                        symbol=symbol, target_wr=target_wr,
                        n_trials=60, progress_cb=_prog, strategy=strategy,
                    ),
                    timeout=2400,
                )
                await save_results_to_db(results)

                if results:
                    best = results[0]
                    _wr_real = f"{best.win_rate*100:.1f}%"
                    text = (
                        f"🎯 <b>Target WR {wr_pct}% — Результат</b>\n\n"
                        f"📌 {_label} | {strat_label} | 1h\n\n"
                        f"🏆 <b>Лучший результат:</b>\n"
                        f"  Win Rate: <b>{_wr_real}</b> (цель: {wr_pct}%)\n"
                        f"  PF: <b>{best.profit_factor:.2f}</b>\n"
                        f"  Total R: <b>{best.total_r:+.1f}R</b>\n"
                        f"  Max DD: <b>{best.max_drawdown:.1f}R</b>\n"
                        f"  Trades: <b>{best.total_trades}</b>\n\n"
                    )
                    text += "⚙️ <b>Параметры:</b>\n"
                    for k, v in sorted(best.params.items()):
                        if k in _PARAM_LABELS:
                            text += f"  {_PARAM_LABELS.get(k, k)}: <b>{v}</b>\n"

                    kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                        [InlineKeyboardButton(
                            text="✅ Применить эти параметры",
                            callback_data=f"btwr_apply_{best.trial_id}_{symbol}",
                        )],
                        [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Меню бэктеста", callback_data="bt_menu")],
                    ])
                    if len(text) > 4000:
                        text = text[:3950] + "\n<i>...truncated</i>"
                    await bot.edit_message_text(
                        text, chat_id=cb.from_user.id,
                        message_id=status_msg.message_id,
                        parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb,
                    )
                else:
                    await bot.edit_message_text(
                        f"❌ Не найдено параметров для WR {wr_pct}%.\n"
                        "Попробуй снизить целевой WR или другую монету.",
                        chat_id=cb.from_user.id,
                        message_id=status_msg.message_id,
                        parse_mode="HTML",
                    )
            except Exception as e:
                log.error("Target WR %s: %s", symbol, e, exc_info=True)
                try:
                    await bot.edit_message_text(
                        f"❌ Ошибка: {str(e)[:200]}",
                        chat_id=cb.from_user.id,
                        message_id=status_msg.message_id,
                    )
                except Exception:
                    pass

        import asyncio as _asyncio
        _asyncio.create_task(_run_target_bg())

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("btwr_apply_"))
    async def cb_btwr_apply(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext) -> None:
        """Применяет параметры найденные Target WR оптимизацией."""
        await cb.answer()
        parts = cb.data.replace("btwr_apply_", "").split("_", 1)
        trial_id = int(parts[0])
        symbol = parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else ""

        from bayesian_optimizer import load_results_from_db
        all_results = await load_results_from_db()
        target_result = None
        for r in all_results:
            if r.trial_id == trial_id:
                target_result = r
                break

        if not target_result:
            await safe_edit(cb, "❌ Результат не найден в базе.")
            return

        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        strategy = "LEVELS"
        apply_map = _APPLY_MAP.get(strategy, {})
        applied = []
        for bt_key, user_attr in apply_map.items():
            if bt_key in target_result.params:
                try:
                    val = target_result.params[bt_key]
                    typ = _APPLY_TYPES.get(bt_key, type(val))
                    setattr(user, user_attr, typ(val))
                    applied.append(f"• {_PARAM_LABELS.get(bt_key, bt_key)}: <b>{val}</b>")
                except Exception:
                    pass
        await um.save(user)

        text = "\n".join(applied) if applied else "Нет изменений"
        await safe_edit(cb,
            f"✅ <b>Параметры LEVELS обновлены!</b>\n\n"
            f"🎯 Win Rate: <b>{target_result.win_rate*100:.1f}%</b>\n\n"
            f"{text}\n\n"
            "<i>Сканер применит параметры в следующем цикле.</i>",
            InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🏠 Меню бэктеста", callback_data="bt_menu")],
            ]),
        )

FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/gerchik.py
