"""handlers/gerchik.py — Gerchik strategy handlers."""
from __future__ import annotations
import html as _html  # SECURITY-FIX
import logging
import re

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext
from aiogram.types import CallbackQuery, InlineKeyboardMarkup, InlineKeyboardButton  # FLOOD-FIX

from handlers._common import safe_edit
from i18n import t as _t

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers.gerchik")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config, **kwargs):

    def _gerchik_mode_text(user) -> str:
        lang   = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        active = getattr(user, "gerchik_active", False)
        status = _t("gerchik_scanner_on", lang) if active else _t("gerchik_scanner_off", lang)
        return (
            f"🎯 <b>{_t('gerchik_menu_title', lang).strip('─ ')}</b>\n\n"
            + _t("gerchik_mode_body", lang) + "\n\n"
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
            f"{_t('gerchik_status_label', lang)}: <b>{status}</b>"
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "gerchik_menu")
    async def cb_gerchik_menu(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        """Открывает экран стратегии Герчика (из главного меню если стратегия уже GERCHIK)."""
        await state.clear()
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, _gerchik_mode_text(user), kb_gerchik_menu(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_gerchik")
    async def cb_toggle_gerchik(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Включает / выключает сканер Герчика."""
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("gerchik_no_access", lang), show_alert=True)
            return

        user.gerchik_active = not getattr(user, "gerchik_active", False)
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(_t("gerchik_on", lang) if user.gerchik_active else _t("gerchik_off", lang))

        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_menu
        log.info(
            "Герчик %s uid=%s",
            "включён" if user.gerchik_active else "выключен",
            user.user_id,
        )
        await safe_edit(cb, _gerchik_mode_text(user), kb_gerchik_menu(user))

    # ── Параметр: сила пивотов ────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "gerchik_set_pivot")
    async def cb_gerchik_set_pivot(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_set_pivot
        cur = getattr(user, "gerchik_pivot", 5)
        await safe_edit(cb, "⭐ <b>Мин. сила уровня (Герчик)</b>\n\nВыбери минимальное количество баллов для уровня:", kb_gerchik_set_pivot(cur))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^gerchik_pivot_(\d+)$"))
    async def cb_gerchik_pivot_val(cb: CallbackQuery):
        val = int(cb.data.split("_")[-1])
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.gerchik_pivot = val
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(_t("gerchik_pivot_set", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"), val=val))
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, _gerchik_mode_text(user), kb_gerchik_menu(user))

    # ── Параметр: мин. R:R ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "gerchik_set_rr")
    async def cb_gerchik_set_rr(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_set_rr
        cur = getattr(user, "gerchik_min_rr", 3.0)
        await safe_edit(cb, "📐 <b>Мин. R:R (Герчик)</b>\n\nМинимальное соотношение риск:прибыль (запас хода до TP):", kb_gerchik_set_rr(cur))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^gerchik_rr_[\d.]+$"))
    async def cb_gerchik_rr_val(cb: CallbackQuery):
        val = float(cb.data.split("_")[-1])
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.gerchik_min_rr = val
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(_t("gerchik_rr_set", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"), val=f"{val:.0f}"))
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, _gerchik_mode_text(user), kb_gerchik_menu(user))

    # ── Параметр: цели TP1 / TP2 ─────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "gerchik_set_tp")
    async def cb_gerchik_set_tp(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_set_tp
        tp1 = getattr(user, "gerchik_tp1_rr", 3.0)
        tp2 = getattr(user, "gerchik_tp2_rr", 4.0)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🎯 <b>Цели TP1 / TP2 (Герчик)</b>\n\nВыбери пару целей Take Profit:\n<i>55% позиции закрывается на TP1, 45% — на TP2</i>", kb_gerchik_set_tp(tp1, tp2))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^gerchik_tp_[\d.]+_[\d.]+$"))
    async def cb_gerchik_tp_val(cb: CallbackQuery):
        parts = cb.data.split("_")
        tp1 = float(parts[-2])
        tp2 = float(parts[-1])
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.gerchik_tp1_rr = tp1
        user.gerchik_tp2_rr = tp2
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(f"✅ TP1: {tp1:.0f}R  |  TP2: {tp2:.0f}R")
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, _gerchik_mode_text(user), kb_gerchik_menu(user))

    # ── Параметр: глубина поиска уровней ─────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "gerchik_set_lookback")
    async def cb_gerchik_set_lookback(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_set_lookback
        cur = getattr(user, "gerchik_lookback", 50)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🔬 <b>Глубина поиска уровней (Герчик)</b>\n\nСколько дневных баров назад бот ищет уровни поддержки и сопротивления:", kb_gerchik_set_lookback(cur))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^gerchik_lookback_(\d+)$"))
    async def cb_gerchik_lookback_val(cb: CallbackQuery):
        val = int(cb.data.split("_")[-1])
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.gerchik_lookback = val
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(_t("gerchik_lookback_set", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"), val=val))
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, _gerchik_mode_text(user), kb_gerchik_menu(user))

    # ── Параметр: люфт у уровня ──────────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "gerchik_set_lft")
    async def cb_gerchik_set_lft(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_set_lft
        cur = getattr(user, "gerchik_lft_pct", 0.20)
        await safe_edit(cb, "〰️ <b>Люфт у уровня (Герчик)</b>\n\nДопустимое отклонение цены от уровня в % для входа в позицию:", kb_gerchik_set_lft(cur))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^gerchik_lft_[\d.]+$"))
    async def cb_gerchik_lft_val(cb: CallbackQuery):
        val = float(cb.data.split("_")[-1])
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.gerchik_lft_pct = val
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(_t("gerchik_lft_set", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"), val=f"{val:.0%}"))
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, _gerchik_mode_text(user), kb_gerchik_menu(user))

    # ── Параметр: размер паранормального бара ────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "gerchik_set_paranormal")
    async def cb_gerchik_set_paranormal(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_set_paranormal
        cur = float(getattr(user, "gerchik_paranormal_mult", 2.0) or 2.0)
        await safe_edit(
            cb,
            "🔥 <b>Паранормальный бар (Герчик)</b>\n\n"
            "Свеча, чей размер (High − Low) превышает ATR в N раз.\n"
            "Такие бары часто сигнализируют о начале сильного тренда.\n\n"
            "<i>Чем меньше множитель — тем больше сигналов, но и шума.</i>",
            kb_gerchik_set_paranormal(cur),
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^gerchik_paranormal_[\d.]+$"))
    async def cb_gerchik_paranormal_val(cb: CallbackQuery):
        val = float(cb.data.replace("gerchik_paranormal_", ""))
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.gerchik_paranormal_mult = val
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(f"✅ Паранормальный бар: {val:g}× ATR")
        from keyboards import kb_gerchik_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, _gerchik_mode_text(user), kb_gerchik_menu(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("gerchik_detail_"))  # FLOOD-FIX: detail callback
    async def cb_gerchik_detail(cb: CallbackQuery):
        short_id = cb.data.replace("gerchik_detail_", "")
        try:
            from gerchik_runner import _detail_cache, _limit_level_text, _paranormal_text, _tv_url
        except ImportError:
            await cb.answer("❌ Модуль недоступен", show_alert=True)
            return

        detail = _detail_cache.get(short_id)
        if not detail:
            await cb.answer("⏳ Данные устарели, дождись следующего скана", show_alert=True)
            return

        symbol = detail["symbol"]
        if detail["type"] == "limit":
            text = _limit_level_text(symbol, detail["data"])
        elif detail["type"] == "paranormal":
            text = _paranormal_text(symbol, detail["data"])
        else:
            await cb.answer("❌"); return

        try:
            await cb.message.answer(
                text, parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[[
                    InlineKeyboardButton(text="📊 Chart", url=_tv_url(symbol)),
                ]]),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            await cb.answer(f"Ошибка: {str(e)[:50]}", show_alert=True)
            return
        await cb.answer()


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/main.py
================================================================================
"""handlers/main.py — /start, /menu, onboarding, /stop, /stats, /subscribe, /strategy handlers."""
from __future__ import annotations
import html as _html  # SECURITY-FIX
import asyncio
import logging

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.filters import Command
from aiogram.types import Message, CallbackQuery, InlineKeyboardMarkup, InlineKeyboardButton
from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext

import database as db
from keyboards import (
    kb_main, kb_subscribe, kb_back, kb_reply_main, _back,
    kb_smc_mode_long, kb_smc_mode_short, kb_smc_mode_both,
    kb_mode_long, kb_mode_short, kb_mode_both,
    kb_scalping_menu,
    help_text, kb_help,
)
from handlers._common import (
    safe_edit, _fire_task,
    main_text, cfg_text, settings_text, stats_text,
    pricing_text, access_denied_text,
    _strategy_text, _kb_strategy_select, _kb_strategy_change,
    _bot_username,
)

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers.main")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config, **kwargs):

    from fetcher import OKXFetcher as _OKXFetcher
    _fetcher_for_smc = _OKXFetcher()

    async def _on_startup_inner():
        import handlers._common as _c
        try:
            me = await bot.get_me()
            _c._bot_username = me.username or ""
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("Не удалось получить username бота: %s", e)

    dp.startup.register(_on_startup_inner)

    @dp.message(Command("start"))
    async def cmd_start(msg: Message):
        user = await um.get_or_create(
            msg.from_user.id,
            msg.from_user.username or "",
            language_code=msg.from_user.language_code or "",
        )
        # Обрабатываем реферальную ссылку: /start ref_12345
        args = msg.text.split(maxsplit=1)
        payload = args[1].strip() if len(args) > 1 else ""
        if payload.startswith("ref_"):
            try:
                referrer_id = int(payload[4:])
                if referrer_id != msg.from_user.id:
                    await db.db_ref_set(msg.from_user.id, referrer_id)
            except (ValueError, Exception):
                pass
        # ── Онбординг для новых пользователей ──
        if not getattr(user, "onboarding_done", True):
            # Новый пользователь — показываем онбординг (даже без подписки)
            from i18n import t as _t
            ulang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
            welcome = _t("onboard_welcome", ulang)
            await msg.answer(
                welcome,
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("onboard_levels", ulang), callback_data="onboard_strategy_levels")],
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("onboard_smc", ulang),    callback_data="onboard_strategy_smc")],
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("onboard_gerchik", ulang), callback_data="onboard_strategy_gerchik")],
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("onboard_scalping", ulang), callback_data="onboard_strategy_scalping")],
                ])
            )
            return
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await msg.answer(
                pricing_text(config),
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=kb_subscribe(config),
            )
            return
        # Если стратегия не выбрана — предлагаем выбрать
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if not user.strategy:
            await msg.answer(_strategy_text(user.strategy, lang), parse_mode="HTML",
                             reply_markup=_kb_strategy_select(lang))
            return
        trend = scanner.get_trend()
        await msg.answer("✅", reply_markup=kb_reply_main(lang))
        await msg.answer(main_text(user, trend), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("onboard_strategy_"))
    async def onboard_strategy(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        strategy_map = {
            "onboard_strategy_levels":   "LEVELS",
            "onboard_strategy_smc":      "SMC",
            "onboard_strategy_gerchik":  "GERCHIK",
            "onboard_strategy_scalping": "SCALPING",
        }
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.strategy = strategy_map.get(cb.data, "LEVELS")
        await um.save(user)
        # Для скальпинга — отдельные таймфреймы
        from i18n import t as _t
        ulang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if user.strategy == "SCALPING":
            step2_scalp = _t("onboard_scalp_desc", ulang)
            rec = _t("onboard_recommended", ulang)
            await cb.message.edit_text(
                step2_scalp,
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"⚡ 1 min",              callback_data="onboard_tf_1m")],
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"🕐 5 min ({rec})", callback_data="onboard_tf_5m")],
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"📊 15 min",               callback_data="onboard_tf_15m")],
                ])
            )
        else:
            step2 = _t("onboard_tf_desc", ulang)
            rec = _t("onboard_recommended", ulang)
            await cb.message.edit_text(
                step2,
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text="⚡ 15 min",                callback_data="onboard_tf_15m")],
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"🕐 1h ({rec})",   callback_data="onboard_tf_1h")],
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📊 4h",                  callback_data="onboard_tf_4h")],
                    [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📅 1D",                  callback_data="onboard_tf_1d")],
                ])
            )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("onboard_tf_"))
    async def onboard_tf(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        tf_map = {
            "onboard_tf_1m": "1m", "onboard_tf_5m": "5m",
            "onboard_tf_15m": "15m", "onboard_tf_1h": "1h",
            "onboard_tf_4h": "4h", "onboard_tf_1d": "1d",
        }
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        tf = tf_map.get(cb.data, "1h")
        user.timeframe = tf; user.long_tf = tf; user.short_tf = tf
        # Для скальпинга сохраняем таймфрейм в scalping_tf
        if getattr(user, "strategy", "") == "SCALPING":
            user.scalping_tf = tf
        await um.save(user)
        _olang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        from i18n import t as _t
        await cb.message.edit_text(
            _t("onboard_step3_title", _olang) + "\n\n" + _t("onboard_step3_body", _olang),
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("onboard_start_btn",    _olang), callback_data="onboard_start")],
                [InlineKeyboardButton(text=_t("onboard_settings_btn", _olang), callback_data="menu_settings")],
            ])
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "onboard_start")
    async def onboard_start(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.onboarding_done = True
        if getattr(user, "strategy", "LEVELS") == "SCALPING":
            user.scalping_active = True   # для скальпинга — включаем скальп-сканер
        else:
            user.long_active = True       # для остальных — стандартный лонг-сканер
        await um.save(user)
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            from i18n import t as _t
            _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
            await cb.message.edit_text(
                _t("settings_saved", _lang) + "\n\n" + _t("sub_required", _lang),
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=kb_subscribe(config),
            )
            return
        trend = scanner.get_trend()
        try:
            await cb.message.delete()
        except Exception:
            pass
        _slang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        from i18n import t as _t
        await cb.message.answer("✅", reply_markup=kb_reply_main(_slang))
        await cb.message.answer(
            _t("scanner_started", _slang) + main_text(user, trend),
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_main(user),
        )

    @dp.message(Command("menu"))
    async def cmd_menu(msg: Message):
        user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id, msg.from_user.username or "")
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await msg.answer(pricing_text(config), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_subscribe(config))
            return
        trend = scanner.get_trend()
        await msg.answer("⬇️", reply_markup=kb_reply_main(getattr(user, "lang", "ru")))
        await msg.answer(main_text(user, trend), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_main(user))

    # Поддерживаем оба языка — RU и EN одновременно
    _REPLY_NAV_MAP = {
        "🏠 Меню": "menu",  "🏠 Menu": "menu",
        "📈 Лонг": "long",  "📈 Long": "long",
        "📉 Шорт": "short", "📉 Short": "short",
        "⚡ Оба":  "both",  "⚡ Both": "both",
        "📊 Статистика": "stats", "📊 Statistics": "stats",
        "🔍 Анализ":     "analyze", "🔍 Analyze": "analyze",
        "❓ Справка":    "help",    "❓ Help": "help",
    }
    _REPLY_NAV_TEXTS = set(_REPLY_NAV_MAP.keys())

    @dp.message(F.text.in_(_REPLY_NAV_TEXTS))
    async def reply_nav(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        user   = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id, msg.from_user.username or "")
        trend  = scanner.get_trend()
        action = _REPLY_NAV_MAP.get(msg.text, "")

        if action == "menu":
            has, reason = user.check_access()
            if not has:
                await msg.answer(pricing_text(config), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_subscribe(config))
                return
            await msg.answer(main_text(user, trend), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_main(user))

        elif action in ("long", "short", "both"):
            has, reason = user.check_access()
            if not has:
                await msg.answer(pricing_text(config), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_subscribe(config)); return
            strategy = getattr(user, "strategy", "LEVELS")
            _nlang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
            from i18n import t as _t
            if strategy == "SCALPING":
                await msg.answer(_t("scalping_settings_title", _nlang), parse_mode="HTML",
                                 reply_markup=kb_scalping_menu(user, back_cb="back_main"))
            elif strategy == "SMC":
                if action == "long":
                    await msg.answer(_t("smc_settings_long",  _nlang), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_smc_mode_long(user))
                elif action == "short":
                    await msg.answer(_t("smc_settings_short", _nlang), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_smc_mode_short(user))
                else:
                    await msg.answer(_t("smc_settings_both",  _nlang), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_smc_mode_both(user))
            else:
                if action == "long":
                    cfg = user.get_long_cfg()
                    await msg.answer(cfg_text(cfg, _t("scanner_long_title",  _nlang)), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_mode_long(user))
                elif action == "short":
                    cfg = user.get_short_cfg()
                    await msg.answer(cfg_text(cfg, _t("scanner_short_title", _nlang)), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_mode_short(user))
                else:
                    cfg = user.get_long_cfg()
                    await msg.answer(cfg_text(cfg, _t("scanner_both_title",  _nlang)), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_mode_both(user))

        elif action == "stats":
            stats = await db.db_get_user_stats(user.user_id)
            await msg.answer(stats_text(user, stats), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_back())

        elif action == "analyze":
            await msg.answer(main_text(user, trend), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_main(user))

        elif action == "help":
            await msg.answer(help_text(), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_help())

    @dp.message(Command("stop"))
    async def cmd_stop(msg: Message):
        user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id, msg.from_user.username or "")
        user.active = False
        user.long_active = False
        user.short_active = False
        await um.save(user)
        from i18n import t as _t
        await msg.answer(_t("stop_cmd_msg", getattr(user, "lang", "ru")))

    @dp.message(Command("stats"))
    async def cmd_stats(msg: Message):
        user  = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id, msg.from_user.username or "")
        stats = await db.db_get_user_stats(user.user_id)
        await msg.answer(stats_text(user, stats), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_back())

    @dp.message(Command("subscribe"))
    async def cmd_subscribe(msg: Message):
        NL = "\n"
        await msg.answer(
            pricing_text(config) + NL + NL +
            "🆔 Твой Telegram ID: <code>" + str(msg.from_user.id) + "</code>",
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_subscribe(config),
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "my_plan")
    async def my_plan(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from config import PLAN_FEATURES, Config
        plan = user.sub_plan or "beginner"
        f    = PLAN_FEATURES.get(plan, PLAN_FEATURES["beginner"])
        strats   = ", ".join(sorted(f["strategies"]))
        at_st    = "✅ Без лимитов" if f["auto_trade"] else "❌"
        analyze  = "∞" if f["analyze_per_day"] > 100 else str(f["analyze_per_day"]) + "/день"
        backtest = ("∞" if f["backtest_per_day"] > 100
                    else (str(f["backtest_per_day"]) + "/день" if f["backtest_per_day"] > 0 else "❌"))
        text = (
            f"📋 <b>Ваш тариф: {user.plan_label}</b>\n\n"
            f"📊 Стратегии: <b>{strats}</b>\n"
            f"📈 Направления: <b>{'LONG + SHORT' if f['both_directions'] else 'LONG или SHORT'}</b>\n"
            f"💹 Авто-трейд: <b>{at_st}</b>\n"
            f"🔍 Анализ: <b>{analyze}</b>\n"
            f"🧪 Бэктест: <b>{backtest}</b>\n"
            f"🧠 Оптимизатор: <b>{'✅' if f['optimizer'] else '❌'}</b>\n"
            f"📈 Polymarket: <b>{'✅' if f['polymarket'] else '❌'}</b>\n"
            f"🔔 P&D алерты: <b>{'✅' if f['pump_dump_alerts'] else '❌'}</b>\n\n"
            f"📅 Подписка: <b>{user.time_left_str()}</b>\n\n"
        )
        if plan != "elite":
            text += (
                "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
                f"Для апгрейда свяжитесь с {Config.ADMIN_CONTACT}\n\n"
                "🟢 Beginner → наблюдение\n"
                "🔵 Pro → авто-трейд без лимитов\n"
                "🟡 Elite → все функции"
            )
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📚 CHM Academy", url="https://chmup.top/academy/")],
            _back("back_main"),
        ]))

    @dp.message(Command("strategy"))
    async def cmd_strategy(msg: Message):
        user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id, msg.from_user.username or "")
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await msg.answer(access_denied_text(reason), parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_subscribe(config))
            return
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await msg.answer(_strategy_text(user.strategy, lang), parse_mode="HTML",
                         reply_markup=_kb_strategy_change(user.strategy, lang))


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/marketplace.py
================================================================================
"""handlers/marketplace.py — Маркетплейс пресетов стратегий с оплатой TON."""
from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
import html as _html
import logging

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext
from aiogram.fsm.state import State, StatesGroup
from aiogram.types import (
    CallbackQuery, InlineKeyboardButton, InlineKeyboardMarkup, Message,
)

import database as db
from handlers._common import safe_edit
from keyboards import _btn, _noop, _back

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Marketplace")


class PresetPublishState(StatesGroup):
    strategy    = State()
    name        = State()
    description = State()
    price       = State()


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, config) -> None:
    from keyboards import kb_fsm_cancel

    # ── Главное меню маркетплейса ─────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "marketplace_menu")
    async def cb_mp_menu(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "🏪 <b>Маркетплейс пресетов</b>\n\nВыбери стратегию:", _kb_main())

    def _kb_main() -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _noop("── 🏪 Маркетплейс пресетов ──"),
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📐 LEVELS", callback_data="mp_list_LEVELS_0"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="💎 GERCHIK", callback_data="mp_list_GERCHIK_0")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="⚡ SCALPING", callback_data="mp_list_SCALPING_0"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="🧠 SMC", callback_data="mp_list_SMC_0")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📦 Мои пресеты", callback_data="mp_my"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="🛒 Мои покупки", callback_data="mp_purchased")],
            _back("back_main"),
        ])

    # ── Список пресетов ───────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^mp_list_(\w+)_(\d+)$"))
    async def cb_mp_list(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        import re
        m = re.match(r"^mp_list_(\w+)_(\d+)$", cb.data)
        strategy, page = m.group(1), int(m.group(2))
        presets = await db.db_list_presets(strategy=strategy, status="active", limit=100)
        if not presets:
            await safe_edit(cb, f"🏪 <b>{strategy}</b>\n\nПресетов пока нет. Будь первым! 🚀",
                            InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                                _btn(f"📦 Опубликовать мой {strategy}", f"mp_publish_{strategy}"),
                                _back("marketplace_menu"),
                            ]))
            return
        PAGE = 5
        shown = presets[page*PAGE:(page+1)*PAGE]
        rows = [_noop(f"── 🏪 {strategy} ({len(presets)}) ──")]
        for p in shown:
            wr = p.get("bt_win_rate", 0)
            price = p.get("price_ton", 0)
            pl = f"{price:.1f}T" if price > 0 else "FREE"
            v = "✅" if p.get("bt_verified") else "⏳"
            rows.append(_btn(f"{v} WR:{wr:.0f}% | {p['name'][:20]} | {pl}", f"mp_view_{p['id']}"))
        nav = []
        if page > 0:
            nav.append(InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️", callback_data=f"mp_list_{strategy}_{page-1}"))
        total_pages = max(1, (len(presets)-1)//PAGE+1)
        nav.append(InlineKeyboardButton(text=f"{page+1}/{total_pages}", callback_data="noop"))
        if (page+1)*PAGE < len(presets):
            nav.append(InlineKeyboardButton(text="▶️", callback_data=f"mp_list_{strategy}_{page+1}"))
        rows.append(nav)
        rows.append(_btn(f"📦 Опубликовать мой {strategy}", f"mp_publish_{strategy}"))
        rows.append(_back("marketplace_menu"))
        await safe_edit(cb, f"🏪 <b>{strategy} пресеты</b>", InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows))

    # ── Детали пресета ────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^mp_view_(\d+)$"))
    async def cb_mp_view(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        import re
        pid = int(re.match(r"^mp_view_(\d+)$", cb.data).group(1))
        preset = await db.db_get_preset(pid)
        if not preset:
            await cb.answer("❌ Пресет не найден", show_alert=True); return
        uid = cb.from_user.id
        purchased = await db.db_has_purchased(uid, pid)
        is_author = preset["author_id"] == uid
        is_free = preset.get("price_ton", 0) <= 0
        from preset_service import format_preset_card
        text = format_preset_card(preset, purchased)
        rows = []
        if purchased or is_free or is_author:
            rows.append(_btn("✅ Применить к моим настройкам", f"mp_apply_{pid}"))
        elif not is_author:
            price = preset.get("price_ton", 0)
            rows.append(_btn(f"💎 Купить за {price:.2f} TON", f"mp_buy_{pid}"))
        if purchased and not is_author:
            rows.append([
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="⭐1", callback_data=f"mp_rate_{pid}_1"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="⭐2", callback_data=f"mp_rate_{pid}_2"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="⭐3", callback_data=f"mp_rate_{pid}_3"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="⭐4", callback_data=f"mp_rate_{pid}_4"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="⭐5", callback_data=f"mp_rate_{pid}_5"),
            ])
        rows.append(_back(f"mp_list_{preset['strategy']}_0"))
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows))

    # ── Применить пресет ──────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^mp_apply_(\d+)$"))
    async def cb_mp_apply(cb: CallbackQuery):
        import re
        pid = int(re.match(r"^mp_apply_(\d+)$", cb.data).group(1))
        preset = await db.db_get_preset(pid)
        if not preset:
            await cb.answer("❌"); return
        from preset_service import apply_preset
        await apply_preset(cb.from_user.id, preset)
        await db.db_increment_downloads(pid)
        await cb.answer(f"✅ Пресет «{preset['name']}» применён!", show_alert=True)

    # ── Купить пресет (TON) ───────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^mp_buy_(\d+)$"))
    async def cb_mp_buy(cb: CallbackQuery):
        import re
        pid = int(re.match(r"^mp_buy_(\d+)$", cb.data).group(1))
        preset = await db.db_get_preset(pid)
        if not preset or preset["status"] != "active":
            await cb.answer("❌ Недоступен", show_alert=True); return
        uid = cb.from_user.id
        if await db.db_has_purchased(uid, pid):
            await cb.answer("✅ Уже куплено!", show_alert=True); return
        from ton_payment import generate_comment, generate_deeplink, WALLET, is_configured
        if not is_configured():
            await cb.answer("❌ TON оплата не настроена", show_alert=True); return
        comment = generate_comment(pid, uid)
        amount = preset["price_ton"]
        deeplink = generate_deeplink(amount, comment)
        await db.db_create_purchase(uid, pid, amount, comment)
        await cb.message.answer(
            f"💎 <b>Оплата пресета</b>\n\n"
            f"📌 «{_html.escape(preset['name'])}»\n"
            f"💰 Сумма: <b>{amount:.2f} TON</b>\n\n"
            f"Отправь на адрес:\n<code>{WALLET}</code>\n\n"
            f"С комментарием:\n<code>{comment}</code>\n\n"
            f"⏳ Автоподтверждение до 30 сек.\n⏰ 30 мин на оплату.",
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
                [InlineKeyboardButton(text="💎 Открыть кошелёк", url=deeplink)],
                [InlineKeyboardButton(text="⬅️ Назад", callback_data=f"mp_view_{pid}")],
            ]),
        )
        await cb.answer()

    # ── Оценка ────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^mp_rate_(\d+)_(\d)$"))
    async def cb_mp_rate(cb: CallbackQuery):
        import re
        m = re.match(r"^mp_rate_(\d+)_(\d)$", cb.data)
        pid, rating = int(m.group(1)), int(m.group(2))
        await db.db_add_rating(cb.from_user.id, pid, rating)
        await cb.answer(f"⭐ Оценка {rating}/5 сохранена!")

    # ── Мои пресеты ───────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "mp_my")
    async def cb_mp_my(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        presets = await db.db_get_user_presets(cb.from_user.id)
        if not presets:
            await safe_edit(cb, "📦 <b>Мои пресеты</b>\n\nУ тебя пока нет опубликованных пресетов.",
                            InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[_back("marketplace_menu")]))
            return
        rows = [_noop("── 📦 Мои пресеты ──")]
        for p in presets[:20]:
            st = {"pending": "⏳", "active": "✅", "rejected": "❌", "hidden": "🔒"}.get(p["status"], "?")
            rows.append(_btn(f"{st} {p['strategy']} | {p['name'][:25]} | 📥{p['downloads']}", f"mp_view_{p['id']}"))
        rows.append(_back("marketplace_menu"))
        await safe_edit(cb, "📦 <b>Мои пресеты</b>", InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows))

    # ── Мои покупки ───────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "mp_purchased")
    async def cb_mp_purchased(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        presets = await db.db_get_purchased_presets(cb.from_user.id)
        if not presets:
            await safe_edit(cb, "🛒 <b>Мои покупки</b>\n\nПока пусто. Загляни в каталог!",
                            InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[_back("marketplace_menu")]))
            return
        rows = [_noop("── 🛒 Мои покупки ──")]
        for p in presets[:20]:
            rows.append(_btn(f"✅ {p['strategy']} | {p['name'][:25]}", f"mp_view_{p['id']}"))
        rows.append(_back("marketplace_menu"))
        await safe_edit(cb, "🛒 <b>Мои покупки</b>", InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=rows))

    # ── Публикация пресета (FSM) ──────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.regexp(r"^mp_publish_(\w+)$"))
    async def cb_mp_publish(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        import re
        strategy = re.match(r"^mp_publish_(\w+)$", cb.data).group(1)
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await cb.answer("⛔ Нужна подписка", show_alert=True); return
        # Лимит 5 пресетов
        my = await db.db_get_user_presets(cb.from_user.id)
        if len(my) >= 5:
            await cb.answer("⚠️ Максимум 5 пресетов", show_alert=True); return
        await state.update_data(strategy=strategy)
        await state.set_state(PresetPublishState.name)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.message.answer(
            f"📦 <b>Публикация {strategy} пресета</b>\n\n"
            f"Введи название (до 50 символов):",
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_lang),
        )
        await cb.answer()

    @dp.message(PresetPublishState.name)
    async def fsm_preset_name(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        name = (msg.text or "").strip()[:50]
        if not name or len(name) < 3:
            await msg.answer("❌ Название слишком короткое (мин. 3 символа)"); return
        await state.update_data(name=name)
        await state.set_state(PresetPublishState.description)
        await msg.answer("📝 Описание (до 200 символов) или /skip:")

    @dp.message(PresetPublishState.description)
    async def fsm_preset_desc(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        text = (msg.text or "").strip()
        desc = "" if text.lower() in ("/skip", "skip", "-") else text[:200]
        await state.update_data(description=desc)
        await state.set_state(PresetPublishState.price)
        await msg.answer("💎 Цена в TON (число) или 0 для бесплатного:")

    @dp.message(PresetPublishState.price)
    async def fsm_preset_price(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        try:
            price = float((msg.text or "0").strip().replace(",", "."))
        except ValueError:
            await msg.answer("❌ Введи число (например 0.5)"); return
        price = max(0.0, min(100.0, price))
        data = await state.get_data()
        await state.clear()
        user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)
        from preset_service import publish_preset
        pid = await publish_preset(user, data["strategy"], data["name"], data.get("description", ""), price)
        price_label = f"{price:.2f} TON" if price > 0 else "Бесплатно"
        await msg.answer(
            f"✅ <b>Пресет опубликован!</b>\n\n"
            f"📌 «{_html.escape(data['name'])}»\n"
            f"📐 Стратегия: {data['strategy']}\n"
            f"💎 Цена: {price_label}\n"
            f"📊 Статус: ⏳ Ожидает верификации\n\n"
            f"Пресет появится в каталоге после проверки администратором.",
            parse_mode="HTML",
        )
        # Уведомить админов
        for admin_id in config.ADMIN_IDS:
            try:
                await bot.send_message(
                    admin_id,
                    f"📦 <b>Новый пресет #{pid}</b>\n"
                    f"👤 uid={user.user_id} @{getattr(user, 'username', '?')}\n"
                    f"📐 {data['strategy']} | «{_html.escape(data['name'])}»\n"
                    f"💎 {price_label}\n\n"
                    f"Одобрить: <code>/preset_approve {pid}</code>\n"
                    f"Отклонить: <code>/preset_reject {pid}</code>",
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
            except Exception:
                pass


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/math_levels.py
================================================================================
"""handlers/math_levels.py — Math Levels scanner handlers."""
from __future__ import annotations
import logging

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext
from aiogram.types import CallbackQuery

from handlers._common import safe_edit

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers.math_levels")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config, **kwargs):

    def _menu_text(user) -> str:
        active = getattr(user, "math_levels_active", False)
        status = "✅ Включён" if active else "❌ Выключен"
        return (
            "📐 <b>Математические уровни</b>\n\n"
            "Независимый сканер трёх типов ключевых уровней:\n"
            "• <b>Dynamic Pivot Points</b> — S3/PP/R3 дневного диапазона\n"
            "• <b>Fibonacci Golden Zone</b> — 0.500 · 0.618 · 0.786\n"
            "• <b>Психологические уровни</b> — круглые числа\n\n"
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"
            f"Статус: <b>{status}</b>"
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "math_levels_menu")
    async def cb_math_levels_menu(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from keyboards import kb_math_levels_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, _menu_text(user), kb_math_levels_menu(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_math_levels")
    async def cb_toggle_math_levels(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await cb.answer("⛔ Требуется активная подписка.", show_alert=True)
            return

        user.math_levels_active = not getattr(user, "math_levels_active", False)
        await um.save(user)

        status = "включён ✅" if user.math_levels_active else "выключен ❌"
        await cb.answer(f"📐 Сканер уровней {status}")
        log.info(
            "Math Levels %s uid=%s",
            "включён" if user.math_levels_active else "выключен",
            user.user_id,
        )
        # CLEANUP-5A: возвращаемся в kb_more после toggle
        from keyboards import kb_more
        await safe_edit(cb, "📦 Дополнительные стратегии", kb_more(user))


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/partial_tp.py

"""
handlers/partial_tp.py — Настройки Partial Take Profit.

Кнопка в меню авто-трейда → карточка с параметрами → toggle/edit.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import logging

from aiogram import Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.types import CallbackQuery

from handlers._common import safe_edit
from keyboards import kb_partial_tp, kb_ptp_values

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers.PTP")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot, um, **kwargs):

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "ptp_show")
    async def ptp_show(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from i18n import t as _t
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        enabled = getattr(user, "partial_tp_enabled", False)
        tp1_r   = getattr(user, "partial_tp1_r",   1.0)
        tp1_pct = getattr(user, "partial_tp1_pct",  40.0)
        tp2_r   = getattr(user, "partial_tp2_r",   1.5)
        tp2_pct = getattr(user, "partial_tp2_pct",  30.0)
        rest    = 100 - tp1_pct - tp2_pct
        status  = _t("ptp_enabled", _lang) if enabled else _t("ptp_disabled", _lang)
        strategy = getattr(user, "strategy", "LEVELS")
        text = (
            f"{_t('ptp_title', _lang)}\n\n"
            f"Status: {status}\n"
            f"{_t('ptp_strategy', _lang)}: <b>{strategy}</b>\n\n"
            f"🎯 TP1: {_t('ptp_close_pct', _lang, pct=tp1_pct, r=tp1_r)}\n"
            f"🎯 TP2: {_t('ptp_close_pct', _lang, pct=tp2_pct, r=tp2_r)}\n"
            f"📦 {_t('ptp_remainder', _lang, pct=rest)}\n\n"
            f"{_t('ptp_works_all', _lang)}\n"
            f"{_t('ptp_new_trades', _lang)}"
        )
        await safe_edit(cb, text, kb_partial_tp(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "ptp_toggle")
    async def ptp_toggle(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from i18n import t as _t
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        user.partial_tp_enabled = not getattr(user, "partial_tp_enabled", False)
        await um.save(user)
        status = _t("ptp_on", _lang) if user.partial_tp_enabled else _t("ptp_off", _lang)
        await cb.answer(status)
        # Обновляем карточку
        await ptp_show(cb)

    # Меню выбора значений
    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "ptp_tp1r_menu")
    async def ptp_tp1r_menu(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🎯 TP1: выбери R-множитель:", kb_ptp_values("tp1r", user.partial_tp1_r))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "ptp_tp2r_menu")
    async def ptp_tp2r_menu(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🎯 TP2: выбери R-множитель:", kb_ptp_values("tp2r", user.partial_tp2_r))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "ptp_tp1pct_menu")
    async def ptp_tp1pct_menu(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, "📊 TP1: % позиции для закрытия:", kb_ptp_values("tp1pct", user.partial_tp1_pct))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "ptp_tp2pct_menu")
    async def ptp_tp2pct_menu(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, "📊 TP2: % позиции для закрытия:", kb_ptp_values("tp2pct", user.partial_tp2_pct))

    # Установка значений
    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("ptp_set_"))
    async def ptp_set_value(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            # ptp_set_{param}_{value}
            parts = cb.data.split("_")  # ["ptp", "set", param, value]
            param = parts[2]
            val   = float(parts[3])
            if param == "tp1r":
                user.partial_tp1_r = val
            elif param == "tp2r":
                user.partial_tp2_r = val
            elif param == "tp1pct":
                user.partial_tp1_pct = val
            elif param == "tp2pct":
                user.partial_tp2_pct = val
            await um.save(user)
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("ptp_set_value: %s", e)
        # Возвращаемся к карточке
        await ptp_show(cb)

"""handlers/settings.py — LONG/SHORT/BOTH scanner settings handlers."""
from __future__ import annotations
import asyncio
import html as _html  # AUDIT: BUG-005
import logging

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F

    kb_main, kb_back, kb_subscribe, kb_reply_main,
    kb_language,
    kb_optimizer,
    kb_scalping_menu, kb_scalping_tf, kb_scalping_max,
    kb_scalping_minrr, kb_scalping_atr,
    kb_disabled_days,

    kb_settings,
    kb_mode_long, kb_mode_short, kb_mode_both,
    kb_long_timeframes, kb_short_timeframes, kb_timeframes,
    kb_long_intervals, kb_short_intervals, kb_intervals,
    kb_long_settings, kb_short_settings,
    kb_pivots, kb_long_pivots, kb_short_pivots,
    kb_ema, kb_long_ema, kb_short_ema,
    kb_filters, kb_long_filters, kb_short_filters,
    kb_quality, kb_long_quality, kb_short_quality,
    kb_cooldown, kb_long_cooldown, kb_short_cooldown,
    kb_sl, kb_long_sl, kb_short_sl,
    kb_targets, kb_long_targets, kb_short_targets,
    kb_volume, kb_long_volume, kb_short_volume,
    kb_notify,
    gerchik_help_text, gerchik_help_text_p2,
    kb_gerchik_help_p1, kb_gerchik_help_p2,
    help_text, kb_help,
    kb_fsm_cancel,
)
from scanner_mid import trade_records_keyboard, signal_compact_keyboard
from handlers._common import (
    safe_edit, _fire_task,
    cfg_text, settings_text, access_denied_text,
    _strategy_text, _kb_strategy_select,
    _update_long_field, _update_short_field,
    _update_shared_field, _apply_shared_cfg,
    EditState,
)
from i18n import t as _t

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers.settings")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config, **kwargs):

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_high_wr")  # HIGH-WR: toggle handler
    async def toggle_high_wr(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        current = bool(getattr(user, "high_wr_mode", False))
        user.high_wr_mode = not current
        await um.save(user)
        mode_label = "ON ✅" if user.high_wr_mode else "OFF"
        await cb.answer(f"High WR Mode: {mode_label}", show_alert=False)
        # Перерисовать клавиатуру с актуальным состоянием кнопки
        _hwm = user.high_wr_mode
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        try:
            cfg = user.shared_cfg()
            await safe_edit(cb, reply_markup=kb_settings(cfg, _lang, high_wr_mode=_hwm))
        except Exception:
            pass

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "help_high_wr")  # HIGH-WR: help popup
    async def help_high_wr(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _l = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.answer(
            _t("high_wr_help", _l),
            show_alert=True,
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_scalp_trend_only")
    async def toggle_scalp_trend_only(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.scalping_trend_only = not bool(getattr(user, "scalping_trend_only", False))
        await um.save(user)
        label = "ON ✅" if user.scalping_trend_only else "OFF"
        await cb.answer(f"📈 Только по тренду: {label}", show_alert=False)
        await safe_edit(cb, "⚡ Настройки скальпинга", kb_scalping_menu(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "mode_long")
    async def mode_long(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        cfg  = user.get_long_cfg()
        await safe_edit(cb, cfg_text(cfg, "📈 <b>ЛОНГ сканер</b>"), kb_mode_long(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_long")
    async def toggle_long(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("sub_expired", lang), show_alert=True)
            await safe_edit(cb, access_denied_text(reason), kb_subscribe(config)); return
        # Проверяем стратегию перед включением (пустая строка или None — просим выбрать)
        if not user.long_active and user.strategy not in ("LEVELS", "SMC", "GERCHIK"):
            await safe_edit(cb, _strategy_text(user.strategy, lang), _kb_strategy_select(lang)); return
        user.long_active = not user.long_active
        if user.long_active and user.active and user.scan_mode == "both":
            # Конвертируем ОБА → раздельный режим, сохраняем покрытие
            user.active = False
            user.short_active = True
        await cb.answer(_t("long_on", lang) if user.long_active else _t("long_off", lang))
        await um.save(user)
        cfg = user.get_long_cfg()
        await safe_edit(cb, cfg_text(cfg, "📈 <b>ЛОНГ сканер</b>"), kb_mode_long(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "menu_long_tf")
    async def menu_long_tf(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "📊 <b>Таймфрейм ЛОНГ</b>", kb_long_timeframes(user.long_tf))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("set_long_tf_"))
    async def set_long_tf(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)

        await cb.answer(_t("long_tf_saved", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"), tf=user.long_tf))
        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, cfg_text(user.get_long_cfg(), "📈 <b>ЛОНГ сканер</b>"), kb_mode_long(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "menu_long_interval")

        await safe_edit(cb, "🔬 <b>Фильтры ЛОНГ</b>", kb_long_filters(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "long_toggle_volume")
    async def long_toggle_volume(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        new_val = not user.get_long_cfg().use_volume
        await cb.answer(_t("vol_long_toggle", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"), icon="✅" if new_val else "❌"))

    # ─── РЕЖИМ ШОРТ ───────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "mode_short")
    async def mode_short(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        cfg = user.get_short_cfg()
        await safe_edit(cb, cfg_text(cfg, "📉 <b>ШОРТ сканер</b>"), kb_mode_short(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_short")
    async def toggle_short(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("sub_expired", lang), show_alert=True)
            await safe_edit(cb, access_denied_text(reason), kb_subscribe(config)); return
        # Проверяем стратегию перед включением (пустая строка или None — просим выбрать)
        if not user.short_active and user.strategy not in ("LEVELS", "SMC", "GERCHIK"):
            await safe_edit(cb, _strategy_text(user.strategy, lang), _kb_strategy_select(lang)); return
        user.short_active = not user.short_active
        if user.short_active:
            if user.active and user.scan_mode == "both":
                # Конвертируем ОБА → раздельный режим, сохраняем покрытие
                user.active = False
                user.long_active = True
        else:
            if not user.long_active:
                user.active = False
        await cb.answer(_t("short_on", lang) if user.short_active else _t("short_off", lang))
        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, cfg_text(user.get_short_cfg(), "📉 <b>ШОРТ сканер</b>"), kb_mode_short(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "menu_short_tf")
    async def menu_short_tf(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        cfg = user.get_short_cfg()
        await safe_edit(cb, "📊 <b>Таймфрейм ШОРТ</b>\n\nТекущий: <b>" + cfg.timeframe + "</b>", kb_short_timeframes(cfg.timeframe))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("set_short_tf_"))
    async def short_set_tf(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        v = cb.data.replace("set_short_tf_", "")
        await cb.answer("✅ " + v)
        user.short_tf = v  # критично: TF хранится в user.short_tf, не в short_cfg
        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, "📊 <b>Таймфрейм ШОРТ</b>\n\nТекущий: <b>" + v + "</b>", kb_short_timeframes(v))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "menu_short_interval")
    async def menu_short_interval(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        cfg = user.get_short_cfg()
        await safe_edit(cb, "🔄 <b>Интервал ШОРТ</b>\n\nТекущий: <b>" + str(cfg.scan_interval//60) + " мин.</b>", kb_short_intervals(cfg.scan_interval))

    @dp.callback_query(
        F.data.startswith("short_set_interval_") |
        F.data.startswith("set_short_interval_")
    )
    async def short_set_interval(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        raw = cb.data
        if raw.startswith("short_set_interval_"):
            v = int(raw.replace("short_set_interval_", ""))
        else:
            v = int(raw.replace("set_short_interval_", ""))
        await cb.answer(_t("interval_min_saved", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"), min=v//60))
        user.short_interval = v  # критично: интервал хранится в user.short_interval
        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🔄 <b>Интервал ШОРТ</b>\n\nТекущий: <b>" + str(v//60) + " мин.</b>", kb_short_intervals(v))

        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await safe_edit(cb, cfg_text(user.get_short_cfg(), "📉 <b>Настройки ШОРТ</b>"), kb_short_settings(user.get_short_cfg(), lang))

    # ─── РЕЖИМ ОБА ────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "mode_both")
    async def mode_both(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, settings_text(user), kb_mode_both(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_both")
    async def toggle_both(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("sub_expired", lang), show_alert=True)
            await safe_edit(cb, access_denied_text(reason), kb_subscribe(config)); return
        is_active = user.active and user.scan_mode == "both"
        if not is_active and user.strategy not in ("LEVELS", "SMC", "GERCHIK"):
            await safe_edit(cb, _strategy_text(user.strategy, lang), _kb_strategy_select(lang)); return
        user.active = not is_active
        user.scan_mode = "both" if user.active else user.scan_mode
        if user.active:
            # Отключаем индивидуальные сканеры — они дублируют BOTH
            user.long_active  = False
            user.short_active = False
        await cb.answer(_t("both_on", lang) if user.active else _t("both_off", lang))
        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, settings_text(user), kb_mode_both(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "menu_tf")
    async def menu_tf(cb: CallbackQuery):

        await safe_edit(cb, "📊 <b>Таймфрейм</b>\n\nТекущий: <b>" + user.timeframe + "</b>", kb_timeframes(user.timeframe))

        await safe_edit(cb, "🎯 <b>Цели (TP)</b>", kb_targets(user))

    @dp.message(EditState.tp1)
    async def save_tp1(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        _d = await state.get_data()
        _l = _d.get("lang", "ru")
        try:
            v = float(msg.text.strip().replace(",", "."))
        except ValueError:
            await msg.answer(_t("invalid_number_ex", _l, ex="1.5")); return
        if v <= 0 or v > 100:  # AUDIT: BUG-006 range validation for RR values
            await msg.answer(_t("invalid_number_ex", _l, ex="1.5")); return
        signal_id = _d.get("signal_id")
        await state.clear()
        if signal_id:
            await db.update_signal_tp(signal_id, tp1=v)
            await msg.answer(_t("tp1_saved_price", _l, val=v))
        else:
            user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)
            _update_shared_field(user, "tp1_rr", v)
            await um.save(user)
            await msg.answer(_t("goal1_saved", _l, val=v), reply_markup=kb_targets(user))

    @dp.message(EditState.tp2)
    async def save_tp2(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        _d = await state.get_data()
        _l = _d.get("lang", "ru")
        try:
            v = float(msg.text.strip().replace(",", "."))
        except ValueError:
            await msg.answer(_t("invalid_number_ex", _l, ex="3.0")); return
        signal_id = _d.get("signal_id")
        await state.clear()
        if signal_id:
            await db.update_signal_tp(signal_id, tp2=v)
            await msg.answer(_t("tp2_saved_price", _l, val=v))
        else:
            user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)
            _update_shared_field(user, "tp2_rr", v)
            await um.save(user)
            await msg.answer(_t("goal2_saved", _l, val=v), reply_markup=kb_targets(user))

    # ─── ЗАПИСИ СИГНАЛОВ ──────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("sig_records_"))
    async def sig_records(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        # callback_data = "sig_records_<trade_id>" — trade_id может содержать "_"
        trade_id_str = cb.data[len("sig_records_"):]
        records = await db.get_signal_records(trade_id_str)
        kb = trade_records_keyboard(trade_id_str)
        lines = ["📋 <b>Результаты сигнала</b>"]
        for r in records:
            em = "✅" if r.get("result") == "win" else "❌" if r.get("result") == "loss" else "⏳"
            lines.append(em + " " + str(r.get("result", "—")) + " " + str(r.get("rr", "")))
        await safe_edit(cb, "\n".join(lines) or "Нет записей", kb)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("sig_back_"))
    async def sig_back(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        trade_id_str = cb.data[len("sig_back_"):]
        signal = await db.get_signal(trade_id_str)
        if not signal:
            _sb_user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            await cb.message.answer(_t("signal_not_found", getattr(_sb_user, "lang", "ru"))); return
        symbol = signal.get("symbol", "") if isinstance(signal, dict) else getattr(signal, "symbol", "")
        kb = signal_compact_keyboard(trade_id_str, symbol)
        txt = "📊 <b>Сигнал #" + _html.escape(str(trade_id_str)) + "</b>"  # AUDIT: BUG-005
        await safe_edit(cb, txt, kb)

            await cb.answer()
            await cb.message.answer(
                "📚 <b>CHM GEL SIGNAL — Academy</b>\n\n"
                "Полная документация по работе с ботом:\n"
                "стратегии, сигналы, автотрейдинг, бэктест, риск-менеджмент.\n\n"
                "Изучи прежде чем писать в поддержку 👇",
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[[
                    InlineKeyboardButton(
                        text="📚 Открыть Академию",
                        url="https://chmup.top/academy",
                    )
                ]]),
            )
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug("academy_open_cb: %s", e)

    # ─── ОПТИМИЗАТОР ──────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "optimizer_menu")
    async def optimizer_menu_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            import signal_filter as _sf
            ml_stats = _sf.get_stats(cb.from_user.id)
        except Exception:
            ml_stats = None
        await safe_edit(cb, "🤖 Адаптивный оптимизатор параметров стратегии", kb_optimizer(user, ml_stats))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_optimizer")
    async def toggle_optimizer_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            user.optimizer_enabled = not getattr(user, "optimizer_enabled", False)
            await um.save(user)
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("toggle_optimizer uid=%s: %s", cb.from_user.id, e)
        try:
            import signal_filter as _sf
            ml_stats = _sf.get_stats(cb.from_user.id)
        except Exception:
            ml_stats = None
        await safe_edit(cb, "🤖 Адаптивный оптимизатор параметров стратегии", kb_optimizer(user, ml_stats))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("optim_strat_"))
    async def optim_strat_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            strat = cb.data.replace("optim_strat_", "").upper()
            current = str(getattr(user, "optimizer_strategies", "LEVELS") or "LEVELS")
            strats = [s.strip() for s in current.split(",") if s.strip()]
            if strat in strats:
                strats.remove(strat)
            else:
                strats.append(strat)
            user.optimizer_strategies = ",".join(strats) if strats else "LEVELS"
            await um.save(user)
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("optim_strat_cb uid=%s: %s", cb.from_user.id, e)
        try:
            import signal_filter as _sf
            ml_stats = _sf.get_stats(cb.from_user.id)
        except Exception:
            ml_stats = None
        await safe_edit(cb, "🤖 Адаптивный оптимизатор параметров стратегии", kb_optimizer(user, ml_stats))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "ml_retrain_now")
    async def ml_retrain_now_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🔄 Переобучение запущено...")
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            import signal_filter as _sf
            import trade_feedback as _fb
            import asyncio
            strategies = str(getattr(user, "optimizer_strategies", "LEVELS") or "LEVELS")
            trained = []
            for strat in strategies.split(","):
                strat = strat.strip().upper()
                if not strat:
                    continue
                rows = await _fb.get_feedback_rows(cb.from_user.id, strat, limit=500)
                if rows:
                    _sf.drop_model(cb.from_user.id, strat)
                    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
                    ok = await loop.run_in_executor(None, _sf.train_filter, cb.from_user.id, strat, rows)
                    if ok:
                        trained.append(strat)
            if trained:
                await cb.message.answer(f"✅ ML-фильтр переобучен: {', '.join(trained)}")
            else:
                await cb.message.answer(f"⚠️ Недостаточно данных для обучения (нужно мин. {_sf.MIN_TRAIN_SAMPLES} сделок)")
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("ml_retrain_now uid=%s: %s", cb.from_user.id, e)
            await cb.message.answer("❌ Ошибка при переобучении ML-фильтра")
        ml_stats = None
        try:
            import signal_filter as _sf
            ml_stats = _sf.get_stats(cb.from_user.id)
        except Exception:
            pass
        await safe_edit(cb, "🤖 Адаптивный оптимизатор параметров стратегии", kb_optimizer(user, ml_stats))

    # ─── СКАЛЬПИНГ ────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "scalping_menu")
    async def scalping_menu_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, "⚡ Настройки скальпинга", kb_scalping_menu(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_scalping")
    async def toggle_scalping_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            user.scalping_active = not getattr(user, "scalping_active", False)
            await um.save(user)
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("toggle_scalping uid=%s: %s", cb.from_user.id, e)
        await safe_edit(cb, "⚡ Настройки скальпинга", kb_scalping_menu(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "scalp_tf_menu")
    async def scalp_tf_menu_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, "⏱ Выбери таймфрейм скальпинга:", kb_scalping_tf(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("set_scalp_tf_"))
    async def set_scalp_tf_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            user.scalping_tf = cb.data.replace("set_scalp_tf_", "")
            await um.save(user)
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("set_scalp_tf uid=%s: %s", cb.from_user.id, e)
        await safe_edit(cb, "⏱ Выбери таймфрейм скальпинга:", kb_scalping_tf(user))

    # SCALP-V3: старые меню TP/SL/EMA/RSI/Vol/Fee → redirect к главному меню
    for _old_cb in ("scalp_tp_menu", "scalp_sl_menu", "scalp_ema_menu",
                     "scalp_rsi_long_menu", "scalp_rsi_short_menu",
                     "scalp_vol_menu", "scalp_fee_help"):
        @dp.callback_query(F.data == _old_cb)
        async def _scalp_redirect(cb: CallbackQuery, _cb=_old_cb):
            await cb.answer("⚡ Параметр управляется автоматически в V3")
            user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            await safe_edit(cb, "⚡ Скальпинг V3", kb_scalping_menu(user))

    for _old_prefix in ("set_scalp_tp_", "set_scalp_sl_", "set_scalp_ema_",
                         "set_scalp_rsilmin_", "set_scalp_rsilmax_",
                         "set_scalp_rsismin_", "set_scalp_rsismax_",
                         "set_scalp_vol_"):
        @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith(_old_prefix))
        async def _scalp_set_redirect(cb: CallbackQuery, _p=_old_prefix):
            await cb.answer("⚡ Параметр управляется автоматически в V3")

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "scalp_max_menu")
    async def scalp_max_menu_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🔢 Выбери макс. кол-во скальп-сигналов за цикл:", kb_scalping_max(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("set_scalp_max_"))
    async def set_scalp_max_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            user.scalping_max_trades = int(cb.data.replace("set_scalp_max_", ""))
            await um.save(user)
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("set_scalp_max uid=%s: %s", cb.from_user.id, e)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🔢 Макс. скальп-сигналов:", kb_scalping_max(user))

    # ─── Min R:R (оставлен для V3) ──────────────────
