    # ─── Справка: комиссии и R:R скальпинга ──────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "scalp_fee_help")
    async def scalp_fee_help_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")

        tp = float(getattr(user, "scalping_tp_pct", 0.75))
        sl = float(getattr(user, "scalping_sl_pct", 0.20))
        fee = 0.11  # Bybit taker round-trip
        nr = tp - fee
        nrisk = sl + fee
        rr = round(nr / nrisk, 2) if nrisk > 0 else 0
        dep = 100  # пример $100

        if lang == "en":
            text = (
                "<b>Scalping: Fees &amp; R:R Guide</b>\n\n"
                "<b>Bybit commission (Taker):</b>\n"
                "  Open:  0.055%\n"
                "  Close: 0.055%\n"
                "  Total round-trip: <b>0.11%</b>\n\n"
                f"<b>Your settings:</b>\n"
                f"  TP = {tp}%  |  SL = {sl}%\n\n"
                "<b>Net profit/loss per trade:</b>\n"
                f"  Net reward = TP − fee = {tp}% − {fee}% = <b>{nr:.2f}%</b>\n"
                f"  Net risk   = SL + fee = {sl}% + {fee}% = <b>{nrisk:.2f}%</b>\n"
                f"  R:R = {nr:.2f} / {nrisk:.2f} = <b>1:{rr}</b>\n\n"
                f"<b>Example (${dep} position):</b>\n"
                f"  Win:  +${dep * nr / 100:.2f}  |  Loss: −${dep * nrisk / 100:.2f}\n\n"
                "<b>How to be profitable:</b>\n"
                "  R:R ≥ 1.3 → need ≥ 44% winrate to profit\n"
                "  R:R ≥ 2.0 → need ≥ 34% winrate to profit\n"
                "  R:R ≥ 3.0 → need ≥ 26% winrate to profit\n\n"
                "<b>Rule:</b> TP should be at least 2× larger than (SL + fees).\n"
                "If R:R < 1.3, signals will be filtered out."
            )
        else:
            text = (
                "<b>Скальпинг: Комиссии и R:R</b>\n\n"
                "<b>Комиссия Bybit (Taker):</b>\n"
                "  Вход:  0.055%\n"
                "  Выход: 0.055%\n"
                "  Итого round-trip: <b>0.11%</b>\n\n"
                f"<b>Твои настройки:</b>\n"
                f"  TP = {tp}%  |  SL = {sl}%\n\n"
                "<b>Чистая прибыль/убыток на сделку:</b>\n"
                f"  Чистый профит = TP − комиссия = {tp}% − {fee}% = <b>{nr:.2f}%</b>\n"
                f"  Чистый риск   = SL + комиссия = {sl}% + {fee}% = <b>{nrisk:.2f}%</b>\n"
                f"  R:R = {nr:.2f} / {nrisk:.2f} = <b>1:{rr}</b>\n\n"
                f"<b>Пример (позиция ${dep}):</b>\n"
                f"  Прибыль: +${dep * nr / 100:.2f}  |  Убыток: −${dep * nrisk / 100:.2f}\n\n"
                "<b>Как быть в плюсе:</b>\n"
                "  R:R ≥ 1.3 → нужен winrate ≥ 44%\n"
                "  R:R ≥ 2.0 → нужен winrate ≥ 34%\n"
                "  R:R ≥ 3.0 → нужен winrate ≥ 26%\n\n"
                "<b>Правило:</b> TP должен быть минимум в 2× больше (SL + комиссия).\n"
                "Если R:R < 1.3, сигналы отфильтровываются автоматически."
            )
        from keyboards import kb_scalping_menu
        kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ " + ("Back" if lang == "en" else "Назад"),
                                  callback_data="scalping_menu")],
        ])
        await safe_edit(cb, text, kb)

    # ─── ДНИ ТОРГОВЛИ ─────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "disabled_days_menu")
    async def disabled_days_menu_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await safe_edit(cb, "📅 Выбери дни без авто-трейдинга:", kb_disabled_days(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("toggle_day_"))
    async def toggle_day_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            wd = int(cb.data.replace("toggle_day_", ""))
            raw = str(getattr(user, "autotrade_disabled_days", "") or "")
            disabled = {int(d) for d in raw.split(",") if d.strip().isdigit()}
            if wd in disabled:
                disabled.discard(wd)
            else:
                disabled.add(wd)
            user.autotrade_disabled_days = ",".join(str(d) for d in sorted(disabled))
            await um.save(user)
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("toggle_day_cb uid=%s: %s", cb.from_user.id, e)
        await safe_edit(cb, "📅 Выбери дни без авто-трейдинга:", kb_disabled_days(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "clear_disabled_days")
    async def clear_disabled_days_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            user.autotrade_disabled_days = ""
            await um.save(user)
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("clear_disabled_days uid=%s: %s", cb.from_user.id, e)
        await safe_edit(cb, "📅 Выбери дни без авто-трейдинга:", kb_disabled_days(user))

    # ─── ФИКСИРОВАННЫЙ ОБЪЁМ ──────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "fixed_amount_menu")
    async def fixed_amount_menu_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cur = float(getattr(user, "fixed_amount", 0.0) or 0.0)
        txt = (
            "💰 Фиксированный риск на сделку\n\n"
            f"Текущее значение: <b>{'Авто (из стратегии)' if cur == 0 else str(cur) + '%'}</b>\n\n"
            "Если задан — переопределяет автоматический риск-процент стратегии."
        )
        await safe_edit(cb, txt, kb_fixed_amount(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("set_fixed_amt_"))
    async def set_fixed_amt_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            user.fixed_amount = float(cb.data.replace("set_fixed_amt_", ""))
            await um.save(user)
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("set_fixed_amt uid=%s: %s", cb.from_user.id, e)
        cur = float(getattr(user, "fixed_amount", 0.0) or 0.0)
        txt = (
            "💰 Фиксированный риск на сделку\n\n"
            f"Текущее значение: <b>{'Авто (из стратегии)' if cur == 0 else str(cur) + '%'}</b>\n\n"
            "Если задан — переопределяет автоматический риск-процент стратегии."
        )
        await safe_edit(cb, txt, kb_fixed_amount(user))

    # ─── ЯЗЫК ─────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "lang_menu")
    async def lang_menu_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from i18n import t as _t
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await safe_edit(cb, _t("lang_menu_title", lang), kb_language(lang))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.in_({"set_lang_ru", "set_lang_en"}))
    async def set_lang_cb(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from i18n import t as _t
        lang = "ru" if cb.data == "set_lang_ru" else "en"
        try:
            user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            user.lang = lang
            await um.save(user)
            # Telegram requires a new message to update the reply keyboard
            confirm_key = "lang_set_ru" if lang == "ru" else "lang_set_en"
            await cb.message.answer(_t(confirm_key, lang), reply_markup=kb_reply_main(lang))
            # Edit the original message to show main menu in the new language
            await safe_edit(cb, _t("main_scanner_mode", lang), kb_main(user))
        except Exception as e:
            log.warning("set_lang_cb uid=%s: %s", cb.from_user.id, e)

    # ─── АВТО-ТРЕЙДИНГ BYBIT ──────────────────────────


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/smart_tools.py
================================================================================
"""handlers/smart_tools.py — Handlers for 10 smart trading tools."""
from __future__ import annotations

import html as _html
import logging

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.types import CallbackQuery, InlineKeyboardMarkup, InlineKeyboardButton

from handlers._common import safe_edit
from keyboards import _btn, _noop, _back

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.SmartTools")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config) -> None:

    # ── Главное меню Smart Tools ──────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smart_tools_menu")
    async def cb_smart_menu(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb,
            "🔧 <b>Smart Trading Tools</b>\n"
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n"
            "Продвинутые инструменты для\n"
            "профессиональной торговли.",
            _kb_smart(),
        )

    def _kb_smart() -> InlineKeyboardMarkup:
        return InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _noop("── 🔧 Smart Tools ──"),
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📋 Prop Simulator", callback_data="st_prop_sim"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="🛡 Anti-Liquidation", callback_data="st_anti_liq")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🎯 Volatility Sniper", callback_data="st_vol_sniper"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="🎯 Risk Radar", callback_data="st_risk_radar")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📰 News Sniper", callback_data="st_news"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="👥 Position Mirror", callback_data="st_mirror")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🔗 MTF Confluence", callback_data="st_mtf"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="📊 Portfolio", callback_data="st_portfolio")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🤖 AI Strategy Lab", callback_data="st_ai_lab"),
             InlineKeyboardButton(text="💎 Smart Money", callback_data="st_smart_money")],
            _back("back_main"),
        ])

    # ── #10 Prop Simulator ────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_prop_sim")
    async def cb_prop_sim(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from smart_tools import format_paper_dashboard
        text = format_paper_dashboard(cb.from_user.id)
        paper_on = bool(getattr(user, "paper_trading", False))
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn(f"{'◉ Paper ON' if paper_on else '○ Paper OFF'}", "st_toggle_paper"),
            _btn("🔄 Обновить", "st_prop_sim"),
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_toggle_paper")
    async def cb_toggle_paper(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.paper_trading = not user.paper_trading
        await um.save(user)
        label = "ON ✅" if user.paper_trading else "OFF"
        await cb.answer(f"Paper Trading: {label}")
        # Re-render
        from smart_tools import format_paper_dashboard
        await safe_edit(cb, format_paper_dashboard(cb.from_user.id), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn(f"{'◉ Paper ON' if user.paper_trading else '○ Paper OFF'}", "st_toggle_paper"),
            _btn("🔄 Обновить", "st_prop_sim"),
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── #7 Anti-Liquidation Shield ────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_anti_liq")
    async def cb_anti_liq(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🛡 Проверяю позиции...")
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from smart_tools import fetch_all_positions, check_liquidation_risk, format_liquidation_risk
        positions = await fetch_all_positions(user)
        alerts = await check_liquidation_risk(positions)
        text = format_liquidation_risk(alerts)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("🔄 Обновить", "st_anti_liq"),
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── #3 Volatility Sniper ─────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_vol_sniper")
    async def cb_vol_sniper(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🎯 Сканирую BB squeeze...")
        from smart_tools import scan_bb_squeezes, format_squeeze_dashboard
        data = await scan_bb_squeezes(scanner.fetcher)
        text = format_squeeze_dashboard(data)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("🔄 Обновить", "st_vol_sniper"),
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── #12 Risk Radar ────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_risk_radar")
    async def cb_risk_radar(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🎯 Загрузка позиций...")
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from smart_tools import fetch_all_positions, format_risk_radar
        positions = await fetch_all_positions(user)
        text = format_risk_radar(positions)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("🔄 Обновить", "st_risk_radar"),
            _btn("🛡 Проверить ликвидацию", "st_anti_liq"),
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── #1 News Sniper ────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_news")
    async def cb_news(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("📰 Загрузка новостей...")
        from smart_tools import fetch_latest_news, format_news_dashboard
        news = await fetch_latest_news()
        text = format_news_dashboard(news)
        await safe_edit(cb, text, InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("🔄 Обновить", "st_news"),
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── #2 Position Mirror ────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_mirror")
    async def cb_mirror(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("👥 Загрузка лидерборда...")
        from smart_tools import fetch_bybit_leaderboard, format_mirror_dashboard
        leaders = await fetch_bybit_leaderboard()
        await safe_edit(cb, format_mirror_dashboard(leaders), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("🔄 Обновить", "st_mirror"),
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── #11 MTF Confluence ────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_mtf")
    async def cb_mtf(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from smart_tools import format_mtf_info
        await safe_edit(cb, format_mtf_info(), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── #4 Portfolio Autopilot ────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_portfolio")
    async def cb_portfolio(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("📊 Расчёт корреляций (~10 сек)...")
        from smart_tools import calculate_portfolio, format_portfolio_dashboard
        data = await calculate_portfolio(scanner.fetcher)
        await safe_edit(cb, format_portfolio_dashboard(data), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("🔄 Пересчитать", "st_portfolio"),
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))

    # ── #5 AI Strategy Lab ────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_ai_lab")
    async def cb_ai_lab(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        from smart_tools import format_ai_lab_dashboard
        await safe_edit(cb, format_ai_lab_dashboard(), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("💬 Описать стратегию", "st_ai_lab_input"),
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))

    from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext
    from aiogram.fsm.state import State, StatesGroup
    from aiogram.types import Message

    class AILabState(StatesGroup):
        waiting_desc = State()

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_ai_lab_input")
    async def cb_ai_lab_input(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await cb.answer()
        await state.set_state(AILabState.waiting_desc)
        from keyboards import kb_fsm_cancel
        await cb.message.answer(
            "🤖 <b>Опиши стратегию словами:</b>\n\n"
            "Пример: <i>Входи в LONG когда BTC выше EMA200 и RSI ниже 40</i>",
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(),
        )

    @dp.message(AILabState.waiting_desc)
    async def fsm_ai_lab_desc(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        desc = (msg.text or "").strip()
        if not desc or len(desc) < 10:
            await msg.answer("❌ Описание слишком короткое (мин. 10 символов)"); return
        wait = await msg.answer("🤖 AI генерирует правила...")
        from smart_tools import ai_generate_strategy, format_ai_lab_dashboard
        result = await ai_generate_strategy(desc)
        await wait.delete()
        await msg.answer(format_ai_lab_dashboard(result), parse_mode="HTML")

    # ── #6 Smart Money Flow ───────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "st_smart_money")
    async def cb_smart_money(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("💎 Анализ ордербука...")
        from smart_tools import fetch_orderbook_imbalance, format_smart_money_dashboard
        data = await fetch_orderbook_imbalance()
        await safe_edit(cb, format_smart_money_dashboard(data), InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            _btn("🔄 Обновить", "st_smart_money"),
            _back("smart_tools_menu"),
        ]))


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/smc.py
================================================================================
"""handlers/smc.py — SMC settings handlers."""
from __future__ import annotations
import logging

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.types import CallbackQuery

from keyboards import (
    kb_subscribe, kb_main,
    kb_smc_main, kb_smc_tf, kb_smc_interval, kb_smc_direction,
    kb_smc_confirmations, kb_smc_rr, kb_smc_sl, kb_smc_volume, kb_smc_ob_age,
    kb_smc_retrace_depth,
    kb_smc_mode_long, kb_smc_mode_short, kb_smc_mode_both,
    kb_smc_vol_filter,
)
from handlers._common import (
    safe_edit, main_text, access_denied_text,
)
from i18n import t as _t

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers.smc")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config, **kwargs):

    # ─── SMC РЕЖИМЫ (ЛОНГ / ШОРТ / ОБА) ──────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "mode_smc_long")
    async def mode_smc_long(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "📈 <b>SMC ЛОНГ сканер</b>", kb_smc_mode_long(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "mode_smc_short")
    async def mode_smc_short(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "📉 <b>SMC ШОРТ сканер</b>", kb_smc_mode_short(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "mode_smc_both")
    async def mode_smc_both(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "⚡ <b>SMC ОБА</b>", kb_smc_mode_both(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_smc_long")
    async def toggle_smc_long(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("sub_expired", _lang), show_alert=True)
            await safe_edit(cb, access_denied_text(reason), kb_subscribe(config)); return
        user.smc_long_active = not user.smc_long_active
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(_t("smc_long_on", _lang) if user.smc_long_active else _t("smc_long_off", _lang))
        await safe_edit(cb, "📈 <b>SMC ЛОНГ сканер</b>", kb_smc_mode_long(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_smc_short")
    async def toggle_smc_short(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("sub_expired", _lang), show_alert=True)
            await safe_edit(cb, access_denied_text(reason), kb_subscribe(config)); return
        user.smc_short_active = not user.smc_short_active
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(_t("smc_short_on", _lang) if user.smc_short_active else _t("smc_short_off", _lang))
        await safe_edit(cb, "📉 <b>SMC ШОРТ сканер</b>", kb_smc_mode_short(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_smc_both")
    async def toggle_smc_both(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("sub_expired", _lang), show_alert=True)
            await safe_edit(cb, access_denied_text(reason), kb_subscribe(config)); return
        both_on = user.smc_long_active and user.smc_short_active
        if both_on:
            user.smc_long_active  = False
            user.smc_short_active = False
        else:
            user.smc_long_active  = True
            user.smc_short_active = True
        await um.save(user)
        both_on = user.smc_long_active and user.smc_short_active
        await cb.answer(_t("smc_both_on", _lang) if both_on else _t("smc_both_off", _lang))
        await safe_edit(cb, "⚡ <b>SMC ОБА</b>", kb_smc_mode_both(user))

    # ─── SMC НАСТРОЙКИ ────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_settings")
    async def smc_settings(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    # Подменю
    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_menu_tf")
    async def smc_menu_tf(cb: CallbackQuery):

        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "📊 <b>Таймфрейм SMC</b>", kb_smc_tf(user.get_smc_cfg()))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_menu_interval")

        await safe_edit(cb, "🔄 <b>Интервал сканирования SMC</b>", kb_smc_interval(user.get_smc_cfg()))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_menu_direction")

        await cb.answer()

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_menu_confirmations")

        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "⭐ <b>Мин. подтверждений SMC</b>", kb_smc_confirmations(user.get_smc_cfg()))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_menu_rr")
    async def smc_menu_rr(cb: CallbackQuery):

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_menu_volume")
    async def smc_menu_volume(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "💰 <b>Мин. объём монеты</b>", kb_smc_volume(user.get_smc_cfg()))

    # ── NEW: Фильтр объёма свечи ──────────────────────────
    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_menu_vol_filter")
    async def smc_menu_vol_filter(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(
            cb,
            (
                "📊 <b>Фильтр объёма свечи</b>\n\n"
                "Применяется к последней <b>закрытой</b> MTF-свече.\n"
                "Считается <code>vol_ratio = current / avg20</code>.\n\n"
                "<b>Множитель</b> задаёт порог объёма.\n"
                "<b>Жёсткий reject</b> — блокирует сигнал ниже порога.\n"
                "Если выключено — объём учитывается как одно из 7 confirmations."
            ),
            kb_smc_vol_filter(user.get_smc_cfg()),
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_toggle_vol_filter")
    async def smc_toggle_vol_filter(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.smc_use_volume_filter = not bool(getattr(cfg, "smc_use_volume_filter", False))
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(
            "✅ Жёсткий фильтр: ON" if cfg.smc_use_volume_filter else "❌ Жёсткий фильтр: OFF"
        )
        await safe_edit(cb,
            (
                "📊 <b>Фильтр объёма свечи</b>\n\n"
                "Применяется к последней <b>закрытой</b> MTF-свече.\n"
                "Считается <code>vol_ratio = current / avg20</code>."
            ),
            kb_smc_vol_filter(cfg),
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("smc_set_vol_mult_"))
    async def smc_set_vol_mult(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg = user.get_smc_cfg()
        try:
            new_val = float(cb.data.replace("smc_set_vol_mult_", ""))
        except ValueError:
            await cb.answer("⚠️ invalid value")
            return
        new_val = max(0.5, min(5.0, new_val))  # clamp
        cfg.smc_vol_mult = new_val
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(f"✅ Множитель: x{new_val}")
        await safe_edit(cb,
            (
                "📊 <b>Фильтр объёма свечи</b>\n\n"
                "Применяется к последней <b>закрытой</b> MTF-свече.\n"
                "Считается <code>vol_ratio = current / avg20</code>."
            ),
            kb_smc_vol_filter(cfg),
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_menu_ob_age")
    async def smc_menu_ob_age(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "🕯 <b>Макс. возраст Order Block</b>", kb_smc_ob_age(user.get_smc_cfg()))

    # Сохранение значений
    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("smc_set_tf_"))
    async def smc_set_tf(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.tf_key = cb.data.replace("smc_set_tf_", "")
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.answer(_t("smc_tf_set", _lang, tf=cfg.tf_key))
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("smc_set_interval_"))
    async def smc_set_interval(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.scan_interval = int(cb.data.replace("smc_set_interval_", ""))
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.answer(_t("smc_interval_set", _lang, min=cfg.scan_interval // 60))
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("smc_set_dir_"))
    async def smc_set_dir(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        direction = cb.data.replace("smc_set_dir_", "")
        cfg.direction = direction
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        # Синхронизируем boolean-флаги — именно их читает сканер
        if direction == "LONG":
            user.smc_long_active  = True
            user.smc_short_active = False
        elif direction == "SHORT":
            user.smc_long_active  = False
            user.smc_short_active = True
        else:  # BOTH
            user.smc_long_active  = True
            user.smc_short_active = True
        await um.save(user)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.answer(_t("smc_dir_set", _lang, dir=direction))
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("smc_set_conf_"))
    async def smc_set_conf(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.min_confirmations = int(cb.data.replace("smc_set_conf_", ""))
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.answer(_t("smc_conf_set", _lang, val=cfg.min_confirmations))
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("smc_set_rr_"))
    async def smc_set_rr(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.min_rr = float(cb.data.replace("smc_set_rr_", ""))
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.answer(_t("smc_rr_set", _lang, val=cfg.min_rr))
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("smc_set_sl_"))
    async def smc_set_sl(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("smc_set_vol_"))
    async def smc_set_vol(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.min_volume_usdt = float(cb.data.replace("smc_set_vol_", ""))
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)

        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("smc_set_ob_age_"))
    async def smc_set_ob_age(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.ob_max_age = int(cb.data.replace("smc_set_ob_age_", ""))

        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    # Тогглы (вкл/выкл)
    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_toggle_fvg")
    async def smc_toggle_fvg(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.fvg_enabled = not cfg.fvg_enabled
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.answer("FVG: " + (_t("toggle_on_label", _lang) if cfg.fvg_enabled else _t("toggle_off_label", _lang)))
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_toggle_choch")

        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.choch_enabled = not cfg.choch_enabled
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.answer("CHoCH: " + (_t("toggle_on_label", _lang) if cfg.choch_enabled else _t("toggle_off_label", _lang)))
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_toggle_breaker")
    async def smc_toggle_breaker(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.ob_use_breaker = not cfg.ob_use_breaker
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.answer("Breaker Blocks: " + (_t("toggle_on_label", _lang) if cfg.ob_use_breaker else _t("toggle_off_label", _lang)))
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_toggle_sweep")
    async def smc_toggle_sweep(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.sweep_close_req = not cfg.sweep_close_req
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        _sweep_lbl = "Sweep " + (_t("toggle_on_label", _lang) if cfg.sweep_close_req else _t("toggle_off_label", _lang))
        await cb.answer(_sweep_lbl)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    # ─── SMC СТИЛЬ ТОРГОВЛИ ───────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_toggle_conf_type")
    async def smc_toggle_conf_type(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Переключение: WICK_TOUCH ↔ BODY_CLOSE."""
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cur  = getattr(cfg, "smc_conf_type", "WICK_TOUCH")
        cfg.smc_conf_type = "BODY_CLOSE" if cur == "WICK_TOUCH" else "WICK_TOUCH"
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        label = "Тело свечи (Conservative)" if cfg.smc_conf_type == "BODY_CLOSE" else "Тень/Тело (Aggressive)"
        await cb.answer("📍 Подтверждение: " + label)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_toggle_pd")
    async def smc_toggle_pd(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Переключение P/D фильтра ON/OFF."""
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.smc_pd_filter = not getattr(cfg, "smc_pd_filter", False)
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        state = "ON (Conservative)" if cfg.smc_pd_filter else "OFF (Aggressive)"
        await cb.answer("P/D фильтр: " + state)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_menu_retrace")
    async def smc_menu_retrace(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Открыть подменю выбора глубины OB."""
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, "📏 <b>Глубина входа в Order Block</b>", kb_smc_retrace_depth(user.get_smc_cfg()))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("smc_set_retrace_"))
    async def smc_set_retrace(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Установить глубину ретрейса OB."""
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        try:
            depth = float(cb.data.replace("smc_set_retrace_", ""))
            depth = max(0.0, min(1.0, depth))
        except ValueError:
            depth = 0.0
        cfg.smc_retrace_depth = depth
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        pct   = int(depth * 100)
        label = f"{pct}% OB" if depth > 0 else "Касание края"
        await cb.answer("📏 Вход в OB: " + label)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "smc_toggle_mtf")
    async def smc_toggle_mtf(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Переключение MTF конфлюэнса ON/OFF."""
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        cfg  = user.get_smc_cfg()
        cfg.smc_mtf_check = not getattr(cfg, "smc_mtf_check", False)
        user.set_smc_cfg(cfg)
        await um.save(user)
        state = "ON (Conservative)" if cfg.smc_mtf_check else "OFF (Aggressive)"
        await cb.answer("MTF конфлюэнс: " + state)
        await safe_edit(cb, "🧠 <b>Настройки SMC сканера</b>", kb_smc_main(user))

"""handlers/stats.py — stats handlers."""
from __future__ import annotations
import html as _html  # SECURITY-FIX
import io
import logging

import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from aiogram.types import BufferedInputFile

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext
from aiogram.types import CallbackQuery, InlineKeyboardMarkup, InlineKeyboardButton
from aiogram.exceptions import TelegramBadRequest, TelegramForbiddenError

import database as db
from keyboards import kb_main, kb_back, kb_back_photo
from handlers._common import (
    safe_edit,
    main_text, stats_text, stats_strategy_text,
)

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers.stats")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config, **kwargs):

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "my_stats")
    async def my_stats(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        await cb.answer()
        user   = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        stats  = await db.db_get_user_stats(user.user_id)
        trades = await db.db_get_user_trades(user.user_id)
        text   = stats_text(user, stats)
        kb_stats = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📊 По стратегиям", callback_data="my_stats_strategy")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🗑 Очистить статистику", callback_data="stats_clear_confirm")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Назад", callback_data="back_main")],
        ])
        if not trades or len(trades) < 2:
            await safe_edit(cb, text, kb_stats)
            return
        equity = [0.0]
        for t in trades:
            if t["result"] in ("TP1","TP2","TP3","SL","MANUAL"):
                equity.append(equity[-1] + t["result_rr"])
        plt.figure(figsize=(8, 4))
        color = '#00d26a' if equity[-1] >= 0 else '#f6465d'
        plt.plot(equity, color=color, linewidth=2)
        plt.fill_between(range(len(equity)), equity, alpha=0.1, color=color)
        plt.title("Кривая доходности (Risk/Reward) — @" + (user.username or "Trader"), color='white')
        plt.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)
        plt.gca().set_facecolor('#1e1e2d')
        plt.gcf().patch.set_facecolor('#1e1e2d')
        plt.gca().tick_params(colors='white')
        plt.axhline(0, color='white', linewidth=0.5, alpha=0.5)
        plt.ylabel("Профит (в R)", color='white')
        plt.xlabel("Количество сделок", color='white')
        buf = io.BytesIO()
        plt.savefig(buf, format='png', bbox_inches='tight')
        buf.seek(0); plt.close()
        photo = BufferedInputFile(buf.getvalue(), filename="equity.png")
        kb_photo = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📊 По стратегиям", callback_data="my_stats_strategy")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="🗑 Очистить статистику", callback_data="stats_clear_confirm")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Назад в меню",  callback_data="back_photo_main")],
        ])
        await cb.message.delete()
        await bot.send_photo(chat_id=cb.message.chat.id, photo=photo,
                             caption=text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_photo)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "my_chart")
    async def my_chart(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user   = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        trades = await db.db_get_user_trades(user.user_id)
        closed = [t for t in (trades or []) if t.get("result") in ("TP1","TP2","TP3","SL","MANUAL")]
        if len(closed) < 2:
            await safe_edit(cb, "📈 <b>График доходности</b>\n\nНужно минимум 2 закрытых сделки.", kb_back())
            return
        equity = [0.0]
        for t in closed:
            equity.append(equity[-1] + t["result_rr"])
        color = '#00d26a' if equity[-1] >= 0 else '#f6465d'
        plt.figure(figsize=(8, 4))
        plt.plot(equity, color=color, linewidth=2)
        plt.fill_between(range(len(equity)), equity, alpha=0.1, color=color)
        plt.title("Кривая доходности (R) — @" + (user.username or "Trader"), color='white')
        plt.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)
        plt.gca().set_facecolor('#1e1e2d')
        plt.gcf().patch.set_facecolor('#1e1e2d')
        plt.gca().tick_params(colors='white')
        plt.axhline(0, color='white', linewidth=0.5, alpha=0.5)
        plt.ylabel("Профит (в R)", color='white'); plt.xlabel("Количество сделок", color='white')
        buf = io.BytesIO(); plt.savefig(buf, format='png', bbox_inches='tight'); buf.seek(0); plt.close()
        sign = "+" if equity[-1] >= 0 else ""
        caption = ("📈 <b>График — @" + (user.username or "Trader") + "</b>\n\n" +
                   "Итого: <b>" + sign + "{:.2f}".format(equity[-1]) + "R</b> за " + str(len(closed)) + " сделок")
        photo = BufferedInputFile(buf.getvalue(), filename="chart.png")
        await cb.message.delete()
        await bot.send_photo(chat_id=cb.message.chat.id, photo=photo,
                             caption=caption, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_back_photo())

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "my_stats_strategy")
    async def my_stats_strategy(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user     = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        by_strat = await db.db_get_user_stats_by_strategy(user.user_id)
        text     = stats_strategy_text(user, by_strat)
        kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📊 Общая статистика", callback_data="my_stats")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Назад", callback_data="back_main")],
        ])
        # Если сообщение — фото (stats с графиком), нужно удалить и отправить текст
        if cb.message.photo:
            try:
                await cb.message.delete()
            except Exception:
                pass
            await bot.send_message(cb.message.chat.id, text,
                                   parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb)
        else:
            await safe_edit(cb, text, kb)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "stats_clear_confirm")
    async def stats_clear_confirm(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Запрос подтверждения очистки статистики."""
        await cb.answer()
        kb_confirm = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="✅ Да, очистить", callback_data="stats_clear_do"),
                InlineKeyboardButton(text="❌ Отмена",       callback_data="my_stats"),
            ],
        ])
        text = (
            "🗑 <b>Очистить статистику?</b>\n\n"
            "Это удалит всю историю закрытых сделок безвозвратно.\n"
            "Открытые позиции <b>не будут</b> затронуты.\n\n"
            "⚠️ Действие необратимо."
        )
        try:
            await cb.message.delete()
        except Exception:
            pass
        await bot.send_message(cb.message.chat.id, text,
                               parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_confirm)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "stats_clear_do")
    async def stats_clear_do(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Выполняет очистку статистики."""
        from i18n import t as _t
        _sc_user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        await cb.answer(_t("stats_clearing", getattr(_sc_user, "lang", "ru")), show_alert=False)
        user    = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        deleted = await db.db_clear_user_stats(user.user_id)
        log.info("Stats cleared: user_id=%s deleted=%d trades", user.user_id, deleted)
        kb_back_stats = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="📊 Статистика", callback_data="my_stats")],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Главное меню", callback_data="back_main")],
        ])
        text = (
            "✅ <b>Статистика очищена</b>\n\n"
            f"Удалено сделок: <b>{deleted}</b>\n"
            "График и все показатели сброшены на ноль."
        )
        try:
            await cb.message.delete()
        except Exception:
            pass
        await bot.send_message(cb.message.chat.id, text,
                               parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_back_stats)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "back_photo_main")
    async def back_photo_main(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user  = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        trend = scanner.get_trend()
        try:
            await cb.message.delete()
        except (TelegramBadRequest, TelegramForbiddenError):
            pass  # сообщение уже удалено — норма
        await bot.send_message(cb.message.chat.id, main_text(user, trend),
                               parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_main(user))

"""handlers/subscription.py — subscription callbacks, promo codes, referrals, strategy selection."""
from __future__ import annotations
import html as _html  # SECURITY-FIX
import logging
import time as _time

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.types import Message, CallbackQuery
from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext
from aiogram.fsm.state import State, StatesGroup

import database as db
import turso_sync as _turso
from keyboards import kb_subscribe, kb_main, kb_fsm_cancel
from handlers._common import (
    safe_edit, _fire_task,
    main_text, pricing_text,
    _strategy_text, _kb_strategy_change,
    PromoState,
    _bot_username,
)

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers.subscription")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config, **kwargs):

    PLANS = {
        "plan_beginner":  ("🟢 Beginner — 1 месяц",  "49$"),
        "plan_pro":       ("🔵 Pro — 1 месяц",       "79$"),
        "plan_elite":     ("🟡 Elite — 1 месяц",     "109$"),
    }

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("plan_info_"))
    async def plan_info(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        plan = cb.data.replace("plan_info_", "")
        NL = "\n"
        if plan == "beginner":

                "✅ Pump/Dump просмотр" + NL + NL +
                "❌ Авто-трейд" + NL +
                "❌ SMC / Герчик / Скальпинг" + NL +
                "❌ Бэктест / Оптимизатор" + NL +
                "❌ Polymarket" + NL + NL +
                "💰 <b>Цена: 49$ в месяц</b>"
            )
        elif plan == "pro":
            text = (
                "🔵 <b>Pro — 79$/мес</b>" + NL + NL +
                "Для активной торговли:" + NL + NL +
                "✅ Стратегии: <b>LEVELS + SMC</b>" + NL +
                "✅ LONG + SHORT одновременно" + NL +
                "✅ Авто-трейд <b>без лимитов</b> (все биржи)" + NL +
                "✅ Безлимитный /analyze" + NL +
                "✅ Бэктест: 3 запуска в день" + NL +
                "✅ Pump/Dump алерты + AI" + NL +
                "✅ Watch coin" + NL + NL +
                "❌ Герчик / Скальпинг" + NL +
                "❌ Оптимизатор параметров" + NL +
                "❌ Polymarket" + NL + NL +
                "💰 <b>Цена: 79$ в месяц</b>"
            )
        else:
            text = (
                "🟡 <b>Elite — 109$/мес</b>" + NL + NL +
                "Полный контроль над рынком:" + NL + NL +
                "✅ <b>ВСЕ 4 стратегии:</b> LEVELS, SMC, Герчик, Скальпинг" + NL +
                "✅ Авто-трейд <b>без лимитов</b> (Bybit + BingX + Binance)" + NL +
                "✅ Безлимитный /analyze" + NL +
                "✅ Безлимитный бэктест" + NL +
                "✅ 🧠 AI-оптимизатор параметров" + NL +
                "✅ 🎯 Target Win Rate" + NL +
                "✅ Polymarket AI-прогнозы" + NL +
                "✅ Pump/Dump алерты + AI" + NL +
                "✅ Адаптация к рынку" + NL +
                "✅ Watch coin" + NL + NL +
                "💰 <b>Цена: 109$ в месяц</b>"
            )
        from aiogram.types import InlineKeyboardMarkup, InlineKeyboardButton
        kb = InlineKeyboardMarkup(inline_keyboard=[
            [InlineKeyboardButton(
                text="💳 Оплатить — написать " + config.ADMIN_CONTACT,
                url="https://t.me/crypto_chm",
            )],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(
                text="📚 Академия CHM",
                url="https://chmup.top/academy",
            )],
            [InlineKeyboardButton(text="◀️ Назад к тарифам", callback_data="show_plans")],
        ])
        await safe_edit(cb, text, kb)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("plan_") & ~F.data.startswith("plan_info_"))
    async def plan_selected(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        plan_key = cb.data
        if plan_key not in PLANS:
            return
        plan_name, amount = PLANS[plan_key]
        NL = "\n"
        from i18n import t as _t
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        text = (
            _t("sub_payment_title", _lang) + NL + NL +
            f"{_t('sub_plan', _lang)}: <b>{plan_name} — {amount}</b>" + NL + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            f"{_t('sub_network', _lang)}: <b>{config.PAYMENT_NETWORK}</b>" + NL + NL +
            f"{_t('sub_address', _lang)}:" + NL +
            f"<code>{config.PAYMENT_ADDRESS}</code>" + NL + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            _t("sub_after_payment", _lang) + NL + NL +
            f"{_t('sub_your_id', _lang)}: <code>{cb.from_user.id}</code>"
        )
        from keyboards import kb_payment
        await safe_edit(cb, text, kb_payment(plan_name, amount, config.PAYMENT_ADDRESS))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "show_plans")
    async def show_plans(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        await safe_edit(cb, pricing_text(config), kb_subscribe(config))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "enter_promo")
    async def cb_enter_promo(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await cb.answer()
        await state.set_state(PromoState.waiting_code)
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        from i18n import t as _t
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await cb.message.answer(
            _t("sub_enter_promo", _lang),
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_lang),
        )

    @dp.message(PromoState.waiting_code)
    async def promo_code_input(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        code = msg.text.strip() if msg.text else ""
        user_tmp = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)
        _ptlang = getattr(user_tmp, "lang", "ru")
        if not code:
            from i18n import t as _t
            await msg.answer(_t("sub_promo_empty", _ptlang))
            return
        ok, text, hours = await db.db_promo_validate_and_use(msg.from_user.id, code)
        if not ok:
            await msg.answer(text)
            return
        # Выдаём / продлеваем доступ
        user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id, msg.from_user.username or "")
        # Вариант A: продлеваем от текущего sub_expires (или от now, если истёк)
        base = max(user.sub_expires, _time.time())
        user.sub_expires = base + hours * 3600
        user.sub_status  = "active"
        await um.save(user)
        _fire_task(_turso.turso_push(config.DB_PATH), name="turso_push")
        from i18n import t as _t
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await msg.answer(
            _t("sub_promo_ok", _lang, hours=hours),
            parse_mode="HTML",
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "my_referral")
    async def cb_my_referral(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        uid  = cb.from_user.id
        stat = await db.db_ref_stats(uid)
        import handlers._common as _c
        link = f"https://t.me/{_c._bot_username}?start=ref_{uid}" if _c._bot_username else f"start=ref_{uid}"
        NL   = "\n"
        text = (
            "👥 <b>Реферальная программа</b>" + NL + NL +
            "Приглашайте друзей по своей ссылке." + NL +
            "После того как <b>5 приглашённых купят подписку</b> — вы получаете <b>30 дней бесплатно</b>!" + NL + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            "🔗 Ваша реферальная ссылка:" + NL +
            f"<code>{link}</code>" + NL + NL +
            f"📊 Приглашено: <b>{stat['total']}</b>" + NL +
            f"💰 Купили подписку: <b>{stat['converted']}</b>" + NL +
            f"🎁 Наград получено: <b>{stat['rewards']}</b> × 30 дней" + NL +
            f"⏳ До следующей награды: ещё <b>{stat['until_next']}</b> покупок"
        )
        await cb.message.answer(text, parse_mode="HTML")

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("strategy_"))
    async def cb_strategy(cb: CallbackQuery):
        choice = cb.data.replace("strategy_", "")   # "levels" | "smc" | "gerchik" | "scalping"
        strategy_map = {"levels": "LEVELS", "smc": "SMC", "gerchik": "GERCHIK", "scalping": "SCALPING"}
        strategy = strategy_map.get(choice)
        from i18n import t as _t
        if not strategy:
            await cb.answer(_t("sub_unknown_strategy", "ru"), show_alert=True); return

        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _slang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if strategy == "SMC" and not user.can("smc"):
            await cb.answer(_t("sub_smc_locked", _slang), show_alert=True); return
        if strategy == "GERCHIK" and not user.can("gerchik"):
            await cb.answer(_t("sub_gerchik_locked", _slang), show_alert=True); return
        if strategy == "SCALPING" and not user.can("scalping"):
            await cb.answer(_t("sub_scalping_locked", _slang), show_alert=True); return
        # При переключении на SCALPING — включить скальпинг, выключить остальные сканеры
        if strategy == "SCALPING":
            user.scalping_active = True
            user.long_active     = False
            user.short_active    = False
            user.gerchik_active  = False
        # При переключении с SCALPING — выключить скальпинг
        elif getattr(user, "strategy", "") == "SCALPING":
            user.scalping_active = False
        user.strategy = strategy
        await um.save(user)
        from i18n import t as _t
        lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        strat_key = {"LEVELS": "sub_strat_levels", "SMC": "sub_strat_smc",
                     "GERCHIK": "sub_strat_gerchik", "SCALPING": "sub_strat_scalping"}.get(strategy, "sub_strat_levels")
        label = _t(strat_key, lang)
        await cb.answer("✅ " + _t("strat_changed", lang) + ": " + label, show_alert=False)

        trend = scanner.get_trend() if hasattr(scanner, "get_trend") else {}
        await safe_edit(cb, main_text(user, trend), kb_main(user))


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/handlers/trading.py
================================================================================
"""handlers/trading.py — auto-trading, exchange setup, positions, export handlers."""
from __future__ import annotations
import asyncio
import html as _html  # AUDIT: BUG-003 — escape exchange error messages in HTML
import logging
import time

from aiogram import Bot, Dispatcher, F
from aiogram.filters import Command
from aiogram.types import Message, CallbackQuery
from aiogram.fsm.context import FSMContext

import database as db
from i18n import t as _t
from keyboards import (
    kb_auto_trade,
    kb_at_exchange, kb_at_mode, kb_at_risk, kb_at_leverage, kb_at_maxtr, kb_at_api, kb_at_period,
    kb_fsm_cancel,
)
from handlers._common import (
    safe_edit, _fire_task,
    access_denied_text,
    SetupBybitState, SetupBingXState, SetupBinanceState, MaxTradesState,
    _exec_trade_locks,
)

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Handlers.trading")


def register_handlers(dp: Dispatcher, bot: Bot, um, scanner, config, **kwargs):

    async def _auto_trade_text(user: UserSettings) -> str:
        at        = getattr(user, "auto_trade",        False)
        mode      = getattr(user, "auto_trade_mode",   "confirm")
        risk      = getattr(user, "trade_risk_pct",    1.0)
        lev       = getattr(user, "trade_leverage",    10)
        max_tr    = getattr(user, "max_trades_limit",  5)
        exchange  = getattr(user, "trade_exchange",    "bybit")
        period    = getattr(user, "at_stats_period",   1)
        has_bybit   = bool(getattr(user, "bybit_api_key", "")) and bool(getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", ""))
        has_bingx   = bool(getattr(user, "bingx_api_key", "")) and bool(getattr(user, "bingx_api_secret", ""))
        has_binance = bool(getattr(user, "binance_api_key", "")) and bool(getattr(user, "binance_api_secret", ""))
        if exchange == "bingx":
            has_key = has_bingx
        elif exchange == "binance":
            has_key = has_binance
        else:
            has_key = has_bybit
        NL = "\n"
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        mode_label  = _t("at_mode_confirm", _lang) if mode == "confirm" else _t("at_mode_auto", _lang)
        limit_label = _t("at_limit_unlim", _lang) if max_tr == 0 else str(max_tr)
        exch_label  = {"bybit": "Bybit", "bingx": "BingX", "binance": "Binance"}.get(exchange, exchange.capitalize())
        period_label = {1: _t("period_24h", _lang), 7: _t("period_7d", _lang), 30: _t("period_30d", _lang)}.get(period, _t("period_24h", _lang))

        # Загружаем статистику из БД с нужным периодом
        stats = await db.db_get_auto_stats_period(user.user_id, period) if has_key else None

        _status = _t("at_status_on", _lang) if at else _t("at_status_off", _lang)
        text = (
            _t("at_title", _lang, exchange=exch_label) + NL + NL +
            f"{'Status' if _lang == 'en' else 'Статус'}: " + _status + NL +
            f"{'Mode' if _lang == 'en' else 'Режим'}:  <b>" + mode_label + "</b>" + NL +
            f"{_t('at_risk_label', _lang)}:   <b>" + str(risk) + "%</b>" + NL +
            f"{_t('at_leverage_label', _lang)}:  <b>x" + str(lev) + "</b>" + NL +
            f"{_t('at_limit_label', _lang)}:  <b>" + limit_label + f" {_t('at_trades_label', _lang)}</b>" + NL +
            "Bybit API: " + ("✅" if has_bybit else "❌") +
            "   BingX API: " + ("✅" if has_bingx else "❌") +
            "   Binance API: " + ("✅" if has_binance else "❌")
        )
        text += (
            NL + NL +
            "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" + NL +
            "⚠️ <b>Обязательные условия:</b>" + NL +
            "• Используйте <b>суб-аккаунт</b> биржи (не основной!)" + NL +
            "• Убедитесь что режим <b>Хеджирования ВЫКЛЮЧЕН</b>" + NL +
            "  (One-Way Mode / Односторонний режим)"
        )

        if stats:
            open_now   = stats["open_now"]
            tp_total   = stats["tp1"] + stats["tp2"] + stats["tp3"]
            sl_total   = stats["sl"]
            be_total   = stats.get("be", 0)
            winrate    = stats["winrate_pct"]
            closed     = stats["closed"]
            rr         = stats["total_rr"]
            rr_sign    = "+" if rr >= 0 else ""
            best       = stats.get("best_symbol", "")
            worst      = stats.get("worst_symbol", "")

            # Строка BE (показываем только если есть)
            be_line = f"  |  ♻️ BE: <b>{be_total}</b>" if be_total > 0 else ""

            text += (
                NL + NL +
                _t("at_stats_title", _lang, period=period_label) + NL +
                f"{_t('at_opened_label', _lang)}: <b>{stats['trades_opened']}</b>  |  {_t('at_open_now', _lang)}: <b>{open_now}</b>" + NL +
                f"✅ TP1: <b>{stats['tp1']}</b>  🎯 TP2: <b>{stats['tp2']}</b>  💎 TP3: <b>{stats['tp3']}</b>" + NL +
                f"❌ {_t('at_stoploss', _lang)}: <b>{sl_total}</b>{be_line}" + NL +
                f"📈 Win Rate: <b>{winrate}%</b> ({tp_total}/{closed})" + NL +
                f"💰 {_t('at_total_pnl', _lang)}: <b>{rr_sign}{rr:.2f}R</b>"
            )
            if best:
                text += NL + f"🏆 {_t('at_best_coin', _lang)}: <b>{best.replace('-USDT-SWAP','').replace('-USDT','')}</b>"
            if worst and worst != best:
                text += f"  |  📉 {_t('at_worst_coin', _lang)}: <b>{worst.replace('-USDT-SWAP','').replace('-USDT','')}</b>"

        text += (
            NL + NL +
            "⚠️ <i>Используй только собственные API-ключи.\n"
            "Разрешение: только Contract Trade. Без Withdraw!</i>"
        )
        return text

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "auto_trade_menu")
    async def auto_trade_menu(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, reason = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await cb.message.answer(_t("sub_expired", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"))); return
        await safe_edit(cb, await _auto_trade_text(user), kb_auto_trade(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_bybit_demo")  # PROP-DEMO
    async def toggle_bybit_demo(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        current = bool(getattr(user, "bybit_demo", False))
        user.bybit_demo = not current
        await um.save(user)
        # Инвалидируем кэшированную pybit-сессию
        _api_key = getattr(user, "bybit_api_key", "")
        if _api_key:
            import bybit_trader
            bybit_trader.invalidate_pybit_session(_api_key)
        mode_label = "Demo (Prop)" if user.bybit_demo else "Live"
        await cb.answer(f"Bybit: {mode_label}", show_alert=False)
        await safe_edit(cb, reply_markup=kb_auto_trade(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "prop_enter_code")
    async def cb_prop_enter_code(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await cb.answer()
        from handlers._common import PropCodeState
        from keyboards import kb_fsm_cancel
        _lang = getattr((await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)), "lang", "ru")
        await state.set_state(PropCodeState.waiting_code)
        await cb.message.answer(
            "🔑 <b>Введи промокод Prop Autopilot:</b>",
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_lang),
        )

    from handlers._common import PropCodeState

    @dp.message(PropCodeState.waiting_code)
    async def prop_code_input(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        code = (msg.text or "").strip().upper()
        if not code:
            await msg.answer("❌ Пустой промокод"); return
        ok, text = await db.db_prop_code_validate(msg.from_user.id, code)
        if ok:
            user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)
            from keyboards import kb_prop_menu
            await msg.answer(
                f"🏆 {text}\n\nТеперь настрой challenge:",
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=kb_prop_menu(user),
            )
        else:
            from keyboards import kb_prop_locked
            await msg.answer(text, reply_markup=kb_prop_locked())

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "prop_toggle")
    async def cb_prop_toggle(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.prop_mode = not user.prop_mode
        await um.save(user)
        label = "ON ✅" if user.prop_mode else "OFF"
        await cb.answer(f"Prop Autopilot: {label}")
        from keyboards import kb_prop_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, "🏆 <b>Prop Autopilot</b>\n\nУправление prop-challenge:", kb_prop_menu(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("prop_set_firm_"))
    async def cb_prop_set_firm(cb: CallbackQuery):
        firm_key = cb.data.replace("prop_set_firm_", "")
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        if firm_key != "CUSTOM":
            from prop_pilot import PRESETS
            preset = PRESETS.get(firm_key)
            if preset:
                user.prop_firm = firm_key
                user.prop_target = preset.target_pct
                user.prop_max_dd = preset.max_dd_pct
                user.prop_daily_limit = preset.daily_limit_pct
                user.prop_min_days = preset.min_days
                user.prop_max_days = preset.max_days
                user.prop_trailing_dd = preset.trailing_dd
                user.prop_consistency = preset.consistency
                await um.save(user)
                await cb.answer(f"✅ {preset.label}")
            else:
                await cb.answer("❌ Неизвестный пресет")
                return
        else:
            user.prop_firm = "CUSTOM"
            await um.save(user)
            await cb.answer("✅ Custom — настрой параметры вручную")
        from keyboards import kb_prop_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, "🏆 <b>Prop Autopilot</b>\n\nУправление prop-challenge:", kb_prop_menu(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "prop_refresh")
    async def cb_prop_refresh(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer("🔄 Обновляю баланс...")
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        exchange = getattr(user, "trade_exchange", "bybit")
        _demo = bool(getattr(user, "bybit_demo", False))
        if exchange == "bingx":
            api_key = getattr(user, "bingx_api_key", "")
            api_secret = getattr(user, "bingx_api_secret", "")
        elif exchange == "binance":
            api_key = getattr(user, "binance_api_key", "")
            api_secret = getattr(user, "binance_api_secret", "")
        else:
            api_key = getattr(user, "bybit_api_key", "")
            api_secret = getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", "")
        if not api_key:
            await cb.message.answer("❌ API ключи не настроены"); return
        try:
            if exchange == "bingx":
                import bingx_trader; bal = await bingx_trader.get_balance(api_key, api_secret)
            elif exchange == "binance":
                import binance_trader; bal = await binance_trader.get_balance(api_key, api_secret)
            else:
                import bybit_trader; bal = await bybit_trader.get_balance(api_key, api_secret, demo=_demo)
        except Exception as e:
            await cb.message.answer(f"❌ Ошибка: {_html.escape(str(e)[:200])}"); return
        if not user.prop_start_balance or user.prop_start_balance <= 0:
            user.prop_start_balance = bal
            user.prop_start_date = time.time()
            user.prop_day_start_balance = bal
        from keyboards import kb_prop_menu
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.message.answer(
            f"✅ Баланс: <b>${bal:,.2f}</b>\n"
            f"Стартовый: <b>${user.prop_start_balance:,.2f}</b>",
            parse_mode="HTML",
        )
        await safe_edit(cb, "🏆 <b>Prop Autopilot</b>", kb_prop_menu(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "prop_dashboard")
    async def cb_prop_dashboard(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        exchange = getattr(user, "trade_exchange", "bybit")
        _demo = bool(getattr(user, "bybit_demo", False))
        if exchange == "bingx":
            api_key = getattr(user, "bingx_api_key", "")
            api_secret = getattr(user, "bingx_api_secret", "")
        elif exchange == "binance":
            api_key = getattr(user, "binance_api_key", "")
            api_secret = getattr(user, "binance_api_secret", "")
        else:
            api_key = getattr(user, "bybit_api_key", "")
            api_secret = getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", "")
        bal = 0.0
        try:
            if exchange == "bingx":
                import bingx_trader; bal = await bingx_trader.get_balance(api_key, api_secret)
            elif exchange == "binance":
                import binance_trader; bal = await binance_trader.get_balance(api_key, api_secret)
            else:
                import bybit_trader; bal = await bybit_trader.get_balance(api_key, api_secret, demo=_demo)
        except Exception:
            pass
        if bal <= 0:
            await cb.message.answer("❌ Не удалось получить баланс"); return
        from prop_pilot import build_challenge_state, format_dashboard, PRESETS
        _cs = build_challenge_state(user, bal)
        _base = float(getattr(user, "prop_base_risk", 1.0) or 1.0)
        _firm = getattr(user, "prop_firm", "")
        _label = PRESETS[_firm].label if _firm in PRESETS else (_firm or "Custom")
        text = format_dashboard(_cs, _base, _label)
        from keyboards import kb_prop_menu
        await safe_edit(cb, text, kb_prop_menu(user))

    # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "toggle_auto_trade")
    async def toggle_auto_trade(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()  # ACK сразу — до любых await, чтобы не словить "query is too old"
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if not has:
            await cb.message.answer(_t("at_no_access", _lang)); return
        if not user.can("auto_trade"):
            await cb.answer(_t("at_pro_required", _lang), show_alert=True); return
        exchange    = getattr(user, "trade_exchange", "bybit")
        has_bybit   = bool(getattr(user, "bybit_api_key", "")) and bool(getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", ""))
        has_bingx   = bool(getattr(user, "bingx_api_key", "")) and bool(getattr(user, "bingx_api_secret", ""))
        has_binance = bool(getattr(user, "binance_api_key", "")) and bool(getattr(user, "binance_api_secret", ""))
        if exchange == "bingx":
            has_key = has_bingx
        elif exchange == "binance":
            has_key = has_binance
        else:
            has_key = has_bybit
        if not has_key:
            exch = {"bybit": "Bybit", "bingx": "BingX", "binance": "Binance"}.get(exchange, exchange.capitalize())
            await cb.message.answer(_t("at_api_missing", _lang, exch=exch)); return
        user.auto_trade = not user.auto_trade
        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, await _auto_trade_text(user), kb_auto_trade(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.in_({"set_at_mode_confirm", "set_at_mode_auto"}))
    async def set_at_mode(cb: CallbackQuery):

        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, await _auto_trade_text(user), kb_at_mode(user))

        except ValueError:

        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(f"✅ Риск: {user.trade_risk_pct}%")
        await safe_edit(cb, await _auto_trade_text(user), kb_at_risk(user))
