    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("set_at_maxtr_"))
    async def set_at_maxtr(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        val = cb.data.split("_")[-1]
        if val == "custom":
            await cb.answer()
            await state.set_state(MaxTradesState.waiting)
            _cu = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            _cl = getattr(_cu, "lang", "ru")
            await cb.message.answer(
                _t("at_max_trades_prompt", _cl),
                parse_mode="HTML",
                reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_cl),
            )
            return
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        try:
            user.max_trades_limit = int(val)
        except ValueError:
            await cb.answer("❌"); return
        await um.save(user)
        await cb.answer(f"✅ Макс. сделок: {val}")
        await safe_edit(cb, await _auto_trade_text(user), kb_at_maxtr(user))

    @dp.message(MaxTradesState.waiting)
    async def set_at_maxtr_custom_input(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        await state.clear()
        user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)
        _ml = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        try:
            val = int(msg.text.strip())
        except (ValueError, AttributeError):
            await msg.answer(_t("at_max_trades_invalid", _ml), parse_mode="HTML")
            return
        if val < 0 or val > 9999:
            await msg.answer(_t("at_max_trades_range", _ml))
            return
        user.max_trades_limit = val
        await um.save(user)
        label = _t("at_limit_unlim_label", _ml) if val == 0 else _t("at_trades_count_label", _ml, n=val)
        await msg.answer(
            _t("at_max_trades_saved", _ml, label=label),
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_auto_trade(user),
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "clear_stuck_trades")
    async def clear_stuck_trades(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        uid = cb.from_user.id
        try:
            user = await um.get_or_create(uid)
            _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
            count = await db.db_force_close_all_open_trades(uid)
            if count > 0:
                await cb.message.answer(
                    _t("at_stuck_cleared", _lang, count=count),
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
            else:
                await cb.message.answer(_t("at_no_stuck", _lang))
        except Exception as e:
            log.error("clear_stuck_trades uid=%s: %s", uid, e)
            _lang_err = "ru"
            try:
                _u_err = await um.get_or_create(uid)
                _lang_err = getattr(_u_err, "lang", "ru")
            except Exception:
                pass
            await cb.message.answer(_t("at_clean_error", _lang_err))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "setup_bybit_api")
    async def setup_bybit_api(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await cb.message.answer(_t("sub_expired", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"))); return
        _bsl = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await state.set_state(SetupBybitState.api_key)
        await state.update_data(lang=_bsl)
        await cb.message.answer(
            _t("bybit_setup_prompt", _bsl),
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_bsl),
        )

    @dp.message(SetupBybitState.api_key)
    async def bybit_api_key_input(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        _d = await state.get_data(); _l = _d.get("lang", "ru")
        key = (msg.text or "").strip()
        if len(key) < 10:
            await msg.answer(_t("api_key_too_short", _l))
            return
        await state.update_data(api_key=key)
        await state.set_state(SetupBybitState.api_secret)
        await msg.answer(
            _t("api_key_received", _l),
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_l),
        )

    @dp.message(SetupBybitState.api_secret)
    async def bybit_api_secret_input(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        data    = await state.get_data()
        _l      = data.get("lang", "ru")
        secret  = (msg.text or "").strip()
        if len(secret) < 10:
            await msg.answer(_t("api_secret_too_short", _l))
            return
        api_key = data.get("api_key", "")
        await state.clear()

        wait = await msg.answer(_t("api_connecting_bybit", _l))
        try:
            import bybit_trader
            # PROP-DEMO: pass demo flag when testing connection
            _demo = bool(getattr((await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)), "bybit_demo", False))
            result = await bybit_trader.test_connection(api_key, secret, demo=_demo)
        except Exception as e:
            await wait.delete()
            await msg.answer(_t("api_error_generic", _l, err=_html.escape(str(e))))
            return

        await wait.delete()
        if result["ok"]:
            user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)
            user.bybit_api_key    = api_key
            user.bybit_api_secret = secret
            # Auto-detect endpoint: если бот переключился на другой endpoint — сохранить
            if result.get("_switched"):
                actual_demo = result.get("endpoint") == "demo"
                user.bybit_demo = actual_demo
                # Инвалидируем сессию чтобы пересоздать с правильным demo
                bybit_trader.invalidate_pybit_session(api_key)
                endpoint_label = "Demo (api-demo.bybit.com)" if actual_demo else "Live (api.bybit.com)"
                await um.save(user)
                await msg.answer(
                    _t("bybit_connected", _l, balance=result["balance"]) +
                    f"\n\n🔄 <b>Авто-определение:</b> ключ работает на <b>{endpoint_label}</b>.\n"
                    f"Режим переключён автоматически.",
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
            else:
                await um.save(user)
                await msg.answer(_t("bybit_connected", _l, balance=result["balance"]), parse_mode="HTML")
        else:
            await msg.answer(
                _t("bybit_connect_fail", _l, error=_html.escape(str(result.get("error", "?")))),
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "test_bybit_api")
    async def test_bybit_api(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        api_key    = getattr(user, "bybit_api_key",    "")
        api_secret = getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", "")
        _tbl = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        if not api_key or not api_secret:
            await cb.message.answer(_t("bybit_not_setup", _tbl)); return
        wait = await cb.message.answer(_t("api_connecting", _tbl))
        try:
            import bybit_trader
            _demo = bool(getattr(user, "bybit_demo", False))  # PROP-DEMO
            result = await bybit_trader.test_connection(api_key, api_secret, demo=_demo)
        except Exception as e:
            await wait.delete()
            await cb.message.answer(_t("api_error_generic", _tbl, err=_html.escape(str(e))))
            return
        await wait.delete()
        if result["ok"]:
            await cb.message.answer(_t("bybit_ok", _tbl, balance=result["balance"]), parse_mode="HTML")
        else:
            await cb.message.answer(_t("bybit_conn_fail", _tbl, error=_html.escape(str(result.get("error", "?")))), parse_mode="HTML")

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "remove_bybit_api")
    async def remove_bybit_api(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.bybit_api_key    = ""
        user.bybit_api_secret = ""
        user.auto_trade       = False
        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, await _auto_trade_text(user), kb_auto_trade(user))

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("exec_trade_"))
    async def exec_trade(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Пользователь нажал '✅ Открыть сделку на бирже'."""
        await cb.answer()  # ACK сразу — до любых await
        trade_id = cb.data[len("exec_trade_"):]

        # Защита от двойного нажатия: если для этого trade_id уже есть активная блокировка
        lock = _exec_trade_locks.setdefault(trade_id, asyncio.Lock())
        if lock.locked():
            await cb.answer(_t("exec_trade_locked", "ru"), show_alert=True)
            return

        async with lock:
            user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
            has, _ = user.check_access()
            if not has:
                await cb.message.answer(_t("sub_expired", getattr(user, "lang", "ru")))
                return

            exchange   = getattr(user, "trade_exchange",    "bybit")
            if exchange == "bingx":
                api_key    = getattr(user, "bingx_api_key",    "")
                api_secret = getattr(user, "bingx_api_secret", "")
            elif exchange == "binance":
                api_key    = getattr(user, "binance_api_key",    "")
                api_secret = getattr(user, "binance_api_secret", "")
            else:
                api_key    = getattr(user, "bybit_api_key",    "")
                api_secret = getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", "")

            _ul = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
            if not api_key or not api_secret:
                exch_name = {"bybit": "Bybit", "bingx": "BingX", "binance": "Binance"}.get(exchange, exchange.capitalize())
                await cb.message.answer(
                    _t("exec_api_not_setup", _ul, exch=exch_name),
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
                return

            # Показываем статус сразу
            try:
                await cb.message.edit_text(_t("exec_opening", _ul), parse_mode="HTML")
            except Exception:
                pass

            trade = await db.db_get_trade(trade_id)
            if not trade:
                await cb.message.answer(_t("exec_signal_stale", _ul))
                return

            if trade.get("result", ""):
                await cb.message.answer(_t("exec_already_opened", _ul))
                return

            if trade.get("order_id", ""):
                await cb.answer(_t("exec_already_on_exchange", _ul), show_alert=True)
                return

            max_trades = getattr(user, "max_trades_limit", 5)
            open_count = await db.db_count_open_trades(user.user_id)
            if max_trades > 0 and open_count >= max_trades:
                await cb.answer(
                    _t("exec_limit_reached", _ul, open=open_count, max=max_trades),
                    show_alert=True,
                )
                return

            if await db.db_has_open_trade_for_symbol(user.user_id, trade["symbol"]):
                sym_label = trade["symbol"].replace("-USDT-SWAP", "").replace("-USDT", "")
                await cb.message.answer(
                    _t("exec_dup_symbol", _ul, sym=sym_label),
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
                return

            exch_label = {"bybit": "Bybit", "bingx": "BingX", "binance": "Binance"}.get(exchange, exchange.capitalize())
            wait = await cb.message.answer(_t("exec_placing_order", _ul, exch=exch_label))
            try:
                risk_pct = getattr(user, "trade_risk_pct", 1.0)
                leverage = getattr(user, "trade_leverage", 10)
                is_smc   = trade.get("breakout_type", "") == "SMC"
                entry_lo = float(trade.get("entry_lo") or 0)
                entry_hi = float(trade.get("entry_hi") or 0)

                if exchange in ("bingx", "binance"):
                    # BingX/Binance: split-entry не поддерживается — всегда place_trade
                    if exchange == "bingx":
                        import bingx_trader as _trader
                    else:
                        import binance_trader as _trader  # type: ignore[no-redef]
                    result = await _trader.place_trade(
                        api_key, api_secret,
                        trade["symbol"],
                        trade["direction"],
                        float(trade["entry"]),
                        float(trade["sl"]),
                        float(trade["tp1"]),
                        risk_pct, leverage,
                        tp2=float(trade.get("tp2") or 0),
                        tp3=float(trade.get("tp3") or 0),
                    )
                    if result.get("ok"):
                        await db.db_update_trade_bybit(
                            trade_id,
                            result.get("order_id", ""),
                            result.get("pos_idx", 0),
                        )
                    text = _trader.format_trade_result(
                        result,
                        trade["direction"],
                        trade["symbol"],
                        float(trade["entry"]),
                        float(trade["sl"]),
                        float(trade["tp1"]),
                        risk_pct, leverage,
                        tp2=float(trade.get("tp2") or 0),
                        tp3=float(trade.get("tp3") or 0),
                    )
                elif is_smc and entry_lo > 0 and entry_hi > 0:
                    import bybit_trader
                    result = await bybit_trader.place_trade_split(
                        api_key, api_secret,
                        trade["symbol"],
                        trade["direction"],
                        entry_lo, entry_hi,
                        float(trade["sl"]),
                        float(trade["tp1"]),
                        risk_pct, leverage,
                        tp2=float(trade.get("tp2") or 0),
                        tp3=float(trade.get("tp3") or 0),
                    )
                    if result.get("ok"):
                        await db.db_update_trade_bybit(
                            trade_id,
                            result.get("order_id", ""),
                            result.get("pos_idx", 0),
                        )
                        await db.db_update_trade_tp_placed(
                            trade_id, 1 if result.get("tp_placed") else 0
                        )
                    text = bybit_trader.format_trade_result_split(
                        result,
                        trade["direction"],
                        trade["symbol"],
                        entry_lo, entry_hi,
                        float(trade["sl"]),
                        float(trade["tp1"]),
                        risk_pct, leverage,
                        tp2=float(trade.get("tp2") or 0),
                        tp3=float(trade.get("tp3") or 0),
                    )
                else:
                    import bybit_trader
                    result = await bybit_trader.place_trade(
                        api_key, api_secret,
                        trade["symbol"],
                        trade["direction"],
                        float(trade["entry"]),
                        float(trade["sl"]),
                        float(trade["tp1"]),
                        risk_pct, leverage,
                        tp2=float(trade.get("tp2") or 0),
                        tp3=float(trade.get("tp3") or 0),
                    )
                    if result.get("ok"):
                        await db.db_update_trade_bybit(
                            trade_id,
                            result.get("order_id", ""),
                            result.get("pos_idx", 0),
                        )
                        await db.db_update_trade_tp_placed(
                            trade_id, 1 if result.get("tp_placed") else 0
                        )
                    text = bybit_trader.format_trade_result(
                        result,
                        trade["direction"],
                        trade["symbol"],
                        float(trade["entry"]),
                        float(trade["sl"]),
                        float(trade["tp1"]),
                        risk_pct, leverage,
                        tp2=float(trade.get("tp2") or 0),
                        tp3=float(trade.get("tp3") or 0),
                    )
            except Exception as e:
                log.error(f"exec_trade {trade_id}: {e}")
                text = f"❌ Ошибка открытия сделки:\n{e}"

            await wait.delete()
            await cb.message.answer(text, parse_mode="HTML")


    # ─── ПАНЕЛЬ ПОЗИЦИЙ BYBIT ──────────────────────────

    def _fmt_bybit_dashboard(positions: list, orders: list, summary: dict) -> str:
        NL = "\n"
        eq       = summary.get("equity", 0.0)
        upnl     = summary.get("unrealized_pnl", 0.0)
        avail    = summary.get("available", 0.0)
        pnl24    = summary.get("closed_pnl_24h", 0.0)
        trades24 = summary.get("trades_24h", 0)
        wins24   = summary.get("wins_24h", 0)

        upnl_str = ("+$" if upnl >= 0 else "-$") + f"{abs(upnl):.2f}"
        pnl24_str = ("+$" if pnl24 >= 0 else "-$") + f"{abs(pnl24):.2f}"

        lines = [
            "📊 <b>BYBIT — Панель управления</b>" + NL,
            f"💰 Баланс: <b>${eq:.2f}</b>   💵 Доступно: <b>${avail:.2f}</b>",
            f"📈 Нереализ. P&L: <b>{upnl_str}</b>",
        ]

        # Открытые позиции
        open_pos = [p for p in positions if float(p.get("size", 0)) > 0]
        if open_pos:
            lines.append(NL + f"─── Открытые позиции ({len(open_pos)}) ───")
            for pos in open_pos:
                sym      = pos.get("symbol", "")
                side     = pos.get("side", "")
                size     = pos.get("size", "0")
                entry    = float(pos.get("entryPrice", 0) or 0)
                mark     = float(pos.get("markPrice", 0) or 0)
                pos_upnl = float(pos.get("unrealisedPnl", 0) or 0)
                lev      = pos.get("leverage", "?")
                sl_raw   = pos.get("stopLoss", "0") or "0"
                sl       = float(sl_raw)

                dir_em   = "🟢 LONG" if side == "Buy" else "🔴 SHORT"
                upnl_em  = ("+" if pos_upnl >= 0 else "") + f"${pos_upnl:.2f}"
                pct = ((mark - entry) / entry * 100) if entry > 0 else 0.0
                if side == "Sell":
                    pct = -pct

                sl_line = f"   🛑 SL: <code>{sl:.6g}</code>" if sl > 0 else ""
                lines.append(
                    f"{dir_em} <b>{sym}</b> x{lev}   📦 {size}" + NL +
                    f"   🎯 Вход: <code>{entry:.6g}</code>  →  Сейчас: <code>{mark:.6g}</code>" + NL +
                    f"   💹 P&L: <b>{upnl_em}</b> ({pct:+.1f}%)" +
                    (NL + sl_line if sl_line else "")
                )
        else:
            lines.append(NL + "─── Открытых позиций нет ───")

        # Ожидающие ордера
        if orders:
            lines.append(NL + f"─── Ожидающие ордера ({len(orders)}) ───")
            for order in orders[:10]:
                sym    = order.get("symbol", "")
                side_o = order.get("side", "")
                price  = order.get("price", "?")
                qty    = order.get("qty", "?")
                reduce = " [TP]" if order.get("reduceOnly") else ""
                em     = "🟢" if side_o == "Buy" else "🔴"
                lines.append(f"  {em} {sym} {side_o} Limit <code>{price}</code>  ({qty}){reduce}")
            if len(orders) > 10:
                lines.append(f"  … ещё {len(orders) - 10} ордеров")
        else:
            lines.append(NL + "─── Ожидающих ордеров нет ───")

        # 24ч статистика
        lines.append(NL + "─── За последние 24 часа ───")
        wr_str = f"  Win: {wins24}/{trades24} ({int(wins24/trades24*100)}%)" if trades24 > 0 else ""
        lines.append(f"📊 Закрыто сделок: <b>{trades24}</b>{wr_str}")
        lines.append(f"💵 Реализов. P&L: <b>{pnl24_str}</b>")

        return NL.join(lines)

    async def _load_bybit_dashboard(api_key: str, api_secret: str, demo: bool = False):
        """Загружает все данные за одно подключение к Bybit (быстро)."""
        import bybit_trader as _bt
        return await _bt.get_dashboard(api_key, api_secret, demo=demo)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "bybit_pos")
    async def bybit_positions(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _bpl = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("at_no_access_short", _bpl), show_alert=True); return
        api_key    = getattr(user, "bybit_api_key",    "")
        api_secret = getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", "")
        if not api_key:
            await cb.answer(_t("api_not_setup", _bpl), show_alert=True); return

        try:
            await cb.message.edit_text("⏳ Bybit...", parse_mode="HTML")
        except Exception:
            pass

        _demo = bool(getattr(user, "bybit_demo", False))
        try:
            positions, orders, summary = await _load_bybit_dashboard(api_key, api_secret, demo=_demo)
        except Exception as e:
            await cb.message.edit_text(_t("api_error_generic", _bpl, err=_html.escape(str(e))), parse_mode="HTML")
            return

        from keyboards import kb_bybit_dashboard
        text = _fmt_bybit_dashboard(positions, orders, summary)
        kb   = kb_bybit_dashboard(positions, orders)
        try:
            await cb.message.edit_text(text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb)
        except Exception:
            await cb.message.answer(text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bybit_pos_close_") & ~F.data.startswith("bybit_pos_close_ok_"))
    async def bybit_pos_close_ask(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Запрашивает подтверждение закрытия позиции."""
        # callback: bybit_pos_close_{symbol}_{pos_idx}
        parts = cb.data[len("bybit_pos_close_"):].rsplit("_", 1)
        if len(parts) != 2:
            await cb.answer(_t("api_format_error", "ru"), show_alert=True); return
        symbol, pos_idx_s = parts[0], parts[1]
        try:
            pos_idx = int(pos_idx_s)
        except ValueError:
            await cb.answer(_t("api_format_error", "ru"), show_alert=True); return

        from keyboards import kb_close_confirm
        await safe_edit(
            cb,
            f"⚠️ <b>Закрыть {symbol} по рынку?</b>\n\nЭто действие нельзя отменить.",
            kb_close_confirm(symbol, pos_idx),
        )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bybit_pos_close_ok_"))
    async def bybit_pos_close_confirm(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Закрывает позицию маркет-ордером."""
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _pcl = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        api_key    = getattr(user, "bybit_api_key",    "")
        api_secret = getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", "")
        if not api_key:
            await cb.answer(_t("api_not_setup", _pcl), show_alert=True); return

        # callback: bybit_pos_close_ok_{symbol}_{pos_idx}
        parts = cb.data[len("bybit_pos_close_ok_"):].rsplit("_", 1)
        if len(parts) != 2:
            await cb.answer(_t("api_format_error", _pcl), show_alert=True); return
        symbol, pos_idx_s = parts[0], parts[1]
        try:
            pos_idx = int(pos_idx_s)
        except ValueError:
            await cb.answer(_t("api_format_error", _pcl), show_alert=True); return

        try:
            await cb.message.edit_text(_t("msg_closing_pos", _pcl, symbol=symbol), parse_mode="HTML")
        except Exception:
            pass

        import bybit_trader as _bt
        _demo = bool(getattr(user, "bybit_demo", False))
        # Получаем актуальный размер и сторону позиции
        positions = await _bt.get_positions(api_key, api_secret, symbol, demo=_demo)
        pos = next((p for p in positions
                    if p.get("symbol") == _bt._to_bybit_symbol(symbol)
                    and int(p.get("positionIdx", 0)) == pos_idx
                    and float(p.get("size", 0)) > 0), None)
        if not pos:
            await cb.message.edit_text(
                _t("msg_pos_not_found", _pcl, symbol=symbol),
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )
            return

        # Сначала отменяем все TP-ордера
        await _bt.cancel_all_orders(api_key, api_secret, symbol, demo=_demo)

        result = await _bt.close_position(
            api_key, api_secret,
            symbol,
            side    = pos.get("side", "Buy"),
            size    = pos.get("size", "0"),
            pos_idx = pos_idx,
            demo    = _demo,
        )
        if result.get("ok"):
            await cb.message.edit_text(
                f"✅ <b>{symbol}</b> закрыт маркет-ордером.\n\n"
                f"🆔 Order ID: <code>{result.get('order_id', '—')}</code>",
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )
        else:
            await cb.message.edit_text(
                _t("msg_close_error", _pcl, symbol=symbol, error=_html.escape(str(result.get('error', '?')))),
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bybit_ord_cancel_all_"))
    async def bybit_ord_cancel_all(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Отменяет все ордера для символа."""
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _cal = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        api_key    = getattr(user, "bybit_api_key",    "")
        api_secret = getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", "")
        if not api_key:
            await cb.answer(_t("api_not_setup", _cal), show_alert=True); return

        # callback: bybit_ord_cancel_all_{symbol}_{pos_idx}
        tail  = cb.data[len("bybit_ord_cancel_all_"):]
        parts = tail.rsplit("_", 1)
        symbol = parts[0]

        import bybit_trader as _bt
        _demo = bool(getattr(user, "bybit_demo", False))
        result = await _bt.cancel_all_orders(api_key, api_secret, symbol, demo=_demo)
        if result.get("ok"):
            await cb.answer(_t("order_cancel_ok", _cal, n=result.get("cancelled", 0)), show_alert=True)
        else:
            await cb.answer(_t("order_cancel_fail", _cal, error=_html.escape(str(result.get("error", "?")))), show_alert=True)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bybit_ord_cancel_"))
    async def bybit_ord_cancel_one(cb: CallbackQuery):
        """Отменяет один ордер по orderId."""
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _ocl = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        api_key    = getattr(user, "bybit_api_key",    "")
        api_secret = getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", "")
        if not api_key:
            await cb.answer(_t("api_not_setup", _ocl), show_alert=True); return

        # callback: bybit_ord_cancel_{orderId}
        order_id = cb.data[len("bybit_ord_cancel_"):]
        if not order_id:
            await cb.answer(_t("api_format_error", _ocl), show_alert=True); return

        # Для отмены нужен symbol — берём из открытых ордеров
        import bybit_trader as _bt
        _demo = bool(getattr(user, "bybit_demo", False))
        orders = await _bt.get_open_orders(api_key, api_secret, demo=_demo)
        target = next((o for o in orders if o.get("orderId") == order_id), None)
        if not target:
            await cb.answer(_t("order_already_done", _ocl), show_alert=True)
            # Обновляем панель
            try:
                positions, orders2, summary = await _load_bybit_dashboard(api_key, api_secret, demo=_demo)
                from keyboards import kb_bybit_dashboard
                text = _fmt_bybit_dashboard(positions, orders2, summary)
                kb   = kb_bybit_dashboard(positions, orders2)
                await cb.message.edit_text(text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb)
            except Exception:
                pass
            return

        symbol = target.get("symbol", "")
        result = await _bt.cancel_order(api_key, api_secret, symbol, order_id, demo=_demo)
        if result.get("ok"):
            await cb.answer(_t("order_cancel_single_ok", _ocl), show_alert=False)
        else:
            await cb.answer(_t("order_cancel_fail", _ocl, error=_html.escape(str(result.get("error", "?")))), show_alert=True)

        # Обновляем панель после отмены
        try:
            positions, orders2, summary = await _load_bybit_dashboard(api_key, api_secret, demo=_demo)
            from keyboards import kb_bybit_dashboard
            text = _fmt_bybit_dashboard(positions, orders2, summary)
            kb   = kb_bybit_dashboard(positions, orders2)
            await cb.message.edit_text(text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ─── БЛОК 3: Выбор биржи для авто-трейдинга ───────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.in_({"set_at_exchange_bybit", "set_at_exchange_bingx", "set_at_exchange_binance", "set_at_exchange_okx"}))
    async def set_at_exchange(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        exchange_map = {
            "set_at_exchange_bybit":   "bybit",
            "set_at_exchange_bingx":   "bingx",
            "set_at_exchange_binance": "binance",
            "set_at_exchange_okx":     "okx",
        }
        new_exchange = exchange_map.get(cb.data, "bybit")
        # Проверяем что API ключи настроены для выбранной биржи
        _api_check = {
            "bybit":   getattr(user, "bybit_api_key", ""),
            "bingx":   getattr(user, "bingx_api_key", ""),
            "binance": getattr(user, "binance_api_key", ""),
            "okx":     getattr(user, "okx_api_key", ""),
        }
        if not _api_check.get(new_exchange):
            _lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
            await cb.message.answer(
                f"⚠️ API ключи для {new_exchange.upper()} не настроены.\n"
                f"Сначала подключи ключи, потом переключай биржу.",
                parse_mode="HTML",
            )
            return
        user.trade_exchange = new_exchange
        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, await _auto_trade_text(user), kb_at_exchange(user))

    # ─── БЛОК 3: BingX API setup FSM ───────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "setup_bingx_api")
    async def setup_bingx_api(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await cb.message.answer(_t("sub_expired", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"))); return
        _bxl = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        await state.set_state(SetupBingXState.api_key)
        await state.update_data(lang=_bxl)
        await cb.message.answer(
            _t("bingx_setup_prompt", _bxl),
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_bxl),
        )

    @dp.message(SetupBingXState.api_key)
    async def bingx_api_key_received(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        _d = await state.get_data(); _l = _d.get("lang", "ru")
        await state.update_data(api_key=msg.text.strip())
        await state.set_state(SetupBingXState.api_secret)
        await msg.answer(
            _t("api_secret_received_prompt", _l),
            parse_mode="HTML",
            reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_l),
        )

    @dp.message(SetupBingXState.api_secret)
    async def bingx_api_secret_received(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        data       = await state.get_data()
        _l         = data.get("lang", "ru")
        api_key    = data.get("api_key", "")
        api_secret = msg.text.strip()
        await state.clear()

        await msg.answer(_t("api_connecting_bingx", _l))
        import bingx_trader as _bx
        result = await _bx.test_connection(api_key, api_secret)
        if result.get("ok"):
            user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)
            user.bingx_api_key    = api_key
            user.bingx_api_secret = api_secret
            await um.save(user)
            await msg.answer(_t("bingx_connected", _l, balance=result.get("balance", 0)), parse_mode="HTML")
        else:
            await msg.answer(_t("bingx_connect_fail", _l, error=_html.escape(str(result.get("error", "?")))), parse_mode="HTML")

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "test_bingx_api")
    async def test_bingx_api(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _tbl = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        api_key    = getattr(user, "bingx_api_key",    "")
        api_secret = getattr(user, "bingx_api_secret", "")
        if not api_key or not api_secret:
            await cb.message.answer(_t("bingx_not_setup", _tbl)); return
        wait = await cb.message.answer(_t("api_connecting_bingx", _tbl))
        try:
            import bingx_trader as _bx
            result = await _bx.test_connection(api_key, api_secret)
        except Exception as e:
            await wait.delete()
            await cb.message.answer(_t("api_error_generic", _tbl, err=_html.escape(str(e))))
            return
        await wait.delete()
        if result.get("ok"):
            await cb.message.answer(_t("bingx_ok", _tbl, balance=result.get("balance", 0)), parse_mode="HTML")
        else:
            await cb.message.answer(_t("bingx_conn_fail", _tbl, error=_html.escape(str(result.get("error", "?")))), parse_mode="HTML")

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "remove_bingx_api")
    async def remove_bingx_api(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.bingx_api_key    = ""
        user.bingx_api_secret = ""
        if getattr(user, "trade_exchange", "bybit") == "bingx":
            user.auto_trade = False
        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, await _auto_trade_text(user), kb_auto_trade(user))

    # ─── OKX Setup ─────────────────────────────────────────────

    from handlers._common import SetupOKXState

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "setup_okx")
    async def setup_okx(cb: CallbackQuery, state: FSMContext):
        await cb.answer()
        _l = getattr((await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)), "lang", "ru")
        await state.update_data(lang=_l)
        await state.set_state(SetupOKXState.api_key)
        await cb.message.answer("🔑 <b>OKX: введи API Key</b>", parse_mode="HTML",
                                reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_l))

    @dp.message(SetupOKXState.api_key)
    async def okx_key_input(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        _d = await state.get_data(); _l = _d.get("lang", "ru")
        key = (msg.text or "").strip()
        if len(key) < 10:
            await msg.answer("❌ Ключ слишком короткий"); return
        await state.update_data(api_key=key)
        await state.set_state(SetupOKXState.api_secret)
        await msg.answer("🔐 <b>OKX: введи API Secret</b>", parse_mode="HTML",
                         reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_l))

    @dp.message(SetupOKXState.api_secret)
    async def okx_secret_input(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        _d = await state.get_data(); _l = _d.get("lang", "ru")
        secret = (msg.text or "").strip()
        if len(secret) < 10:
            await msg.answer("❌ Secret слишком короткий"); return
        await state.update_data(api_secret=secret)
        await state.set_state(SetupOKXState.passphrase)
        await msg.answer("🔑 <b>OKX: введи Passphrase</b>\n\n"
                         "<i>Passphrase — третий ключ, который вы задали при создании API.</i>",
                         parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb_fsm_cancel(_l))

    @dp.message(SetupOKXState.passphrase)
    async def okx_passphrase_input(msg: Message, state: FSMContext):
        data = await state.get_data()
        _l = data.get("lang", "ru")
        passphrase = (msg.text or "").strip()
        if len(passphrase) < 4:
            await msg.answer("❌ Passphrase слишком короткий"); return
        api_key = data.get("api_key", "")
        api_secret = data.get("api_secret", "")
        await state.clear()

        wait = await msg.answer("⏳ Подключаю OKX...")
        try:
            import okx_trader
            result = await okx_trader.test_connection(api_key, api_secret, passphrase)
        except Exception as e:
            await wait.delete()
            await msg.answer(f"❌ Ошибка: {_html.escape(str(e)[:200])}")
            return
        await wait.delete()
        if result.get("ok"):
            user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)
            user.okx_api_key = api_key
            user.okx_api_secret = api_secret
            user.okx_passphrase = passphrase
            await um.save(user)
            await msg.answer(f"✅ <b>OKX подключён!</b>\nБаланс: ${result['balance']:.2f}", parse_mode="HTML")
        else:
            await msg.answer(f"❌ <b>OKX: не удалось подключиться</b>\n{_html.escape(str(result.get('error', '?')))}", parse_mode="HTML")

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "remove_okx_api")
    async def remove_okx_api(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        user.okx_api_key = ""
        user.okx_api_secret = ""
        user.okx_passphrase = ""
        await cb.answer("✅ OKX ключи удалены")
        if getattr(user, "trade_exchange", "") == "okx":
            user.auto_trade = False
        await um.save(user)
        await safe_edit(cb, await _auto_trade_text(user), kb_auto_trade(user))

    # ─── БЛОК 4: Мои позиции (универсальный экран) ─────────────────────────────

    _POS_PER_PAGE = 5  # позиций на одной странице

    def _fmt_price(v: float) -> str:
        if v == 0:      return "0"
        if v >= 1000:   return f"{v:,.2f}"
        if v >= 1:      return f"{v:.4f}"
        return f"{v:.6f}"

    def _build_positions_text(
        positions: list, orders: list, summary: dict,
        exchange: str, page: int,
    ) -> tuple[str, object]:
        """
        Строит компактный текст страницы позиций и клавиатуру.
        Возвращает (text, InlineKeyboardMarkup).
        """
        import math
        from keyboards import kb_positions_page

        eq    = float(summary.get("equity",          0.0) or 0)
        upnl  = float(summary.get("unrealized_pnl",  0.0) or 0)
        avail = float(summary.get("available",        0.0) or 0)
        pnl24 = float(summary.get("closed_pnl_24h",  0.0) or 0)
        t24   = int(summary.get("trades_24h", 0) or 0)
        w24   = int(summary.get("wins_24h",   0) or 0)

        exch_icon = "🟡" if exchange == "bybit" else ("🔵" if exchange == "bingx" else "🟠")
        exch_name = {"bybit": "Bybit", "bingx": "BingX", "binance": "Binance"}.get(exchange, exchange.capitalize())
        NL = "\n"

        up_sign   = "+" if upnl  >= 0 else "–"
        p24_sign  = "+" if pnl24 >= 0 else "–"
        wr24      = f"  ({w24}/{t24})" if t24 > 0 else ""

        total_pages = max(1, math.ceil(len(positions) / _POS_PER_PAGE))
        page        = max(0, min(page, total_pages - 1))
        start       = page * _POS_PER_PAGE
        visible     = positions[start : start + _POS_PER_PAGE]

        # ── Шапка ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        SEP = "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        lines = [
            f"{exch_icon} <b>{exch_name} Futures</b>",
            SEP,
            f"💼 <b>${eq:,.2f}</b>  │  💵 <b>${avail:,.2f}</b>  │  📊 <b>{up_sign}${abs(upnl):.2f}</b>",
            f"📈 24ч: <b>{p24_sign}${abs(pnl24):.2f}</b>{wr24}",
        ]

        # ── Открытые позиции ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
        if positions:
            page_tag = f"  •  стр. {page + 1}/{total_pages}" if total_pages > 1 else ""
            lines += [
                SEP,
                f"⚡ <b>ПОЗИЦИИ ({len(positions)})</b>{page_tag}",
                SEP,
            ]
            for pos in visible:
                sym   = pos.get("symbol", "")
                side  = pos.get("side", "")
                ep    = float(pos.get("avgPrice") or pos.get("entryPrice") or 0)
                mp    = float(pos.get("markPrice") or 0)
                pnl   = float(pos.get("unrealisedPnl") or 0)
                lev   = int(float(pos.get("leverage") or 1))
                sl    = float(pos.get("stopLoss") or 0)

                pnl_pct = ((mp - ep) / ep * 100 * lev) if ep > 0 else 0.0
                if side in ("SHORT", "Sell"):
                    pnl_pct = -pnl_pct

                pnl_em     = "🟢" if pnl >= 0 else "🔴"
                pnl_sign2  = "+" if pnl >= 0 else "–"
                pct_sign   = "+" if pnl_pct >= 0 else "–"
                side_label = "LONG"  if side in ("LONG",  "Buy")  else "SHORT"
                side_em    = "📈"   if side_label == "LONG" else "📉"
                sym_clean  = sym.replace("-USDT-SWAP", "").replace("-USDT", "")
                sl_str     = f"  SL <code>{_fmt_price(sl)}</code>" if sl else ""

                lines.append("")
                lines.append(
                    f"{pnl_em} <b>{sym_clean}</b>  {side_em} {side_label} ×{lev}"
                    f"   <b>{pnl_sign2}${abs(pnl):.2f}</b>  ({pct_sign}{abs(pnl_pct):.1f}%){sl_str}"
                )
                lines.append(
                    f"   <code>{_fmt_price(ep)}</code> → <code>{_fmt_price(mp)}</code>"
                )
        else:
            lines += [SEP, "📭 <i>Открытых позиций нет</i>"]

        # ── Ожидающие ордера (компактно, макс. 5 + счётчик) ─────────────────
        MAX_ORD = 5
        if orders:
            _type_short = {
                "STOP_MARKET":        "SL",
                "TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET": "TP",
                "LIMIT":              "LIM",
                "STOP":               "SL",
                "TAKE_PROFIT":        "TP",
            }
            lines += ["", SEP, f"📌 <b>ОРДЕРА ({len(orders)})</b>"]
            for o in orders[:MAX_ORD]:
                o_sym    = o.get("symbol", "").replace("-USDT-SWAP", "").replace("-USDT", "")
                o_side   = o.get("side", "")
                o_type   = o.get("type", "")
                o_price  = float(o.get("stopPrice") or o.get("price") or 0)
                t_label  = _type_short.get(o_type, o_type[:3])
                s_em     = "🔴" if o_side in ("SELL", "Sell") else "🟢"
                lines.append(
                    f"  {s_em} <b>{o_sym}</b>  {t_label}  @  <code>{_fmt_price(o_price)}</code>"
                )
            if len(orders) > MAX_ORD:
                lines.append(f"  <i>+ ещё {len(orders) - MAX_ORD}</i>")

        text = NL.join(lines)
        # Защита от превышения лимита Telegram
        if len(text) > 4000:
            text = text[:3950].rsplit("\n", 1)[0] + "\n\n<i>⚠️ Обрезано</i>"

        kb = kb_positions_page(visible, orders, exchange, page, total_pages)
        return text, kb

    async def _fetch_and_show_positions(cb: CallbackQuery, page: int = 0):
        """Общий код: загружает позиции с биржи и отображает нужную страницу."""
        user     = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _fsp_lang = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        exchange = getattr(user, "trade_exchange", "bybit")

        if exchange == "bingx":
            api_key    = getattr(user, "bingx_api_key",    "")
            api_secret = getattr(user, "bingx_api_secret", "")
        elif exchange == "binance":
            api_key    = getattr(user, "binance_api_key",    "")
            api_secret = getattr(user, "binance_api_secret", "")
        elif exchange == "okx":
            api_key    = getattr(user, "okx_api_key",    "")
            api_secret = getattr(user, "okx_api_secret", "")
        else:
            api_key    = getattr(user, "bybit_api_key",    "")
            api_secret = getattr(user, "bybit_api_secret", "")

        if not api_key:
            await cb.answer(_t("err_api_not_set", _fsp_lang), show_alert=True)
            return
        if exchange == "okx" and not getattr(user, "okx_passphrase", ""):
            await cb.answer("OKX passphrase не настроен. Подключи OKX API заново.", show_alert=True)
            return

        try:
            await cb.message.edit_text(_t("msg_loading_positions", _fsp_lang), parse_mode="HTML")
        except Exception:
            pass

        try:
            if exchange == "bingx":
                import bingx_trader as _trader
            elif exchange == "binance":
                import binance_trader as _trader  # type: ignore[no-redef]
            elif exchange == "okx":
                import okx_trader as _trader  # type: ignore[no-redef]
                _okx_pp = getattr(user, "okx_passphrase", "")
                positions, orders, summary = await _trader.get_dashboard(api_key, api_secret, _okx_pp)
            else:
                import bybit_trader as _trader  # type: ignore[no-redef]
            if exchange != "okx":
                _demo_kw = {"demo": bool(getattr(user, "bybit_demo", False))} if exchange == "bybit" else {}
                positions, orders, summary = await _trader.get_dashboard(api_key, api_secret, **_demo_kw)
        except Exception as e:
            err_raw = str(e)
            if exchange == "bybit":
                import bybit_trader as _bt_err
                err_human = _bt_err._humanize_bybit_error(err_raw)
            else:
                err_human = err_raw
            try:
                await cb.message.edit_text(
                    _t("err_exchange_conn", _fsp_lang, exchange=exchange.upper(), detail=err_human),
                    parse_mode="HTML",
                )
            except Exception:
                pass
            return

        text, kb = _build_positions_text(positions, orders, summary, exchange, page)
        try:
            await cb.message.edit_text(text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb)
        except Exception:
            await cb.message.answer(text, parse_mode="HTML", reply_markup=kb)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "my_positions")
    async def my_positions(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("at_no_access_short", getattr(user, "lang", "ru")), show_alert=True); return
        await _fetch_and_show_positions(cb, page=0)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("pos_page_"))
    async def pos_page(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("at_no_access_short", getattr(user, "lang", "ru")), show_alert=True); return
        try:
            page = int(cb.data.split("_")[-1])
        except (ValueError, IndexError):
            page = 0
        await _fetch_and_show_positions(cb, page=page)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "pos_noop")
    async def pos_noop(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()

    # BingX: закрыть позицию
    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bingx_pos_close_"))
    async def bingx_pos_close(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _bxcl = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        api_key    = getattr(user, "bingx_api_key",    "")
        api_secret = getattr(user, "bingx_api_secret", "")
        if not api_key:
            await cb.answer(_t("bingx_api_not_setup", _bxcl), show_alert=True); return
        # bingx_pos_close_{sym}_{side}_{pos_idx}
        parts  = cb.data[len("bingx_pos_close_"):].rsplit("_", 2)
        if len(parts) < 3:
            await cb.answer(_t("api_format_error", _bxcl), show_alert=True); return
        symbol, side, _ = parts
        import bingx_trader as _bx
        positions = await _bx.get_positions(api_key, api_secret, symbol)
        pos = next((p for p in positions if p.get("side", "").upper() == side.upper()), None)
        if not pos:
            await cb.answer(_t("position_not_found", _bxcl), show_alert=True); return
        result = await _bx.close_position(api_key, api_secret, symbol, side, pos["size"])
        if result.get("ok"):
            await cb.answer(_t("position_closed_ok", _bxcl), show_alert=True)
        else:
            await cb.answer(_t("order_cancel_fail", _bxcl, error=_html.escape(str(result.get("error", "?")))), show_alert=True)

    # BingX: отменить все ордера
    @dp.callback_query(F.data.startswith("bingx_ord_cancel_all_"))
    async def bingx_ord_cancel_all(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        _bxal = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        api_key    = getattr(user, "bingx_api_key",    "")
        api_secret = getattr(user, "bingx_api_secret", "")
        if not api_key:
            await cb.answer(_t("bingx_api_not_setup", _bxal), show_alert=True); return
        symbol = cb.data[len("bingx_ord_cancel_all_"):]
        import bingx_trader as _bx
        result = await _bx.cancel_all_orders(api_key, api_secret, symbol)
        if result.get("ok"):
            await cb.answer(_t("order_cancel_ok", _bxal, n=result.get("cancelled", 0)), show_alert=True)
        else:
            await cb.answer(_t("order_cancel_fail", _bxal, error=_html.escape(str(result.get("error", "?")))), show_alert=True)

    # ─── БЛОК 5: Справка по авто-трейдингу ────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "at_help")

        await safe_edit(cb, auto_trade_help_text(), kb_at_help())

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "counter_trend_help")

            _t("counter_trend_help", getattr(user, "lang", "ru")),

        )

    # ─── БЛОК 5б: Подменю авто-трейдинга (at_sub_*) ────────────────────────────

    @dp.callback_query(F.data.in_({"toggle_vol_mode_count", "toggle_vol_mode_usdt",
                                    "toggle_vol_mode_both",  "toggle_vol_mode_off"}))
    async def toggle_vol_mode(cb: CallbackQuery):
        await cb.answer()

        mode_map = {
            "toggle_vol_mode_count": "count",
            "toggle_vol_mode_usdt":  "usdt",
            "toggle_vol_mode_both":  "both",
            "toggle_vol_mode_off":   "off",
        }
        new_mode = mode_map[cb.data]
        # Применяем ко всем конфигурациям через shared
        user.vol_filter_mode = new_mode
        await um.save(user)
        from keyboards import kb_volume
        await safe_edit(cb, "🔧 Настройки объёма:", kb_volume(user.min_volume_usdt, user))

    # ─── БЛОК 10: Экспорт сделок в CSV ────────────────────────────────────────

    @dp.message(Command("export"))
    async def cmd_export(msg: Message):
        user = await um.get_or_create(msg.from_user.id)
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await msg.answer(_t("export_no_access", getattr(user, "lang", "ru"))); return
        await _export_trades_csv(msg, user)

    @dp.callback_query(F.data == "export_trades")
    async def export_trades(cb: CallbackQuery):
        user = await um.get_or_create(cb.from_user.id)
        has, _ = user.check_access()
        if not has:
            await cb.answer(_t("at_no_access_short", getattr(user, "lang", "ru")), show_alert=True); return
        await _export_trades_csv(cb.message, user)

    async def _export_trades_csv(msg, user: UserSettings):
        import csv, io, time as _time
        from datetime import datetime
        _exl = getattr(user, "lang", "ru")
        trades = await db.db_get_user_trades(user.user_id)
        if not trades:
            await msg.answer(_t("export_no_trades", _exl))
            return
        buf = io.StringIO()
        writer = csv.writer(buf)
        writer.writerow(["Дата", "Символ", "Направление", "Стратегия", "Таймфрейм",
                          "Вход", "SL", "TP1", "Результат", "P&L (R)"])
        for t in trades:
            dt = datetime.utcfromtimestamp(t.get("created_at", 0)).strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
            writer.writerow([
                dt,
                t.get("symbol", ""),
                t.get("direction", ""),
                t.get("breakout_type", ""),
                t.get("timeframe", ""),
                t.get("entry", ""),
                t.get("sl", ""),
                t.get("tp1", ""),
                t.get("result", ""),
                t.get("result_rr", ""),
            ])
        buf.seek(0)
        from aiogram.types import BufferedInputFile
        date_str  = datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y%m%d")
        filename  = f"trades_export_{date_str}.csv"
        file_data = buf.getvalue().encode("utf-8-sig")  # BOM для Excel
        doc = BufferedInputFile(file_data, filename=filename)
        await msg.answer_document(doc, caption=f"📥 Экспорт {len(trades)} сделок")

    # ─── Закрываем register_handlers ──────────────────
    # (конец функции)


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/health_monitor.py
================================================================================
"""
health_monitor.py — Мониторинг здоровья CHM BREAKER BOT.

Проверяет каждые 5 минут:
1. Сканеры живы (последний heartbeat был < timeout назад)
2. Счётчик ошибок API (предупреждение если > 10 за период)

Используется в bot.py:
    health = HealthMonitor(bot, config)
    # В asyncio.gather:
    _guarded("health_monitor", health.run_forever()),
    # Привязать к сканерам:
    scanner._health = health
    gerchik_scanner._health = health
"""

import asyncio
import html as _html  # SECURITY-FIX
import logging
import time

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Health")


class HealthMonitor:
    """Мониторинг здоровья бота. Отправляет алерты администраторам при проблемах."""

    # Максимальный допустимый интервал молчания сканеров (секунды)
    _SCANNER_TIMEOUTS: dict[str, int] = {
        "LEVELS":  600,    # MidScanner цикл ~3-5 мин, таймаут 10 мин
        # "SMC" убран — FINAL-FIX-4B: отдельного heartbeat нет, ложные алерты
        "GERCHIK": 3600,   # Герчик — цикл 30 мин, таймаут 60 мин
        "SCALP":   300,    # скальпер шлёт heartbeat; таймаут 5 мин (цикл ≤60s + 30 монет×8s)
    }

    def __init__(self, bot, config):
        self._bot         = bot
        self._admin_ids   = config.ADMIN_IDS
        self._check_interval = 300  # 5 минут

        # scanner_name → timestamp последнего heartbeat
        self._heartbeats: dict[str, float] = {}
        # source → счётчик ошибок за текущий период
        self._error_counts: dict[str, int] = {}

    # ── Публичный API ────────────────────────────────────────

    def heartbeat(self, scanner_name: str) -> None:
        """Вызывается сканерами в конце каждого цикла."""
        self._heartbeats[scanner_name] = time.time()

    def report_error(self, source: str) -> None:
        """Считает ошибки от API вызовов (для агрегированного алерта)."""
        self._error_counts[source] = self._error_counts.get(source, 0) + 1

    # ── Главный цикл ────────────────────────────────────────

    async def run_forever(self) -> None:
        """Главный цикл мониторинга. Запускается как отдельная asyncio-задача."""
        # Ждём пока все сканеры успеют запуститься и отправить первые heartbeat
        await asyncio.sleep(120)
        log.info("🏥 HealthMonitor запущен (проверка каждые %d сек)", self._check_interval)
        while True:
            try:
                await self._check_health()
            except asyncio.CancelledError:
                raise
            except Exception as e:
                log.error("HealthMonitor ошибка: %s", e)
            await asyncio.sleep(self._check_interval)

    # ── Проверка здоровья ────────────────────────────────────

    async def _check_health(self) -> None:
        alerts: list[str] = []
        now = time.time()

        # 1. Проверяем heartbeat каждого сканера
        for name, timeout in self._SCANNER_TIMEOUTS.items():
            last = self._heartbeats.get(name, 0)
            if last <= 0:
                continue  # сканер ещё не запустился — не алертим
            elapsed = now - last
            if elapsed > timeout:
                minutes = int(elapsed / 60)
                alerts.append(f"🔴 Сканер <b>{name}</b> не отвечает {minutes} мин!")

        # 2. Много ошибок API
        for source, count in list(self._error_counts.items()):
            if count > 10:
                alerts.append(f"⚠️ <b>{source}</b>: {count} API-ошибок за период")
        # Сбрасываем счётчики каждые 5 минут
        self._error_counts.clear()

        # 3. Отправляем алерты администраторам
        if alerts:
            text = "🚨 <b>Health Alert</b>\n\n" + "\n".join(alerts)
            log.warning("Health alert: %s", " | ".join(alerts))
            for admin_id in self._admin_ids:
                try:
                    await self._bot.send_message(admin_id, text, parse_mode="HTML")
                except Exception as e:
                    log.debug("health alert send uid=%s: %s", admin_id, e)

FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/i18n.py
================================================================================

          если и она не найдена → возвращает сам ключ (не крашится).
"""

    "msg_close_error":      {"ru": "❌ Не удалось закрыть {symbol}:\n{error}", "en": "❌ Failed to close {symbol}:\n{error}"},
    "err_api_not_set":      {"ru": "❌ API ключи не настроены", "en": "❌ API keys not configured"},
    "msg_loading_positions": {"ru": "⏳ Загружаю позиции...", "en": "⏳ Loading positions..."},
    "err_exchange_conn":    {"ru": "❌ <b>Ошибка подключения к {exchange}</b>\n\n{detail}", "en": "❌ <b>Connection error to {exchange}</b>\n\n{detail}"},
    "counter_trend_label":  {"ru": "Контр-тренд", "en": "Counter-trend"},

    # ── Counter-trend help ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    "counter_trend_help": {
        "ru": (
            "🔶 <b>Контр-тренд — что это?</b>\n\n"
            "Сигнал идёт <b>ПРОТИВ</b> основного тренда (EMA 50/200).\n"
            "Например: тренд нисходящий, но сигнал на ЛОНГ.\n\n"
            "<b>Риски:</b>\n"
            "• Повышенная вероятность стопа\n"
            "• Требует меньший объём позиции\n"
            "• Рекомендуется уменьшить риск в 2 раза\n\n"
            "<b>Когда торговать контр-тренд:</b>\n"
            "• Только от очень сильных уровней (4–5 звёзд)\n"
            "• При наличии паттерна разворота (пин-бар, поглощение)\n"
            "• На старших таймфреймах (4h, 1d)"
        ),
        "en": (
            "🔶 <b>Counter-trend — what is it?</b>\n\n"
            "The signal goes <b>AGAINST</b> the main trend (EMA 50/200).\n"
            "Example: downtrend, but signal is LONG.\n\n"
            "<b>Risks:</b>\n"
            "• Higher probability of stop-loss hit\n"
            "• Requires smaller position size\n"
            "• Recommended to halve your risk\n\n"
            "<b>When to trade counter-trend:</b>\n"
            "• Only from very strong levels (4–5 stars)\n"
            "• With a reversal pattern present (pin bar, engulfing)\n"
            "• On higher timeframes (4h, 1d)"
        ),
    },
}



def t(key: str, lang: str = "ru", **kwargs) -> str:
    """
    Возвращает переведённую строку.

    Fallback порядок:
      1. MESSAGES[key][lang]
      2. MESSAGES[key]["ru"]  (если lang не найден)
      3. key                  (если ключ вообще не найден)

    При ошибке форматирования — возвращает неформатированную строку.
    """
    try:
        entry = MESSAGES.get(key)
        if entry is None:
            return key
        text = entry.get(lang) or entry.get("ru") or key
        if kwargs:
            try:
                return text.format(**kwargs)
            except Exception:
                return text
        return text
    except Exception:
        return key


================================================================================
FILE: ./CHM_BREAKER_V4/indicator.py
================================================================================
"""
CHM BREAKER — Institutional-Grade Price Action Engine v2.0
==========================================================
Философия: не угадывать движение, а находить точки где рынок ОБЯЗАН реагировать.
Протокол: Карта уровней → Качество подхода → Паттерн → R:R → Финальный чеклист.

Архитектура уровней:
  Слой 1 — Фракталы (pivot highs/lows)
  Слой 2 — KDE кластеры (gaussian density)
  Слой 3 — Volume Profile (HVN/LVN)

Классификация: Абсолютный (1) / Сильный (2) / Рабочий (3)
Quality: 0–10 (фильтр по cfg.MIN_QUALITY)
"""

import logging
import math
import time  # CRITICAL-FIX: needed for zone cache TTL
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from config import Config

log = logging.getLogger("CHM.Indicator")

# Попытка импорта scipy для KDE — без него слой 2 молча пропускается
try:
    from scipy.stats import gaussian_kde
    from scipy.signal import argrelextrema as _arex
    _SCIPY_OK = True
except ImportError:
    _SCIPY_OK = False
    log.debug("scipy не установлен — KDE-слой уровней отключён")


# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# DATACLASS РЕЗУЛЬТАТА СИГНАЛА
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

@dataclass
class SignalResult:
    symbol:            str
    direction:         str
    entry:             float
    sl:                float
    tp1:               float
    tp2:               float
    tp3:               float
    risk_pct:          float
    quality:           int
    reasons:           list  = field(default_factory=list)
    rsi:               float = 50.0
    volume_ratio:      float = 1.0
    trend_local:       str   = ""
    trend_htf:         str   = ""
    pattern:           str   = ""
    breakout_type:     str   = ""
    is_counter_trend:  bool  = False
    human_explanation: str   = ""
    level_class:       int   = 3    # 1=Абсолютный, 2=Сильный, 3=Рабочий
    test_count:        int   = 0    # Кол-во тестов уровня за последние 30 свечей
    rr_score:          float = 0.0  # Взвешенный R:R score
    corr_label:        str   = ""   # Корреляционная метка с BTC/ETH
    session:           str   = ""   # Торговая сессия по UTC
    btc_corr:          float = 0.0  # Корреляция с BTC (30 свечей)
    eth_corr:          float = 0.0  # Корреляция с ETH (30 свечей)
    # FIX-WR-1: Partial TP маркеры для auto_trade/partial_tp
    tp1_close_pct:     float = 0.40   # FIX-WR-1: 40% позиции на TP1
    tp2_close_pct:     float = 0.30   # FIX-WR-1: 30% позиции на TP2
    tp3_close_pct:     float = 0.30   # FIX-WR-1: 30% позиции на TP3
    move_sl_to_be_after_tp1: bool = True  # FIX-WR-1: перенос стопа в БУ после TP1


# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ГЛАВНЫЙ КЛАСС
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class CHMIndicator:

    def __init__(self, config: Config):
        self.cfg = config
        self._last_signal: dict[str, int] = {}
        # [AUDIT-FIX] Zone cache: кэшируем зоны раз в 1H, скипаем тяжёлые
        # расчёты если цена далеко от всех кэшированных зон
        self._zone_cache: dict[str, tuple[float, list, list]] = {}  # symbol → (ts, sup, res)
        self._zone_cache_ttl = 900  # 15 мин — баланс свежести и CPU
        self._ZONE_CACHE_MAX = 350  # макс символов в кэше (защита от OOM)

    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # ТЕХНИЧЕСКИЕ ИНДИКАТОРЫ
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @staticmethod
    def _ema(s: pd.Series, n: int) -> pd.Series:
        return s.ewm(span=n, adjust=False).mean()

    @staticmethod
    def _rsi(s: pd.Series, n: int = 14) -> pd.Series:
        d  = s.diff()
        g  = d.clip(lower=0).ewm(span=n, adjust=False).mean()
        ls = (-d.clip(upper=0)).ewm(span=n, adjust=False).mean()
        rs = g / ls.replace(0, np.nan)
        return 100 - 100 / (1 + rs)

    @staticmethod
    def _atr(df: pd.DataFrame, n: int = 14) -> pd.Series:
        h, l, pc = df["high"], df["low"], df["close"].shift(1)
        tr = pd.concat([(h - l), (h - pc).abs(), (l - pc).abs()], axis=1).max(axis=1)
        return tr.ewm(span=n, adjust=False).mean()

    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # ПСИХОЛОГИЧЕСКИЕ УРОВНИ
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def _is_psychological_level(self, price: float) -> bool:
        """Круглые уровни: $1, $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $500, $1000, $5000, $10000."""
        magnitudes = [1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100, 500, 1_000, 5_000, 10_000, 50_000]
        for mag in magnitudes:
            if mag > price * 10:
                break
            if price > 0 and abs(price % mag) / price < 0.003:
                return True
        return False

    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # КЛАССИФИКАЦИЯ УРОВНЯ
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def _classify_level(self, price: float, hits: int, age_bars: int,
                        is_psychological: bool = False,
                        confirmed_layers: int = 1) -> int:
        """
        Правила (в порядке приоритета):
          1. Психологический → class=1 всегда
          2. 3+ касания за ≤30 баров → class=1
          3. Подтверждён 3 слоями → class=1
          4. 2+ касания, age ≤100 → class=2
          5. 2+ касания, age >100, НЕ psychological → class=3 (decay)
          6. 1 касание → class=3
        """
        # FIX-WR-3: психологический + подтверждённый = Абсолютный, иначе = Сильный
        if is_psychological and hits >= 2:
            return 1
        if is_psychological:
            return 2
        if hits >= 3 and age_bars <= 30:
            return 1
        if confirmed_layers >= 3:
            return 1
        if hits >= 2 and age_bars <= 100:
            return 2
        if hits >= 2:
            return 3  # устаревший уровень
        return 3

    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # СЛОЙ 2 — KDE КЛАСТЕРЫ (gaussian density)
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def _kde_levels(self, pivot_prices: list[float],
                    price_range: tuple[float, float],
                    n_points: int = 500) -> list[float]:
        """Возвращает цены пиков плотности KDE. Молча возвращает [] если scipy нет."""
        if not _SCIPY_OK or len(pivot_prices) < 5:
            return []
        try:
            arr = np.array(pivot_prices, dtype=float)
            kde = gaussian_kde(arr, bw_method="silverman")
            xs  = np.linspace(price_range[0], price_range[1], n_points)
            ys  = kde(xs)
            # Пики плотности — "народные уровни"
            peaks = _arex(ys.reshape(-1, 1), np.greater, order=10)[0]
            return [float(xs[i]) for i in peaks]
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug(f"KDE ошибка: {e}")
            return []

    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # СЛОЙ 3 — VOLUME PROFILE (HVN/LVN)
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def _volume_profile(self, df: pd.DataFrame,
                        n_bins: int = 100) -> dict:
        """
        Возвращает {
          "hvn": [price, ...],   -- High Volume Nodes (>1.5× avg)
          "lvn": [price, ...],   -- Low Volume Nodes  (<0.5× avg)
          "bin_edges": np.array,
          "volumes":   np.array,
        }
        """
        result: dict = {"hvn": [], "lvn": [], "bin_edges": np.array([]), "volumes": np.array([])}
        if len(df) < 10:
            return result
        try:
            lo, hi = df["low"].min(), df["high"].max()
            if hi <= lo:
                return result
            bins = np.linspace(lo, hi, n_bins + 1)
            mid  = (bins[:-1] + bins[1:]) / 2
            # Векторизация: матрица (n_bars, n_bins) вместо iterrows
            lows    = df["low"].to_numpy()[:, np.newaxis]    # (n, 1)
            highs   = df["high"].to_numpy()[:, np.newaxis]   # (n, 1)
            volumes = df["volume"].to_numpy()                 # (n,)
            mask2d  = (mid >= lows) & (mid <= highs)          # (n, n_bins)
            spans   = mask2d.sum(axis=1).clip(min=1).astype(float)  # (n,)
            vols    = (mask2d * (volumes / spans)[:, np.newaxis]).sum(axis=0)  # (n_bins,)
            avg  = vols.mean()
            hvn  = [float(mid[i]) for i in range(n_bins) if avg > 0 and vols[i] > avg * 1.5]
            lvn  = [float(mid[i]) for i in range(n_bins) if avg > 0 and vols[i] < avg * 0.5]
            result["hvn"]       = hvn
            result["lvn"]       = lvn
            result["bin_edges"] = bins
            result["volumes"]   = vols
        except Exception as e:
            log.debug(f"VolumeProfile ошибка: {e}")
        return result

    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # СЛОЙ 1+2+3 — МНОГОСЛОЙНАЯ КЛАСТЕРИЗАЦИЯ ЗОН
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def _get_zones(self, df: pd.DataFrame, strength: int,
                   atr_now: float) -> tuple[list[dict], list[dict]]:
        """
        Три независимых слоя детекции уровней → объединение → классификация.
        Слой 1: фракталы (pivot highs/lows)
        Слой 2: KDE пики плотности
        Слой 3: HVN из Volume Profile
        """
        highs = df["high"].values
        lows  = df["low"].values
        n     = len(df)

        # ── Слой 1: Фракталы ──────────────────────────────────────────────
        res_pts: list[tuple[float, int]] = []  # (price, age_in_bars)
        sup_pts: list[tuple[float, int]] = []

        for i in range(strength, n - strength):
            if highs[i] == max(highs[i - strength: i + strength + 1]):
                res_pts.append((float(highs[i]), n - 1 - i))
            if lows[i] == min(lows[i - strength: i + strength + 1]):
                sup_pts.append((float(lows[i]), n - 1 - i))

        all_pivot_prices = [p for p, _ in res_pts + sup_pts]

        # ── Слой 2: KDE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
        price_range = (df["low"].min(), df["high"].max())
        kde_prices  = self._kde_levels(all_pivot_prices, price_range)

        # ── Слой 3: Volume Profile ─────────────────────────────────────────
        vp = self._volume_profile(df)

        # ── ATR-буфер для кластеризации ───────────────────────────────────
        buffer = atr_now * self.cfg.ZONE_BUFFER

        def _find_layer_hits(price: float) -> int:
            """Сколько слоёв (KDE, HVN) подтверждают цену (±buffer*2)."""
            hits = 0
            tol  = buffer * 2
            if any(abs(price - k) <= tol for k in kde_prices):
                hits += 1
            if any(abs(price - h) <= tol for h in vp["hvn"]):
                hits += 1
            return hits

        def _check_lvn_nearby(price_a: float, price_b: float) -> bool:
            """Есть ли LVN между двумя ценами (чистый путь к цели)."""
            lo_p, hi_p = min(price_a, price_b), max(price_a, price_b)
            return any(lo_p < lv < hi_p for lv in vp["lvn"])

        def _make_zone(group: list[tuple[float, int]]) -> dict:
            avg_price = sum(x[0] for x in group) / len(group)
            min_age   = min(x[1] for x in group)
            hits      = len(group)
            is_psych  = self._is_psychological_level(avg_price)
            layers    = _find_layer_hits(avg_price)
            # Каждый дополнительный слой даёт +2 к hits для классификации
            eff_hits  = hits + layers * 2
            lvl_class = self._classify_level(
                avg_price, eff_hits, min_age, is_psych, layers + 1
            )
            return {
                "price":            avg_price,
                "hits":             hits,
                "eff_hits":         eff_hits,
                "age_bars":         min_age,
                "class":            lvl_class,
                "is_psychological": is_psych,
                "layers":           layers + 1,  # фракталы всегда 1
                "has_hvn":          any(abs(avg_price - h) <= buffer * 2 for h in vp["hvn"]),
                "has_lvn_to_tp":    False,        # проставляется позже в analyze()
                "lvn_checker":      _check_lvn_nearby,
            }

        def _cluster(points: list[tuple[float, int]]) -> list[dict]:
            if not points:
                return []
            points.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
            clusters: list[dict] = []
            group = [points[0]]
            for p in points[1:]:
                if p[0] - group[-1][0] <= buffer:
                    group.append(p)
                else:
                    clusters.append(_make_zone(group))
                    group = [p]
            clusters.append(_make_zone(group))
            # Минимум 2 касания (класс 1 может быть и с 1 касанием если психологический)
            return [c for c in clusters if c["hits"] >= 2 or c["is_psychological"]]

        sup_zones = _cluster(sup_pts)
        res_zones = _cluster(res_pts)

        log.debug(
            f"Zones: {len(sup_zones)} sup / {len(res_zones)} res | "
            f"KDE={len(kde_prices)} HVN={len(vp['hvn'])} LVN={len(vp['lvn'])}"
        )
        return sup_zones, res_zones

    def get_zones(self, df: pd.DataFrame) -> tuple[list[dict], list[dict]]:
        """Публичный метод: вычисляет зоны и возвращает (sup_zones, res_zones).

        Используется бэктестом для кэширования зон каждые pivot_strength баров
        вместо пересчёта на каждом баре — ключевое ускорение оптимизатора.
        """
        try:
            atr = self._atr(df, self.cfg.ATR_PERIOD)
            atr_now = float(atr.iloc[-2]) if len(atr) >= 2 else float(df["close"].mean() * 0.01)
            return self._get_zones(df, self.cfg.PIVOT_STRENGTH, atr_now)
        except Exception:
            return [], []

    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # МУЛЬТИ-ТАЙМФРЕЙМОВЫЕ УРОВНИ
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def _multi_timeframe_levels(self, df_ltf: pd.DataFrame,
                                df_mtf: Optional[pd.DataFrame],
                                df_htf: Optional[pd.DataFrame],
                                atr_now: float) -> list[dict]:
        """
        Запускает _get_zones() на каждом ТФ.
        Совпадение на 2 ТФ → "MTF уровень" (class≤2).
        Совпадение на 3 ТФ → "Институциональный уровень" (class=1).
        Возвращает объединённый список с полем "timeframes".
        """
        tol = atr_now * 0.5
        tf_data = [("ltf", df_ltf)]
        if df_mtf is not None and len(df_mtf) > 20:
            tf_data.append(("mtf", df_mtf))
        if df_htf is not None and len(df_htf) > 20:
            tf_data.append(("htf", df_htf))

        all_zones_by_tf: list[tuple[str, list[dict]]] = []
        for tf_name, df_tf in tf_data:
            try:
                sup, res = self._get_zones(df_tf, self.cfg.PIVOT_STRENGTH, atr_now)
                for z in sup + res:
                    z["tf"] = tf_name
                all_zones_by_tf.append((tf_name, sup + res))
            except Exception as e:
                log.debug(f"MTF _get_zones ошибка на {tf_name}: {e}")

        if not all_zones_by_tf:
            return []

        # Собираем все зоны в плоский список
        all_zones: list[dict] = []
        for _, zones in all_zones_by_tf:
            all_zones.extend(zones)

        # Ищем совпадения между ТФ
        merged: list[dict] = []
        used = set()
        for i, zone in enumerate(all_zones):
            if i in used:
                continue
            tfs = [zone.get("tf", "ltf")]
            for j, other in enumerate(all_zones):
                if j <= i or j in used:
                    continue
                if abs(zone["price"] - other["price"]) <= tol:
                    tfs.append(other.get("tf", "ltf"))
                    used.add(j)
            used.add(i)
            zone = dict(zone)
            zone["timeframes"] = list(set(tfs))
            tf_count = len(zone["timeframes"])
            if tf_count >= 3:
                zone["class"] = 1
                zone["mtf_label"] = "Институциональный"
            elif tf_count == 2:
                zone["class"] = min(zone["class"], 2)
                zone["mtf_label"] = "MTF"
            else:
                zone["mtf_label"] = ""
            merged.append(zone)

        return merged

    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # РАСШИРЕННЫЕ ПАТТЕРНЫ СВЕЧЕЙ
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def _detect_pattern(self, df: pd.DataFrame) -> tuple[str, str]:
        """
        Паттерны: PinBar, Engulfing, Doji, Hammer, Morning/Evening Star,
                  Inside Bar, Liquidity Sweep, Institutional OB.
        Возвращает (bull_pattern, bear_pattern).
        """
        if len(df) < 5:  # FIX-B2: нужно минимум 5 баров (используем [-2],[-3],[-4])
            return "", ""

        c  = df.iloc[-2]   # FIX-B2: последняя закрытая свеча (не текущая открытая)
        p  = df.iloc[-3]   # FIX-B2: предыдущая закрытая
        pp = df.iloc[-4]   # FIX-B2: позапрошлая закрытая

        body_c  = abs(c["close"] - c["open"])
        total_c = c["high"] - c["low"]
        body_p  = abs(p["close"] - p["open"])
        total_p = p["high"] - p["low"] if (p["high"] - p["low"]) > 1e-10 else 1e-10

        if total_c < 1e-10:
            return "", ""

        uw_c = c["high"] - max(c["close"], c["open"])  # upper wick
        lw_c = min(c["close"], c["open"]) - c["low"]   # lower wick

        bull, bear = "", ""

        # ── Бычий Пин-бар ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
        if (lw_c >= body_c * 1.5 and uw_c < body_c * 0.5
                and c["close"] >= c["open"]):
            bull = "Пин-бар покупок"

        # ── Медвежий Пин-бар ───────────────────────────────────────────────
        elif (uw_c >= body_c * 1.5 and lw_c < body_c * 0.5
              and c["close"] <= c["open"]):
            bear = "Пин-бар продаж"

        # ── Бычье поглощение ───────────────────────────────────────────────
        elif (c["close"] > c["open"] and p["close"] < p["open"]
              and c["open"] <= p["close"] and c["close"] > p["open"]):
            bull = "Бычье поглощение"

        # ── Медвежье поглощение ────────────────────────────────────────────
        elif (c["close"] < c["open"] and p["close"] > p["open"]
              and c["open"] >= p["close"] and c["close"] < p["open"]):
            bear = "Медвежье поглощение"

        # ── Doji у уровня ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
        elif body_c / total_c < 0.10:
            # Doji сам по себе нейтрален — дальше уточняем по позиции хвостов
            if lw_c > uw_c * 2:
                bull = "Бычий Doji (Dragonfly)"
            elif uw_c > lw_c * 2:
                bear = "Медвежий Doji (Gravestone)"
            # else: нейтральный Doji — пропускаем

        # ── Hammer / Inverted Hammer ───────────────────────────────────────
        elif (lw_c >= total_c * 0.6 and body_c <= total_c * 0.3):
            bull = "Молот (Hammer)"
        elif (uw_c >= total_c * 0.6 and body_c <= total_c * 0.3):
            bear = "Перевёрнутый молот"

        # ── Inside Bar (сжатие перед движением) ───────────────────────────
        elif (c["high"] <= p["high"] and c["low"] >= p["low"]):
            # Нейтральный паттерн, добавляем как слабый
            bull = "Inside Bar (сжатие)"
            bear = "Inside Bar (сжатие)"

        # ── Morning Star (3-свечной бычий разворот) ────────────────────────
        if not bull and not bear:
            if (pp["close"] < pp["open"]                   # медвежья
                    and body_p / total_p < 0.3             # маленькое тело
